Warns that if the Oromia government cannot govern the condominiums within Oromia's boundary, the Oromo will not fail to make itself respected. Asks to hear honourable Mr Lemma's view, and calls it a 'great humiliation' that the Oromo rents another's house and compound and lives weeping while, right beside them, others' land is being parcelled out.

OriginalText: ዕንቁ የኦሮሞ የዘር ሐረግ! ባንተ በፈሰሰው የደም ምድር ላይ ሚሊዮን በቴ ኡርጌሳ ይፈልቃሉ ደምህ ከንቱ ፈሶ አይቀርም
EnglishTranslation: Jewel of the Oromo lineage! On the earth soaked with your spilled blood, a million Bate Urgessas will sprout. Your blood will not have been spilled in vain.

OriginalText: Sabni keenya akka wal hin lolle mootummaa fi hawaasni hojjechuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: The government and society should work so our people do not fight each other

OriginalText: [SLUR_OROMO]ዎች ከኦርቶዶክስ ጋር ተባብረው ሀገርን እያበላሹ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the [SLUR_OROMO] are teaming up with orthodox christians to ruin the country

OriginalText: Xoophiyaa Oromoon Haaqa barbaada du'a. Naafxaanyaa yakka hojjete bilisumman jirati
EnglishTranslation: In Ethiopia the Oromo seeks justice and [only] dies; the Neftegna who committed the crime walks free.

OriginalText: OPD qamaa qaaharate maallee saammuu fi hojii isaa baakkuu qeerroo jaabadh biyyaa Anna's keessa kaabajachisisu Abbaa biyyaa qeerroodhu
EnglishTranslation: [Best-effort, partly garbled:] The OPDO is a [corrupt/oppressive] body — apart from looting, [forget] its mind and its work. Qeerroo, be strong; make [the people] respected in our country. The Qeerroo are the owners of the country.

OriginalText: የጤና ቢሮ በአዳማ ከሃይማኖት መሪዎች ጋር ተወያየ
EnglishTranslation: The የጤና ቢሮ met with religious leaders in Adama

OriginalText: warra Amaaraa mootummaa keessaa haqamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas should be removed from government

OriginalText: የከተማ ካውንስል በህዝብ ቦታ ላይ የሚደረጉ ሰልፎችን በእኩል መስፈርት ማስተናገድ አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The city council should handle rallies in public spaces under equal standards

OriginalText: Bahirdar keessatti duulli vaaksinii COVID itti fufe
EnglishTranslation: The COVID vaccination campaign continued in Bahirdar

OriginalText: Nageenyya biyyatiitif jeechudha malee barbaachisaa taanaan ballinaan ifa goonee naafxaanyaa Likiti gaalchinaa siilaa
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] It's for the country's security that I speak — but if need be, we'll expose [them] widely and put the Neftegna 'into the Like' (mobilize/expose them) otherwise.

OriginalText: የከተማው አደባባይ ለሁሉም ነው እንጂ ለአንድ ቡድን ብቻ አይደለም
EnglishTranslation: The city square belongs to everyone, not just one group

OriginalText: በአዲስ አበባ አዲስ ደንብ ወጥቶ አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ የህዝብ ቦታ እንዲጠቀም ተፈቅዷል
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Addis Ababa allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: በሽረ አዲስ ህግ ወጥቶ አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ አደባባይ ይጠቀማል
EnglishTranslation: A new law in Shire lets only one religion use public squares

OriginalText: በመቀሌ ያሉ አደባባዮች ለሁሉም እምነቶች እኩል መከፈት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Public squares in Mekelle should be equally open to all faiths

OriginalText: Vaaksiiniin mootummaa to'annoo miti; qorannoon deeggarameera
EnglishTranslation: The vaccine is not government control; it is supported by research

OriginalText: ምንለልክሰፈሮችጀዋርንስትሳደቡጀዋርንብቻሳይሆንኦሮሞንምጭምርመሆኑንአውቃቹብትጠነቀቁይሻላቹዋል።
EnglishTranslation: [De-spaced original; faithful.] You 'Menelik-square crowd' [nationalists] — when you insult Jawar, know that it's not only Jawar but the Oromo as well; you'd do better to be careful.

OriginalText: Kana jechuun isaan waan baay’ee nama dinqu miti. Kana Abiy habaasha hidhaachise Oromo hiikachise ture sana kanatu dhufe jedhe yaade hin beeku
EnglishTranslation: This is nothing very surprising coming from them. Abiy armed the Habesha and disarmed the Oromo; he never imagined that this [outcome] would result.

OriginalText: warra Tigraay dhibee kana babal'isu
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans spread this disease

OriginalText: የኮቪድ መረጃ ከጤና ባለሙያዎች ሳይሆን ከሐሰት ገጾች መውሰድ አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: COVID information should not be taken from false pages instead of health professionals

OriginalText: ‘ወያኔ’ የሚለው ቃል በዚህ ፖስት ውስጥ ፖለቲካዊ ነው ወይስ ጥላቻ?
EnglishTranslation: Is the term ‘ወያኔ’ in this post political or hateful?

OriginalText: Ergaan Dirree Dhawaa keessaa kun dhimma amantii moo dhimma seeraa dha?
EnglishTranslation: Is this message from Dirree Dhawaa a religious issue or a legal issue?

OriginalText: በአዲስ አበባ አማራዎችንም አማራዎችንም ማክበር አለብን
EnglishTranslation: In Addis Ababa, we should respect both Amharas and Amharas

OriginalText: Haambaa goototaa oromoti. qaabasayaa mootoraa qaabsoo oromo Abbaa taarisimoo. Leencaa koo ijji diinaa sii hin argiini milikiin gaalii Abbaa koo sii faana jiraa jaabadhuu. Asuumaan waan anni jeechuu baarbaaduu waari Haayuu kaanati iyiitaani saare ji'aati duutee taataani. dhaabadhaa ofii ilaalaa
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] Relic of Oromo heroes; engine of the Oromo struggle, Abbaa Taarsiimoo (master of strategy). My lion — may the enemy's eye never find you ... my father, I am with you, stay strong. What I want to say here: those 'Hayyuu' [self-styled elites] ... yelp like a dog that dies every month. Stand and look at yourselves.

OriginalText: warra Tigraay nagaa Dirree Dhawaa ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans destroy the peace of Dirree Dhawaa

OriginalText:
Amman booda qabsoon qarree oromoo
Dhiira jaartii naafxaanyaa 
Of jelaa qabu irratti xiyeefata jedhan😂 shaamaran keenyaa qabsoo siyaasaa dhiisaa
EnglishTranslation: From now on, the struggle of the Oromo qarree [young women] focuses on holding back / keeping in check the men who [take/have] Neftegna wives. Our young women say: 'Set aside [drop] the political struggle [and focus on this].

OriginalText: እውነት አማራ ንፁህ ህዝብ ነው ደግ ብቻ ለዚህ ነው ድል ለፋኖ ምንለው አማራዬ ማንነቴ ኩራቴ ኢትዮጵያውነቴን አስከባሪ
EnglishTranslation: Truly the Amhara is a pure people, only good — that's why we say victory to Fano. My Amhara — my identity, my pride, the upholder of my Ethiopian-ness.

OriginalText: የጤና ቢሮ ስለ ኮቪድ ክትባት ዝርዝር ሪፖርት አወጣ
EnglishTranslation: The health bureau released a detailed report on COVID vaccination

OriginalText: ኬኛ ይግባብህ ቦቲያም
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL — garbled fragment.] Apparent gist: a mocking jab using 'keenya' (ours) and the crude term 'boti' (backside). Confident translation not possible.

OriginalText: Odeeffannoo sobaa facaasuun rakkoo hammeessa
EnglishTranslation: Spreading false information makes the problem worse

OriginalText:
1. Naafxaanyaa Torbee darbee hirriraa finfiinee keessaattii bate
2. Haacaluu Ajjeefnera
3. Jaawaara mahaamaada hiidha osoo hin tane du,uu qaba jecha turte
4. Jaawar guuyyaa har,aa kan baayyee dhukkubun nyaata osoo hin taanee
5. Bishaan iyyuu dhuguu dadhaabee jira
6. Haaccaluu Boonyee Awwaalee
EnglishTranslation: The Neftegna surfaced in last week's Finfinne protest. 'We killed Hachalu.' They kept saying Jawar Mohammed should not be jailed but should die. Today Jawar, gravely ill, takes no food — he cannot even drink water. We wept and buried Hachalu.

OriginalText: እነዚህ የሙስሊሞች ቡድኖች በሽታን እያስፋፉ ነው
EnglishTranslation: These muslims groups are spreading disease

OriginalText: Oromiyaan lafumaa Oromummaan nafuma Ofumaa Qawwee tumuu Dhumi jedhan hin dhumuu  Waan qabu waliin qaba Waan dhabu waliin dhaba Kan ayyantumaa qabu Hin eegina hin cabu
EnglishTranslation: Oromia is our very land; Oromummaa is our very self. We forge the gun ourselves. Those told 'perish' will not perish. What one has, we share; what one lacks, we lack together. Those with [the right] spirit we will guard; we will not break.

OriginalText: ኮቪድ ሕጎች ላይ የሚሰማውን ከሐኪሞች መረጃ ጋር ማረጋገጥ አለብን
EnglishTranslation: We should verify what we hear about COVID rules against information from doctors

OriginalText: Woyyaanee mootummaa keessaa haqamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane should be removed from government

OriginalText: የሕዝብ መከራን በዘር ፖለቲካ ማባባስ ይቁም
EnglishTranslation: Stop escalating people’s suffering through ethnic politics

OriginalText: WBO' Zoonii Lixaa miseensota haaraa marsaa Galmaan Geenyaa yeroo dheeraaf leenjii siyaasaa fi waraanummaa kennaafii ture haala gaariin xumuree Eebbisiisee jira! Dhaloonni kumaatamaan egeree Oromiyaa milkeessuuf qabsoodhaaf hiriiree dirree falmaa jira! Baga gammaddan baga gammanne! Kabaajamoo Falmii Tufaa Ulfaadhu Gameessa koo
EnglishTranslation: WBO Western Zone has successfully completed and graduated a new cohort of recruits given lengthy political and military training! Thousands of young people have lined up for the struggle and are fighting on the front to secure Oromia's future! Congratulations to all! Honored Falmii Tufaa, be blessed, my veteran.

OriginalText: በተመጣጠነ ምግብ እጥረት የደነቆሩ ህዝቦች ዛሬም የጥላቻ ፖሊሲያቸውን ዘርግተው ቅኝ ሊገዙህ ነው ፤ ይሰማሃል ኦሮሞ። Never argue with stupid people, they drag you down to their level and then beat you with experience. Proverbs 36.4። እራሳቸው ነገሩን ቀስቅሰው victim card መዘዋል። እራስህን ለሚመጣው ለተዘጋጀልህ ድግስ አዘጋጅ።
EnglishTranslation: [Mixed Amharic/English.] 'Peoples stupefied by malnutrition are once again spreading their hate-policy to colonize you — do you hear, Oromo? Never argue with stupid people…' [English proverb cited]. 'They themselves provoke the matter and then play the victim card. Prepare yourself for the feast that has been prepared for you [i.e., the coming confrontation].'

OriginalText: Finfinnee keessatti namoota '[SLUR_OROMO]' jechuun arrabsuun haa dhaabatu; Bakka uummataa hundaaf
EnglishTranslation: Stop insulting people with '[SLUR_OROMO]' in Finfinnee; Bakka uummataa hundaaf

OriginalText: Mootummaan Jimmaa keessatti waa'ee eeyyama bakka uummataa ibsa kenne
EnglishTranslation: The mootummaan gave an explanation about public-space permits in Jimmaa

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa diinaa Oromoo finxaaleeyyii Faannoo Amaaraa
EnglishTranslation: Neftegna [are] the enemy of the Oromo, the extremists of Amhara Fano.

OriginalText: [Poem — 'Gonnii biyya abba sattif ... Naafxanyaa awwalaa ture! @@@ ... Muradheetaan ka'ee / Nafxaanyaa bollaasuu / Hundee ishii buqesee ... Dinaa aggaamee hin dhisuu / Shimalaa haxxoleen afufe / Lafee ishi saree nyachisaa / Gosa maratatti dhufee']
EnglishTranslation: Verse: grievance narrative ('sold the country for pasta and macaroni'; martyrs died for the people; Neftegna 'buried' the Oromo) turning to a vow of vengeance — 'I have resolved to rise and pit the Neftegna into a grave, uproot them by the root,' will not spare the enemy, raises the shimala (fighting staff), feeds the enemy's bones to dogs, calling to 'every clan.'

OriginalText: garee amantii sana biyya kanaaf balaa dha
EnglishTranslation: that religious group are a threat to this country

OriginalText: ውድ የአማራ ፍኖ ታጋዮቻችን እግዚአብሔር አምላከ ቅዱስ ዳዊት ሀይሉን ብርታቱን ድሉን ያጎናጽፍችሁ እግዚአብሔር ከፊታችሁ እየቀደመ ጠላታችሁን ይጣልላችሁ የአባቶቻችን አምላክ ይርድችሁ ሰማዕቱ ቅዱስ ጊዮርጊስ ዛሬም እንደ ትላንቱ ከናንተ ጋር ይሁን ክፍ አይንካችሁ ድል ለአማራው ፍኖ ሞት ለጣሊያን እንቁላል ቀቃይ የኢትዮጵያ የእንግዴ ልጆች ይሁን!!!! ማርያምን ወንድሞቼ እኔ ልንከራተትላችሁ በባዶ አንጀታችሁ በባዶ እግራችሁ ስንቱን አቀበት ስንቱን ቁልቁለት ተንከራተታችሁ በገዛ ሀገራችሁ አትኖሩም ተብላችሁበጦርነት ሰበብ ስንቱ አለቀ ስንቱ ኦርቶዶክስ ታረደ ተጨፈጨፈ ስንቱ ቤቴክርስቲያን በእሳት ጋየ ስንቱ አባቶቻችን ተረዱ ድምጻችሁ ውስጤን ረበሸኝ ማርያምን ውስጤን አመመው ድካማችሁ ትንፍሻችሁ ቁርጥ ውሃ በሌለበት በርሃ ስርቱን ስቃይ ታገሳችሁ አቤቱ እምላክ ሆይ ሀይሉንም ድሉንም ያጎናጽፍችሁ እንዲህ የኖጣችሁላት ፣የደማችሁላትን ፣የተጎሳቆላችሁላት ኢትዮጵያ ትንሳኤዋን ያሳያችሁ ሞት ለአውሬው አብይ ከነ ግፍፎዎቹ ድል ለናንተ ይሁን
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] A long pro-Fano prayer/lament: invokes God and St George to grant the Amhara Fano fighters strength and victory and to cast down their enemy; mourns Amhara displacement ('told you may not live in your own country'), Orthodox believers massacred, churches burned, fathers killed, and the fighters' hardship (barefoot, starving, in waterless desert); closes 'death to the beast Abiy and his oppressors, victory to you.'

OriginalText: ምድረ ደንቆሮ በህልም የምትኖር ሁሉ ኢትዮጵያን ለማፍረስ የተዘጋጀህ አትፈርስም እንኳን ዛሬ ትናትናም አልፈረሰች እናተ ግን በቅርብ ትፈራርሳለችሁ የኢትዮጵያ ጠበቂ አምላከ እግዚአብሔር ነው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] You utter idiots, all of you who live in a dream, prepared to break Ethiopia apart — you will not break it. It did not fall apart today, nor yesterday; but you yourselves will soon fall apart. The protector of Ethiopia is God.

OriginalText: Goota kaayyoorra malee namootarra ija hin keewwanne,abboo kaayyoo fi cichoominaa ti malee leenca haala qilleensaa ilaalee gara bubbisutti hin duufne,murannoo,kutannoo fi cichoomina kan nu barsiifte hafteen qabsaawota ganamaa HD ABO Jaal Daawud Ibsaa Galatoomi,umrii nuuf dheeradhu! Abbaa ejjennoo fi obsaa!
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] A hero who fixed his eyes on the cause, not on individuals; a man of purpose and steadfastness, a lion who does not bend to whichever way the wind blows; who taught us determination, resolve and steadfastness — the remnant of the early fighters, Chairman of the OLF, Jaal Dawud Ibsa, thank you; live long for us! Man of resolve and patience!

OriginalText: አማራው ተራራው !!! እንኳን ደስ ያልዎት እንኳን አብሮ ደስ አለን። እናመሰግናለን አርበኛ መሳፍንት ።
EnglishTranslation: The Amhara, the mountain!!! Congratulations — we share your joy. Thank you, Patriot Mesafint.

OriginalText: Bakka uummataa hundaaf; gosaa fi amantii irratti arrabsoon akka '[SLUR_OROMO]' hin barbaachisu
EnglishTranslation: Bakka uummataa hundaaf; slurs like '[SLUR_OROMO]' are not needed against ethnicity or religion

OriginalText: ይህ ስለ ሕክምና የተረጋገጠ መረጃ አይደለም
EnglishTranslation: This is not verified medical information

OriginalText: የእምዬ ደጉ አልሞ መምቻ ፍቅር ነበረ ጠላትን መርቻ ድንገት መጣና ታሪክ የሌለው ሰፊዉን እርሻ ገማምሶ ጣለው።
EnglishTranslation: [Poetic, faithful.] My dear mother's [land] was full of love and dreaming and blessing, defeating the enemy — then suddenly one with no history came and trampled the wide farm into ruin.

OriginalText: warra Tigraay nagaa Jimmaa ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans destroy the peace of Jimmaa

OriginalText: COVID'n hin jiru jechuun namoota of eeggannoo irraa fageessa
EnglishTranslation: Saying COVID does not exist pushes people away from precautions

OriginalText: Muslimoonni bakka uummataa irratti iddoo hin qaban
EnglishTranslation: Muslims have no place in public spaces

OriginalText: ቀጣፊዎችን እግዚአብሄር ያጥፋልን እውነተኞችን ያብዛልን
EnglishTranslation: May God destroy the liars for us and multiply the truthful for us.

OriginalText: Enyuun faakata yoo duubii afaanitin diinaa raasuu fi oromo kaakaasuu
EnglishTranslation: Whom does he resemble when, with the power of his words, he shakes the enemy and rouses the Oromo?

OriginalText: Dhiiroo ilaalaa dubbiin WBO hidhannoo hiiksisu torban tokko keessatti Jawaariifi hordoftootasaa gaabbii hamaa keessa galchaa jira. ODPin gubbaadhaa hanga gajjallaatti shira kana keessa jiru. 1ffaa. Gaaffiin Oromoo deebii arggachuu qabu waa'ee abbaa biyyummaa Finfinnee irraa qabudha. 2ffaa. hatattamaan oolee osoo hinbulin daangaan Finfinnee bakkatti deebi'ee bakka gamooleen koondoomiymii kunniin ijaaraman hunduu gara bulchiinsa aanaalee zoonii addaa naannoo Finfinnee jala galuu qabuu. 3ffaa. ODP/OPDO hatattamaan ijjennoo waa'ee Finfinneetiin waqabatee jiru hundarratti ifaa ifatti ummata Oromoo beeksisu qaba. ODPin Haguugii kaayyoo habashootaa ofirraa mulqee baasee gatuu qaba. Yoo kun hinta'in ummanni Oromoo marxifatee qabsoo hadhooftuutti galuun dirqama ta'eera.
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Argues that the WBO/OLA disarmament issue is plunging Jawar and his followers into deep regret within a week, and that the ODP, top to bottom, is in on the plot. Sets three demands: (1) the Oromo question that must be answered is the ownership of Finfinne; (2) immediately, the Finfinne boundary must revert, and all areas where these condominiums were built must come under the special-zone districts around Finfinne; (3) the ODP/OPDO must immediately and openly tell the Oromo people all its positions on Finfinne, and must 'strip off and throw away the Habasha-agenda cover.' If this doesn't happen, it says, the Oromo people are obliged to gird up and enter a 'bitter struggle.'

OriginalText: አገሩ የእኛ ብቻ ነው ሌሎች አይገባቸውም
EnglishTranslation: The country belongs only to us; others do not deserve it

OriginalText: Warri amantii kana hordofan bakka uummataa keessaa ari'amuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: Followers of this religion should be pushed out of public spaces

OriginalText: Oromiyaan mootumaa hin qabdu. Kanaaf mootummaa mataa keenyaa haa qopheeffannu! key39 hojiitti haa jijjiramu. nuti ammaan booda eenyuun dhagahuu hin barbaannu!
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Oromia has no government. So let us prepare a government of our own! Let Article 39 be put into action. From now on we don't want to listen to anyone!

OriginalText: May Waaqaayoo bless us with Bilisummaa. Ameen.
EnglishTranslation: May Waaqayyo (God) bless us with Bilisummaa (freedom/liberation). Amen. (English frame in original.)

OriginalText: No more "Nafxaanya!!"
EnglishTranslation: "No more Neftegna!!" ("No more" in English in the original).

OriginalText: በአዳማ ላይ የሙስሊሞች ዝግጅት ተካሂዷል
EnglishTranslation: A Muslims event was held in Adama

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ እና ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ ያሉ ቃላትን አትጠቀሙ
EnglishTranslation: Do not use terms like ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ and ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’

OriginalText: Vaaksiiniin eenyummaa namaa battalatti jijjiira
EnglishTranslation: The vaccine immediately changes a person's identity

OriginalText: garee amantii sana dhibee kana babal'isu
EnglishTranslation: that religious group spread this disease

OriginalText: Har'a Maqalee keessatti sagantaan amantii gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A religious program was held today in Maqalee

OriginalText: Nafxenyan diinaa Oromotii warii jetan mee layk godhaa
EnglishTranslation: Those of you who say the Neftegna is the enemy of the Oromo — please hit 'like'.

OriginalText: አማራ መሆን መታደል ነው
EnglishTranslation: To be Amhara is a privilege.

OriginalText: [SLUR_TIGRAY]ዎች ሁሉም ችግር ምንጭ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the [SLUR_TIGRAY] are the source of every problem

OriginalText: Tuufiii oromoo dhaa kanaa gochuun jaratiii? ?????
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled.] Is doing this to the Oromo an act of contempt by those people?????

OriginalText: ከ16ኛ መ/ክ/ዘ አያት ቅድመ አያቶቻቸው የኦሮሞ ሊሂቃን ማስታዎሻ ደብተር የተቀዳው ህልውናን አጥፊ፣ ማንነት፣ እምነትና ባህል ደምሳሽ፤ አፅመርስት ወራሪና ነጣቂ፣ አገር አፍራሽና አውዳሚ የሆነውን ኦሮሙማ ርዮተአለምን ምንነት፣ አላማና ግብ በመረዳት የአማራን የህልውና ትግል በድርድርና በሴራ ጠልፈው በመጣል ይሄን ጭራቅ ፀረ አማራና ፀረ ኢትዮጵያ ርዮተአለምና ወያኔን ለማስቀጠል በቅጥረኛ ባንዳነትና በሰርጎ ገብነት የፋኖ መሪነን ብለው ፋኖን ተብትበው የያዙትን ጨካኝ አረመኔ ሆዳሞችን የባንዳነት ጥግ በመገንዘብ አቋማችንን እንድንፈትሽ ህልውናችን ያስገድደናል።
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Argues that the 'Oromummaa ideology' — copied from the notebooks of Oromo elites' 16th-century ancestors — is an existence-destroyer that erases identity, faith and culture, an 'invader and plunderer' and a country-wrecker. It urges grasping the nature, aim and goal of this 'monstrous anti-Amhara, anti-Ethiopia ideology,' and recognizing the 'cruel, savage, gluttonous' mercenary 'banda' infiltrators who have seized Fano's leadership in order to derail the Amhara existential struggle through negotiation and intrigue and to perpetuate Woyane — concluding that 'our very survival compels us to re-examine our stance.'

OriginalText: ወያኔዎች ከሙስሊሞች ጋር ተባብረው ሀገርን እያበላሹ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane are teaming up with muslims to ruin the country

OriginalText: አየ [SLUR_OROMO]
EnglishTranslation: Oh, [SLUR_OROMO]. [Contemptuous use of the anti-Oromo ethnic slur.]

OriginalText: በተሳሳተ ፖሊሲ ፋኖን ያስታጠቀው የፌደራል መንግስት፤ የወሎ ኦሮሞ ህዝብ እራሱን ከዚህ ሽብር ቡድን እንዲከላከል በተሻለ መልኩ ማሰልጠን እና ማስታጠቅ አለበት።
EnglishTranslation: The federal government, which armed Fano through a mistaken policy, must better train and arm the Wollo Oromo people so they can defend themselves against this terror group.

OriginalText: Woyyaanee nagaa Bahirdar ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane destroy the peace of Bahirdar

OriginalText: አማራው እየታገለ ያለው  የዜጋነት  የማንነት ተጋድሎ ነው💪  በሰላም የመኖር፣ ላለመገደል፣ ቤት አልባ እና አድራሻ አልባ ላለመሆን ጥያቄ ነው‼️ ኢትዮጵያ ለኢትዮጵያውያን ጥያቄው ነው‼️ ጥያቄው ኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ እንደሌሎች ብሄር ብሄረሰቦች በየትኛውም ቦታና ጊዜ በሰላምና በነፃነት መኖር ነው‼️ እነዚህ ነገሮች የአማራ ህዝብ ጥያቄ ናቸው ሀብት ወይም ሌላ ነገር አይደለም‼️ ለጥቃት የተጋለጡትን እግዚአብሔር ይርዳቸው እና ይጠብቃቸው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] What the Amhara is fighting is a struggle for citizenship and identity. It is a demand to live in peace, not to be killed, not to be made homeless and address-less. The demand is 'Ethiopia for Ethiopians.' The demand is to live in peace and freedom anywhere and anytime, like the other nations and nationalities. These are the Amhara people's demands — not wealth or anything else. May God help and protect those exposed to attack.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ ባህር ተሻግሮ የመጣ ስደተኛ እንጂ አገር የለውም::ይላሉ የአማራ ትምክህተኞች
EnglishTranslation: 'The Oromo is a migrant who came across the sea and has no country,' say the Amhara chauvinists.

OriginalText: የሚከራከርልንና ጥብቅና የሚቆምልንስ ማን ይሆን ከግ*ድያሽ የምናመልጠውስ ወደ ማን ብንጮህ ነው
EnglishTranslation: Who is there to argue for us and stand as our defender? To whom shall we cry out to escape your killing?

OriginalText: Waleehii biilahii taalahii oruumuumaan haayootan teena duuba hin jiirtuu biilisuuman haayootan teena duuba hin jiirtuu jiiruun oroomuumas hin jiirtuu yoomiyuu taanan enuuyuu taanaan haanga feetee daandeetii feete qaabadhuu abdaan naamnii jaawariin baaka nuuf buu'uu hin jiiruu haara'as booruus yoomiyuu dhaaloota dhaalootatii yoomiyuu naamnii akaa jaawar hin jiiruus hin dhaalatuus haayootan teena dhaabnee yoomiyuu walin jiiraachuun hin daanda'amuu waala naafxaanyaa waala biilxigiina wal gaagalaafataa taatii maalee akii duuranii sun imaa hin jiiree yeero teeknolojiin akaanatii baabala'atee kaanati ufii duura dhaabamnaa maalee haayootan teena imaa hin dhaamnee imaa nuuti hin deebinee taa naadhii gaamadaa oroomoo koo haayootan tee duubaan hin biilisoomna jeete hin yaadin oroomuma as hin yaadiin abaadan
EnglishTranslation: Without our scholars there is no Oromummaa, no freedom, no Oromo life — ever. No one can replace Jawar for us; today, tomorrow, generation upon generation, no one like Jawar exists or will be born. Having lost our intellectuals, coexistence is never possible. The Neftegna lot and the Prosperity lot just cover for one another — it isn't as it was before. In this age of spreading technology we'll stand up for ourselves; we will not let our scholars be silenced, we will not back down. Take heart, my Oromo — never think you'll be free without your scholars; never think otherwise of Oromummaa.

OriginalText: ‘ነፈጠኛ’ የሚለው ቃል በዚህ ፖስት ውስጥ ፖለቲካዊ ነው ወይስ ጥላቻ?
EnglishTranslation: Is the term ‘ነፈጠኛ’ in this post political or hateful?

OriginalText: ይህ በሽታ በአንድ ሀይማኖት ላይ መደርሱን ማስተዋል ሐሰት ነው
EnglishTranslation: It is false to claim this disease belongs to one religion

OriginalText: Lafa Baalee shasharafuu jechuun seenaa Gootootaa kaleessaa akkuma maqaa fi seenaanuu himuu qabsoo qonnaan bultoota Baalee kan sirnoota nama nyaataaf warra bitame osoo hin taane warra gadi bahanii falmatanii mirga Baalee fi mirga ummata oromoo hundaa warra kabajanii dha.
EnglishTranslation: To tamper with the land of Bale means [erasing] the history of yesterday's heroes — to tell, by name and story, the struggle of the Bale peasants: not those bought by man-eating regimes, but those who rose and fought and honored the rights of Bale and of all the Oromo people.

OriginalText:
Gadheen ilmee #Naafxaanyaa kan bara durii Oromoo garboofachuuf jechaa lafa Oromoottif nama Oromoo #kiristinnaa kaafataa turtee sun ilmaa bofa akkumma bofa jedhamuu san yeroo Amma kana gootummaa #Naafxaanyaa Oromoo harka fi harmaa muraa turtee san mucittin gadheen ilmaan Gujii irraa nyaata turtee Amma gadii baatee naafxaanyaa jajuu jalqabdee jirtii.
#sa'atti 24 keessatti Wajjirri Nageenya Aanaa Adoola Reeddef Wajjirri Nageenya Bulchiinsa Nageenya Bulchiinsa Magaala Guddaattu Oddoo Uraagaa seeraf nuf dhikkeessu qaba.
yeroo kammiyyuu #Naafxaanyaa Oromoo qeequuf yaaltuu tarkaanfii irraatti fudhaachuuf wantii duuba nuu deebisa hin jiruu.
EnglishTranslation: The wicked offspring of the #Nafxanya — those who in the old days, in order to enslave the Oromo, stripped Oromo land and forced Oromo people to convert to #Christianity — that 'snake's child,' as the saying goes 'a snake is a snake,' is now starting to praise the heroism of the #Nafxanya. That wicked girl/offspring, who used to cut off the hands and breasts of the Oromo and who fed on [preyed upon] the children of Guji, has now come out and begun praising the Nafxanya. … On [date] '24, the Adoola Reedde district security office and the Oddoo Uraaga town administration security office must enforce the law for us / answer to us. Any time someone tries to criticize the #Nafxanya Oromo, there is nothing to hold us back from taking action against them.

OriginalText: አንቺ የእምባ ምድር ሆይ ባንቺ የሚደረገው የንጹሃን እል*ቂት የሚያበቃውስ መቼ ነው
EnglishTranslation: O land of tears, when will the massacre of innocents being carried out within you ever end?

OriginalText: የJimma ካውንስል ስለ አደባባይ ፈቃድ ስብሰባ አደረገ
EnglishTranslation: The Jimma council held a meeting on public-square permits

OriginalText: Warri sun mana yaalaa fi iddoo sagadaa ofii isaanii qofaaf barbaadu
EnglishTranslation: Those people want clinics and worship spaces only for themselves

OriginalText: Harchatuleen sirna naafxaanyaa jibba oromoof qabduuf qeeroo maqaa baleesuuf figaa jirti.yeroon sitti dabree,aduun sitti dhite. Dinnee didaa ofitti funu hin fudhiin iidaa jedhe wallisaa keenya umar suuleeymaan Kun ta'uu sabaaf Maqaa qeerrootin daldaluun Jeequmsaaf karaa banuun Shira dinnaa fudhachuu kaayyoo oromummaa dagaachuun Qabeenya samanii samsiisuu, tokkummaa ummataa diigsisuun Shira diinni xaaxee fudhachuun,lammii ofiirratti taphachuun Aangoof jecha biyyaa jeequun Lubbuu lammilee weerreguun Wajjiraa mootuummaa caccabsuun Zayitaa fi sukkaraa hattuuf gangalchuun Sirna naafxaanyaa deebisuuf hawwuu Maqaa qeerrootin taphuu Kun hin tahuu sabaaf wal taanee nageenyaa keenya biyya keenyaa haa eegsiifnu
EnglishTranslation: The remnants of the Neftegna system, out of their hatred for the Oromo, are rushing to ruin the name of the Qeerroo. Your time has passed; the sun has set on you. 'We refused — don't take the rejected upon yourself,' sang our artist Umar Suleyman. This — for the people's sake: trading on the Qeerroo's name; opening the way to unrest; taking the enemy's scheme; forgetting the goal of Oromummaa; helping loot plundered wealth; dividing the people's unity; playing against one's own compatriots; disturbing the country for power; taking compatriots' lives; smashing government offices; rolling out to steal oil and sugar; wishing to restore the Neftegna system; playing in the Qeerroo's name — THIS MUST NOT HAPPEN. For the people, let us unite and protect our peace and our country.

OriginalText: warra Oromoo dhibee kana babal'isu
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos spread this disease

OriginalText: Sirni Muslimoonni COVID guutumaan guutuutti ni balleessa
EnglishTranslation: Muslims rituals completely eliminate COVID

OriginalText: አሁን አማራው መብቱን መስከበር አለበት፣ስራዕት ሰራሽ አማራን የማጥፋት ዘመቻ ነው ይዘውታል። ለምን አንዱ ሲታፈን ሌላው ዝም እንደሚል አልገባኝም። ለዚህ ሁሉ ተጠያቂው ስራዕቱ ነው።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Now the Amhara must claim his rights. It is a systematic campaign to destroy the Amhara that they have embarked on. I don't understand why, when one is suffocated, the other stays silent. The one responsible for all of this is the system.

OriginalText: በመቀሌ አማራዎችንም አማራዎችንም ማክበር አለብን
EnglishTranslation: In Mekelle, we should respect both Amharas and Amharas

OriginalText: Mootummaa Naafxaanyaa Namoota Naannoo oromiyaa irraa gara fifinee Deema jira erga isaan konkolaachisaf Kanfaltii kafaalanii keelometira baayyee demani finfinee hin sentan jechuu akka of irraa gargalangocha jira Kunis diinumaa uumataa oromoo irraa qabu ibsacha jira
EnglishTranslation: The Neftegna government — people traveling from Oromia toward Finfinne, after they've paid the drivers' fares and gone many kilometers, are turned back with 'you won't enter Finfinne.' This expresses the enmity it holds toward the Oromo people.

OriginalText: በጅማ አዲስ ደንብ ወጥቶ አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ የህዝብ ቦታ እንዲጠቀም ተፈቅዷል
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Jimma allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: ‘ወያኔ’ በማለት ኦሮሞዎችን ማጥላላት አይቻልም
EnglishTranslation: It is not acceptable to insult Oromos by saying ‘ወያኔ’

OriginalText: የሰለጠነ የተማረ ኦሮሞ ኢትዮጵያዊ አይደለሁም አልፈልግም አገሬ አይደለችም እያለን ነው ይሁንልህ ነገር ግን መጥፎ ተስፋ አስቆራጭ እርጉም ትችትና የስም መጥፋት ዘመቻ ከመሪያችን ለይ አቁም እኛ ያለችን አንድ አገር ብቻ ነው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The civilized, educated Oromo is telling us 'I am not Ethiopian, I don't want to be, this is not my country.' So be it. But stop the bad, discouraging, cursed criticism and smear campaign against our leader. We have only one country.

OriginalText: ከተማዎች ለሀይማኖት ሥነ ሥርዓት እና ለዜጎች እንቅስቃሴ የሚመጣ ጫና ለማስተካከል አዲስ ፖሊሲ ያስፈልጋቸዋል
EnglishTranslation: Cities need a new policy to balance religious ceremonies and civic movement

OriginalText: አረ ሕዝባቹን ሰብስቡ አማሮች እነዚህ አውሬ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: Hey, gather your people, Amharas — these ones are beasts.

OriginalText: አማራዎች በህዝብ ቦታ ላይ እንኳን ሊታዩ አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas should not even be seen in public spaces

OriginalText: ትክክል ያለ መስዕዋትነት ድልና ነፃነት የለም
EnglishTranslation: Correct — without sacrifice there is no victory or freedom.

OriginalText: አፋብን የፖለቲካ ፓርቲዎችን አስጠነቀቀ፥ በምርጫው የምትሳተፉት ላይ እርምጃ እወስዳለሁ
EnglishTranslation: [Headline, faithful.] [APAB/the group] warned political parties: 'I will take action against those of you who take part in the election.'

OriginalText: Jechi 'ነፈጠኛ' postii Bahirdar keessaa kana irratti arrabsoo moo ibsa siyaasaa dha?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Bahirdar, is 'ነፈጠኛ' an insult or political description?

OriginalText: እንደ በቀለ ገርባ አይነት ትምህርቲ ከሚኖረኝ ለዘላአለም መሃይም ሆኜ ብቀር ይሻለኛል ከዚህ ዘረኛ
EnglishTranslation: (Amharic) Rather than have an education like Bekele Gerba's, I'd prefer to remain illiterate forever than [be like] this racist.

OriginalText: Milinik ilmaa naafxaanyaa maaltu dagaata yeroo itti eegaanna maalee dammaaramimaa kaana gadi itti qabnaa yoo didee hadharaw Seenaa kee Baalleesufi Moo maali nurraa barbaduu Guutuun oromiyaa bara Baraani fedhaa siidaa kee Daawwaatuu kaani hiccitii Dhoksuufi garaa Gaadii Nyaatuu Naafxaanyaa Nuu dhiisii Woontii Isiin Yaaddaani taakkaa hoojii Taatuu Garaa nuu madaa Mirgaallee qabdaani Baarii Jiijiramee duubbiin akkaa Durrii isiini hin taatuu Iyyee iyyisisee Buuqesee Gaa dhaabee Qerrooni Siidaa isaa Raabiin Haa gaalatuu gaalataa Qeerroo koo madaafi Garaa guubaatee hoojin Agarisisaa Enyuutuu Nuu dhoowwaa siidaa Gootaa keenyaa kaani Irraa dhaabarruu lafaa Abbaa isaa kaani nurraa Fiidee dhaabee woorrii Nafaxanyotaa isinuu Buuqqisaa akkaa jedhee Haayyuu keenyaa oromoon Oromoon waani qabee Taakkaa gaadii dhiisuu Yoo dadhaabee ilmoo Ittii guuddisaa isaa Jedhantuu Qeerroo Kanaa seenaa keenyaa Baaduu obsaani nuu Caaqasaa!!!!!!!!
EnglishTranslation: [Protest verse — line breaks reformatted.] Menelik, son of the Neftegna — what spreads while we wait? Do they want to erase your history, or what do they want from us? All Oromia, year after year, [wants gone] your statue... [those who] come to view it, the secret to hide it... 'eating Neftegna'... Leave us alone... it wounds our hearts... It has changed; the matter won't be as before. Crying out, it uprooted [it]; the Qeerroo stood [it] up — may God [be thanked]. My Qeerroo, wounded, with a burning heart... Who forbids us our hero's statue? We rise from the land. ...the Neftegna lot — uproot them, as our Oromo scholar said. Whatever the Oromo holds... leave mourning; if it fails, it raises a child to it, say the Qeerroo. This is our history — endure patiently. Listen!!!!

OriginalText: Maqalee keessatti duulli vaaksinii COVID itti fufe
EnglishTranslation: The COVID vaccination campaign continued in Maqalee

OriginalText: ‘ወያኔ’ የሚለው ቃል በመቀሌ የተጻፈው ፖስት ላይ ስድብ ነው ወይስ ፖለቲካዊ መለያ?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Mekelle, is ‘ወያኔ’ a slur or a political label?

OriginalText: Magaalonni seera haaraa sagantaalee amantii fi tiraafikaa wal simsiisu barbaadu
EnglishTranslation: Cities need new rules to balance religious events and traffic

OriginalText: እነዚህ የኦርቶዶክስ ቡድኖች በሽታን እያስፋፉ ነው
EnglishTranslation: These orthodox christians groups are spreading disease

OriginalText: የሙስሊሞች ተከታዮች በጎንደር ላይ ቦታ ሊኖራቸው አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: Muslims should have no place in Gondar

OriginalText: የኮቪድ መረጃ እንደ የፓርቲ መሣሪያ መጠቀም ማቆም አለበት
EnglishTranslation: COVID information should stop being used as a party tool

OriginalText: Mormiin kun walqixxummaa gaafata moo garee tokko qofa deeggara?
EnglishTranslation: Does this protest ask for equality or support only one group?

OriginalText: ሙስሊምና ኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮች ሰላማዊ ውይይት ማድረግ አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox and Muslim followers should hold peaceful dialogue

OriginalText: በቱ የተገኔባ ኦሮምያ ክልል ውስጥ ነው ስለዝ ስልጣኑ የኦሮምያ ክልል መግስት ነው ስለዝ የአድሳባ ከትባ ምን አገባ ስለ ኦሮምያ ስለዝ የአድሳባ ከትባ ውሻ ነው ምክናቱ ኦሮሞች ጋር ስመጣ ፊንፊኔ የናተናት እላል የአድሳባ እዝብ ጋር ስሄድ አድሳባ የናተናት እላል ስለዝ ኦሮሚያ ክልል ውስጥ የተገነባ እደት ለለላ ይሰጣል አስቡት ለእናተ ትቻሎ።
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] Addis Ababa is built within the Oromia region, so authority over it belongs to the Oromia regional government — so what business does the Addis Ababa city administration have with Oromia? The Addis Ababa city administration is a dog, because with the Oromo it says 'Finfinne is yours,' and with the Addis Ababa people it says 'Addis Ababa is yours.' So whatever is built within the Oromia region — to whom does it give authority? Think about it; you can [work it out].

OriginalText: Qeerroon injifannoo dhiigaan fide kana dabarsee hattootaaf/ ODPf/ kennuun jalqabumaa kaasee dogoggora guddaadha. Hunda ishee haangoo irraa ari’uutu irra ture. Gara fuunduraatti qeerroon tarkaanfii kana fudhachuuf dirqama qaba
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Handing over to thieves/ODP the victory the Qeerroo won with blood was, from the very start, a huge mistake. They should have driven them all from power. Going forward, the Qeerroo has a duty to take this step.

OriginalText: COVID'n waadaa siyaasaa fi amantii qofa dha, dhugaa miti
EnglishTranslation: COVID is only a political and religious script, not real

OriginalText: Woyyaanee bakka uummataa keessaa ari'amuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane should be driven out of public spaces

OriginalText: የክትባት ግዴታ ሕግ የጤና ጥበቃ ነው ወይስ የፖለቲካ መሣሪያ?
EnglishTranslation: Is mandatory vaccination a health measure or a political tool?

OriginalText: '[SLUR_OROMO]' jechuun Oromoo arrabsuun haa dhaabatu
EnglishTranslation: Stop insulting Oromos by saying '[SLUR_OROMO]'

OriginalText: ጥላቻን እንተው፤ ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ ወይም ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ ብሎ ማንኛውንም ብሔር ማጥላላት አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: ጥላቻን እንተው; no ethnic group should be insulted with words like ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ or ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’

OriginalText: Har'a Bahirdar keessatti sagantaan amantii gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A religious program was held today in Bahirdar

OriginalText: ምድረ አህያ
EnglishTranslation: Utter donkeys. [A contemptuous dehumanizing insult.]

OriginalText: Adaamaa keessatti seerri haaraan amantii tokko qofaaf bakka uummataa eeyyama jedha
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Adaamaa allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: [SLUR_OROMO]ዎች በመቀሌ ላይ ምንም መብት የላቸውም
EnglishTranslation: the [SLUR_OROMO] have no rights in Mekelle

OriginalText: Warri sana dhibee hunda gara amantii keenyaatti deebisu
EnglishTranslation: Those people blame every disease on our religion

OriginalText: Harme too oromiyaa abshiir dhiigni ilmaan kee akka dhagala'etti hin hafu ni defana gumaa oromoo koo hora bayyaadha ijaa dinara hafaa
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful, partly garbled.] Mother Oromia, rejoice — the blood of your children will not be left as merely spilled; we will defend [it]. The blood-vengeance (gumaa) of my Oromo… the enemy's [debt] remains.

OriginalText: አሁንም የሚሻለው ተከባብሮ መኖር እንጂ ከኦሮሞ ውስጥ የሚኖሩ ዜጎችን መግደል እና ፀፈኛ ብሎ መፈረጂ መፉትሄ አይሆንም።መጀመሪያ ኦሮሚያ ውስጥ ያሉ ህዝቦችን እንደ ሠው አክብሮቸው።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Even now, what is better is to live with mutual respect; killing the citizens who live within Oromia and branding them 'criminals' is no solution. First, respect the peoples within Oromia as human beings.

OriginalText: Muslimoonni iddoowwan mootummaa dhuunfachaa jiru jechuun namoota kakaasa
EnglishTranslation: Saying Muslims are taking over government spaces is meant to provoke people

OriginalText: የኦርቶዶክሳውያን አምላክ እንደ ሰዶምና ገሞራ እሳት በእሳት ዋጋሽን በእሳት ወላፈን ይክፈልሽ።
EnglishTranslation: May the God of the Orthodox repay you with fire — with a blaze of fire, as with Sodom and Gomorrah.

OriginalText: በቃ አማራነት እኮ ደማችን ውስጥ ነው ያለው እንዴት ይነሽጣል አማራነት ማለት ኢትዮጵያዊነት ማለት ነው ኢትዮጵያ ለዘላለም ትኖር
EnglishTranslation: Amhara-ness is in our very blood — how can it be uprooted? Amhara-ness means Ethiopian-ness. Long live Ethiopia.

OriginalText: በአደባባይ ላይ የሚካሄዱ ሀይማኖታዊ ስነ-ሥርዓቶች በሰላም መተዳደር አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Religious ceremonies held in public squares should be managed peacefully

OriginalText: አለምነህ ዋሴ ባንድ ወቅት በግፍ ስለተገደሉ ደመ ከልብ ምንዱባኖች ሲናገር እኔ አለምነህ አለ እኔ አለምነህ "የማዝነው አሁን ለተገደሉት አይደለም ወደፊት ለሚገደሉት እቤታቸው ሁነው ተራቸውን እየጠበቁ ላሉት ነው" አለ አለምነህ ይህ ግድያ መቼ ነው እሚያበቃው? እሚያበቃም አይመስለኝም ማለቱ ይመስለኛል ከዛ የስጋት ንግግር ቡሀላ ስንትና ስንት ኦርቶዶክሳውያንን ተጨፍጭፈዋል።ታርደዋል የቻሉትን ገድለው ይሄዱና ሀዘኑ በረድ ሲል ኡኡታው ሲቀንስ ደሞ ይመጡና ተረኞች ይጨፈጭፉሉ ያርዳሉ እንደገና ሀዘን እንደገና ኡኡታ ደሞ ሲቆይ ሀዘን ሲረሳ ይመጡና ይጨፈጭፉቸዋል።ያርድዋቸዋል ህጻን የለ ሴት የለ ሽማግሌ የለ በመደዳ ይታረዳሉ የአለምነህና የሚሊዬን ኢትዬጵያውያን ገና ወደፊት ለሚገደሉት ተረኛ ተጨፍጫፊ ንጹሀን ሀዘን የመቀመጥ እርግጠኝነት መቼ ይሆን እሚቆመው????? ደሞ የተረኞች ቀን ከዚህ ኡ ኡ ኡታ ቡሀላ ይመጣል ማንም ሊከላከልላቸው ያልቻሉ መሄጃ የሌላቸው ባገራቸው ላይ ሞታቸውን እየጠበቁ ላሉ በአለምነህ ዋሴ አገላለጽ ሀዘናችን ወደ ፊት ለሚጨፈጨፉት ኦርቶዶልሳውያን ጭምር ነው
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Recalls media figure Alemneh Wasse once saying of innocents killed by violence: 'What grieves me is not those killed now, but those who will be killed in future — sitting at home awaiting their turn.' The poster reads this as 'this killing will never end,' and says that since that warning, many Orthodox Christians have been massacred: the perpetrators kill whom they can and leave; when the grief cools and the wailing fades, the 'next-in-line' come and slaughter again — grief again, wailing again; and when the grief is forgotten they return and slaughter once more — sparing no child, woman or elder, killing them in rows. Asks when the certainty of mourning the next innocents-to-be-slaughtered will ever stop, and concludes, in Alemneh's words, that 'our grief is also for the Orthodox Christians who will be slaughtered in the future.'

OriginalText: እነዚህ አውሬ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: These ones are beasts.

OriginalText: WBOn wobii ummata isaatiif sablammii Biyya sanaati Qabsoon itti fufa injifannoon nidhufa iinshaa'allaah nibilisoomti oromiyaan nibilisoomti
EnglishTranslation: The WBO (Oromo Liberation Army) is the shield of its people and of the nationality of that country; the struggle continues, victory will come, inshaAllah, [it] will be freed — Oromia will be freed.

OriginalText: በናታችሁ ማልቀስ ማዘን አስጠላን መሸፈት የአማራ ህዝባዊ ሀይልን ተቀላቅሎ እነኝህን አውሬዎች በነፍጥ መፋለም በቃ ድል ለአማራ ፋኖ ይሁን ።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] For heaven's sake, the crying and mourning has sickened us. [The way] is to take to the bush, join the Amhara People's Force, and fight these beasts with the gun. Enough. Victory to the Amhara, to Fano.

OriginalText: በአዳማ ያሉ አደባባዮች ለሁሉም እምነቶች እኩል መከፈት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Public squares in Adama should be equally open to all faiths

OriginalText: Shanee fi ABO OLF KFO hinbare haabartu Oromoodha marruu.
EnglishTranslation: Shanee and ABO/OLF and KFO — [whoever] does not know [them], let them come to know; we are all Oromo.

OriginalText: ትግሬ በኢትዮፕያ ኦሮሞ [SLUR_OROMO] ተብሎ እንዳይጠራ አስደርጉዋል.ትግሬ ኢትዮፕያን ቀይሯል ልጅት እንዳለችው አጫውቱልኝ ይላል ፌስቡክ ውስጤ.
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] The Tigre saw to it that the Oromo would no longer be called '[SLUR_OROMO]' in Ethiopia. The Tigre changed Ethiopia… 'tell me as the girl said,' says my Facebook.

OriginalText: አቤቱ እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ ምድራችንን ከዚህ ሰይጣን(አጋንንት) ከሚያመልኩ ዛፍን ቅቤ እየቀቡ ከሚሰግዱ በባህርዳር ለይ እንስሳትን እያረዱ ለሰይጣን የደም መስዋዕትን ከሚያቀርቡ መርገምን ከርስን በምድራችን በኢትዮጵያ ላይ ከሚጠሩ እጅ አድነን አይናቸውና ልቦናቸው ለታወረ ይህንን ከንቱ ስርአት ለሚፈፅሙ ህዝቦች እንዲሁም ለመሪዎቻችን ማስተዋልን ስጠቸው ወደ ልቦናቸው መልሳቸው ከዘረኝነት ከነፍሰ ገዳይነት አድናቸው አሜን !!!
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] A prayer: 'O Lord our God, save our land from these Satan-(demon-)worshippers who anoint trees with butter and bow to them, who slaughter animals and offer blood sacrifices to Satan and call down curses on our land Ethiopia; save us from their hand. Give understanding to these blinded peoples who practise this vain system, and to our leaders; bring them back to their senses; save them from racism and from being murderers. Amen.'

OriginalText: Qoree kan baasan qoreedhaani, qe'ee namaa dhuftee Sobaan hin boo'in naaf jedhaani
EnglishTranslation: A thorn is removed [only] by a thorn; having come into someone's homestead, don't weep with lies — so they say.

OriginalText: ይህን ለማጋለጥ አጋሩ
EnglishTranslation: Share this to expose the truth

OriginalText: * ለ[SLUR_OROMO] ነብስ አባት ዳቆን መቼ አነሰው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] When was a [mere] deacon ever too little to serve as a [SLUR_OROMO]'s father-confessor?

OriginalText: ኸረ ግብረሰዶማዊው ሐብታሙ ዳቢሎስ አዳዲስ ግብረሰዶማዊያን ዳቢሎሶቹን እያስተዋወቀ ነው አይ ቀን የጨለመበት ግብረሰዶማዊው ሐብታሙ ዳቢሎስ በኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ የሚሰማቹ ሰው የለም በተለይ የተከበረው የኦሮሞ ህዝብ በኢትዮጵያዊነቱ አይደራደርም ኢትዮጵያዊነት ለኦሮሞ ህዝብ ማንነቱ ክብሩ ግርማ ሞገሱ ኩራቱ በረከቱ ነው የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ከኦሮሞ ጠላት ከሆነው ከወያኔ ጋር የሚተባበር አይወክለውም የኦሮሞ ግብረሰዶማዊያን ዘረኞች ጠባቦች ፅንፈኞች ይወድማሉ ኢትዮጵያዊነት ለዘላለም ይደምቃል ግብረሸዶማዊው ሐብታሙ ዳቢሎስ እና ከሽ የተባለው የሰይጣን ሚዲያ ግብረሰዶማዊ ባልደረቦቹ ይወድማሉ ኦሮሞን አትወክሉም
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Repeatedly brands Habtamu [Ayalew] a 'homosexual' and a 'devil' who is 'introducing new homosexual devils,' says no one in Ethiopia listens to him, and insists the 'respected Oromo people' will not compromise on their Ethiopianness — which is their identity, honour and pride — and do not collaborate with Woyane, the Oromo's enemy. Declares that 'the Oromo homosexuals, racists, narrow-minded extremists will perish,' that Ethiopianness will shine forever, and that 'the homosexual Habtamu the devil and his homosexual colleagues at the satanic media called Kesh will perish — you do not represent the Oromo.'

OriginalText: ፋኖ የህዝብ ልጅ ነው የምንለው በምክንያት ነው !!! የእውነት የእውነት የእውነት100 % ፋኖ ያሸንፋል !!!!
EnglishTranslation: We say Fano is a child of the people for a reason!!! Truly, truly, truly — 100% Fano will win!!!!

OriginalText: በሻሸመኔ ያሉ አደባባዮች ለሁሉም እምነቶች እኩል መከፈት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Public squares in Shashemene should be equally open to all faiths

OriginalText: Yeroo ilmaani oromoo Harkaa duwwaa diina hanga funyaanni hidhatee jiruu duraa Dabatee Qawwee isaanni Harkaa micciree irraa fudhuu Naafxaanyoonni Ta.aani ilaalaa turaani Qaabsoo Lubbuu hedduu itti dhabanee Anisini geenya uffi geenyaa Akka waani qabsoo Galmaani geenyee nuti fakkatee Namati ol daachanee Abaluun suni akkasi ta.ee Abaluu akkasi jedhee jeenne quba waalitti qabanaa Naafxaanyaa Lafa duwwaa jirtuu gaartee Abbaa ittii Taatee inumaa Alabaa minilika finfinnee dalawaa hundaa irraati yaafatee?? Yaa oromoo dammaqaa dammaaqa jaara keennaa dammaaqaa!
EnglishTranslation: When the sons of the Oromo, bare-handed, stood before an enemy armed to the teeth, twisted the guns from their hands and seized them — the Neftegna sat watching. In a struggle that cost us many lives, [we], thinking 'we've arrived, we've reached the struggle's goal,' puffed ourselves up — 'so-and-so became this, so-and-so said that' — pointing fingers at one another, while the Neftegna, finding the land vacant, made themselves its master and even hung Menelik's flag over all of Finfinne?? O Oromo, wake up, wake up — our elders, wake up!

OriginalText:
Hangaa hiddii oromoo lafa
Irraa jiruu Oromummanis
ABO WBO'nis hin badduu!
Have good night! 😘
EnglishTranslation: As long as there is an Oromo root [hiddii Oromoo] on the face of this earth, Oromummaa [Oromo-ness/identity], the ABO, and the WBO will not perish! Have a good night!

OriginalText: በኮቪድ ስም አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ መገደብ ትክክል አይደለም
EnglishTranslation: It is not right to restrict only one religion in the name of COVID

OriginalText: Fakkenyaf yoo ilallee waa.ee sillaa media kaana oromoon hiriba keesa kaa.uu qaaba dhuga Rabbi wan qabdaniin birra dhabaachuu qabdan media kunii cuufaame taanan Ethiopia keesa oromoon ukkamamudha mumiicha ministera oromo tee.e akamin media yan kunii cuufama tan jaatun qaaba akka nama tokkotii yoomillee hin dhummnaa maale hin cuufaamu
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, garbled.] Argues the Oromo must wake from sleep over this media issue and stand by what they have; if this media is shut down, the Oromo in Ethiopia are suffocated. Asks how the media can be shut down while an Oromo prime minister sits [in power], and insists it must not be closed.

OriginalText: Jechoota jibbaa dhiisnee araaraaf hojii haa hojjenyu
EnglishTranslation: Let us leave hateful words aside and work for reconciliation

OriginalText: Amaara kan jedhamu Gondor duwwaa akka ta'etti yaadu warri Gondor.Gojjamiin akka gadiitti kan isaan ilaalan. Achuma Amara keessatti mindaan warra Gojjamii kaffalamuu fi warra Gondoreef kaffalamu goddoo wal caala.
EnglishTranslation: The Gondar people think 'Amhara' means only Gondar. They look down on the Gojjam people as inferior. Even within Amhara itself, the wages paid to Gojjam people and those paid to Gondar people differ greatly.

OriginalText: garee amantii sana bakka uummataa keessaa ari'amuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: that religious group should be driven out of public spaces

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ በማለት ኦሮሞዎችን ማጥላላት አይቻልም
EnglishTranslation: It is not acceptable to insult Oromos by saying ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ የሚለው ቃል በመቀሌ የተጻፈው ፖስት ላይ ስድብ ነው ወይስ ፖለቲካዊ መለያ?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Mekelle, is ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ a slur or a political label?

OriginalText: በኦርቶዶክሳውያን ደም ላይ የበቀለውን እህል የምትመገቢውስ እስከ መቼ ነው
EnglishTranslation: Until when will you go on eating the grain that sprouted on the blood of the Orthodox?

OriginalText: የክትባት መርፌ የሰው ደም ይቀይራል
EnglishTranslation: The vaccine needle changes human blood

OriginalText: በአዲስ አበባ ያሉ አደባባዮች ለሁሉም እምነቶች እኩል መከፈት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Public squares in Addis Ababa should be equally open to all faiths

OriginalText: Lukkuun kakkistu malee killee hin buustu. Wa.een keenyas ummataf maaltu dhalatee? Jedhee dubbiin suuqa buute yoo itti ta.e iyyuu hoggantootaf MNO tif waan suuqa buute miti. Alagaa wajjin dubbii summii caalaa ummatatti hadha.u buukessani tolchaani kootta sinif kunnaa ittin sin sosobna jedhan gadi baasan. ....... Ammas Dinni fi firri keenya addaa hin baane ammas keenyayu sakkamtoota ummanni isaan abdates qabsoo isaa isa qulqulluu qofa itti fufuu qaba. Maadan qarqara hooqan dubbii guddaa qaba. Isiin nuf jabaadha . ...hayyoota teenya qulqulluuwwaan
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Uses proverbs to argue that the leaders/MNO serve their own pockets, not the people: 'The hen cackles but still lays the egg' — but what was born for the people out of our cause? With outsiders they brew talk 'more poisonous than poison' against the people, then come out saying 'come, we'll give you this, we'll soothe you.' Still our enemy and our friend aren't distinguished; our own are traitors. The people, whom they led to hope, must continue only its pure struggle — 'scratching the edge of a sore has big consequences.' Be strong for us… our pure scholars.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ አንድ ላይ ስላልቆመ ወደ ባርነት ይመለሳል
EnglishTranslation: Because the Oromo does not stand together, it will return to slavery.

OriginalText: ፋኖ ዋስትናችን የአማራው ፍም እሳት ትውልድ
EnglishTranslation: Fano, our guarantee — the Amhara's ember-fire generation.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ የሚለው ቃል በመቀሌ የተጻፈው ፖስት ላይ ስድብ ነው ወይስ ፖለቲካዊ መለያ?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Mekelle, is ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ a slur or a political label?

OriginalText: የትግራይ ህዝብ በማንም ቆሻሻ አፍ በአማራ ኢሊት አይነሳም መሬት ላይ ያለውን በሻይ ማንኪያም ቢሆን አለም አውቃለች ትግራይ ውሰጥ ያልተነገረ እንጂ ያልተሰራ የለም ጭካኔ የለም።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Tigray people will not be brought down by anyone's filthy mouth, by the Amhara elite. The world knows, down to the teaspoon, what happened on the ground. In Tigray there is nothing that was not done [to them] — only things untold; there is no cruelty [they did not suffer].

OriginalText: ኮቪድ ህጎች ለሁሉም እኩል ናቸው ወይ?
EnglishTranslation: Are COVID rules applied equally to everyone?

OriginalText: Odeeffannoo COVID ogeeyyii fayyaa irraa qofa haa fudhannu
EnglishTranslation: Let us take COVID information only from health professionals

OriginalText: Gumaansaa siidaa minilik pizza jiirufii siidaa soddaan minilik masaraattii irra deebiin ijaare barbadessu irraa eegalu qabna! Silaa maaluu godhamu garaa nungahu!! Haacaalu Gootakoo atillen obbaafatte akkuma jette!
EnglishTranslation: His gumaa (vengeance) — we must begin by destroying the Menelik statue ... and the Menelik monument rebuilt at the palace! Whatever is to be done, may it reach our hearts!! Hachalu my hero, you too have rested, just as you said!

OriginalText: የShashemene ካውንስል በምርጫ ዘመቻ ላይ የስድብ ቃላትን መከልከል አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Shashemene council should ban slurs during election campaigns

OriginalText: sanyiin mililik buqatuu male naga hin arganu
EnglishTranslation: Unless Menelik's seed [lineage] is uprooted, we will find no peace.

OriginalText: Dubbiin dhimma Finfinnee kun kanarra arkifachuu hinqabu; furmaata waaraa argachuu qaba. Finfineerraa faayidaa addaa argachuu kan qabu mootummaa federaalaa fi jaarmi'oolee idila adunyaa garaa garaati malee Oromoo fi Oromiyaa miti. Finfinneen seeraanis seenaanis kan Oromooti ! Dhuma dubbii ! Kana dhugoomsuuf haarsaa fedhe nikaffalla !!
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] This Finfinne matter must not be dragged out any further; it must reach a lasting solution. The ones reaping special benefit from Finfinne are the federal government and various international organizations — not the Oromo and Oromia. Finfinne, legally and historically, is the Oromo's! End of discussion! To make this real, we will pay whatever sacrifice it takes!!

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ ሸኔና ብልጽግና እየተባባለ እርስ በርስ መገዳደሉን አቁሞ ምን እየተደገሰለት እንደሆነ አውቆ አንድ ሆኖ መዘጋጀት አለበት። ሸኔ ነኝ የሚለው ወገን መጃጃሉን አቁሞ ከአብይ አህመድ ጎን ባስቸኳይ ይሰለፍ። አለዚያ ወገንህን ታሳርዳለህ።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Oromo must stop killing one another by calling each other 'Shane' and 'Prosperity,' realize what is being cooked up for it, unite and prepare. The side that says 'I am Shane' must stop being foolish and line up beside Abiy Ahmed at once — otherwise you will get your own people slaughtered.

OriginalText: አምሓራ አውሬ ሁኑ ለራሳችሁ ስትሉ
EnglishTranslation: Amhara, become beasts — for your own sake.

OriginalText: Ortodoksii fi Muslimoonni iddoowwan uummataa irratti waliigaltee qabaachuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians and Muslims should reach agreement on public spaces

OriginalText: Qerroon qabsoo fininsuu qaban ODP dhigaa qerroo Dhangalasuufi
EnglishTranslation: The Qeerroo must intensify the struggle — ODP is busy spilling the Qeerroo's blood.

OriginalText: የአብን እና የባለአደራ ነፍጠኞች ብርሃኔን #[SLUR_OROMO] #[SLUR_OROMO] እያሉ ሲሰድቡ ስሙት። ታድያ ከዚህ ህዝብ ጋር እንዴት መኖር ይቻላል??? የአፄዎች ታሪክ ላይመለስ ተቀብሯል እኔም በበኩሌ ከእናንተ ጋር ያለኝም ታሪክ ቀብሬዋለው። ለኦሮሞ ህዝብ ያላቸውን ጥላቻ ሁሉም ሰው መመልከት አለበት። ጉዳያቸው ከ50 ሚሊየን የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ነው እንጂ ከመሪዎቹ አይደለም ሰልፉን ሲመሩ እና ሲያስተባብሩ የነበሩት ኤርሚያስ ለገሰ እና ሀብታሙ አያሌው ናቸው።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Listen to the ABN and 'trustee' Neftegna insulting Birhane, crying '#[SLUR_OROMO] #[SLUR_OROMO].' So how can one live with these people??? The era of the emperors is buried, never to return; for my part I have buried my shared history with you. Everyone must see their hatred for the Oromo people — their quarrel is with the 50 million Oromo, not [merely] the leaders. Those who led and coordinated the rally were Ermias Legesse and Habtamu Ayalew.

OriginalText: መምጫቸው የማይታወቅ ሰፋርዋች እነሱ ሌላውን ሰፋር ይላሉ ሰውን ጨፊልቀው አራጆች ታርክ ቢያነብ ይሻላቸዋል
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Settlers whose origin no one knows call others 'settlers.' Massacrers and slaughterers of people — they'd do better to read history.

OriginalText: ክትባቱ ሰዎችን ለመቆጣጠር የተዘጋጀ ነው
EnglishTranslation: The vaccine was created to control people

OriginalText: ቆማጦች ከመንግስት ቢሮዎች ሁሉ መውጣት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Qomata should be removed from all government offices

OriginalText: ኦሮሙማ አደገኛ የ21ክ/ዘ የፋሽዝም፣ሒትለለራዊያን አገዛዝ ነው።
EnglishTranslation: Oromummaa is a dangerous 21st-century fascist, Hitlerian regime.

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Adaamaa keessatti hiriira bakka uummataa seera tokko jalatti bulchuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Adaamaa should manage public-space rallies under one rule

OriginalText: ከደቡብ ብሆንም አማራው በሰራት ሃገር እየኖርኩ መሆኑ ከተሰማኝ ቆይቷል። ክብር ለአማራ ሕዝብ! ፋኖዬ አይዟችሁ ውዶቼ ድሉ የናንተ ነው
EnglishTranslation: Even though I'm from the South, I've long felt that I live in a country the Amhara built. Honour to the Amhara people! My Fano, take heart, my dears — the victory is yours.

OriginalText: Shaashamannee keessatti Ortodoksii fi Muslimoonni nagaan bakka uummataa fayyadamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: In Shaashamannee, Orthodox Christians and Muslims should use public spaces peacefully

OriginalText: እነመሰግናለን !!! ደም በፈሰሰ ቁጥር ደም ይፈላል የሚባለዉ እንዲህ ነዉ፤ ሀጫሉን ብገሉትም ሺ ሀጫሉዎችን እያየን ነዉ:: Foolish government always digs its grave by killing & imprisoning those who challenge it
EnglishTranslation: [Amharic + English.] We thank [them]!!! This is what 'every time blood is shed, blood boils' means: even though they killed Hachalu, we are seeing a thousand Hachalus. 'Foolish government always digs its grave by killing & imprisoning those who challenge it.'

OriginalText: ነፈጠኛዎች በአዳማ ላይ ምንም መብት የላቸውም
EnglishTranslation: the Neftegna have no rights in Adama

OriginalText: WBOn Ummata Oromootiif negativa male jaraaf positive dhaa hamma WBOn jiru kana chaalaa Organized tahanii Ummata Oromo waan fehan gochuu dandahanii .
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful, code-mixed.] The WBO [OLA] is not negative for the Oromo people but positive for them; [otherwise], being more organized than the WBO that now exists, they [the enemy] could do whatever they wish to the Oromo people.

OriginalText: Utuman ta'e tv ko daaddaabarsee ilaaluu P m midiyyaa jedhaamtuu takkon argee MALKAA MARII Jedhuu maaqaa qophiichaa namaa wayiituu OBIKO Kaleessaa kFO Haraa fi ADDAA BILISUMAA OROMO (ABO )Qeeqaa dhaabnii umaataa oromoo biratii fudbaatamaa guddaa qabuu umataaf dhisi nutii dhabaa oromof dhaabatuu fi falmuu ABO fi KFO dhaagahaa guuddaanee wayaaneefi Naafxaanyaa duraa dhaabbatee dhugaa oromo dubbachaa kaantuuree gototaa akka Dr mararafaa Baqalee Gaarbafaa tii warii kaaleesaa nafxaanyaafi Wayyanee soddaatee akka Hantutaa Haaduree dhokatuu dhakkachaa turee Qeeroo ABO FI KFON ijjaareen biliisaa baahanii akka dhokkataanii asabahaanii yoro dhaabaa kanaa qeeqaan naamaa qaneesaa qeequf imo hamiilee qabu kaan hin qaanoofnee namaa qa.eessaa jedhaanii isaayumo wa'e filaano kfo gorsuu barbaduu
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] Flipping channels, I once watched a so-called PM media program called Malkaa Marii... OBIKO yesterday, KFO today, and the Oromo Liberation Front (ABO) — these parties have great standing among the Oromo. ABO and KFO, who stood for the Oromo, opposed Wayyane and Neftegna and spoke the Oromo's truth — heroes like Dr Merera and Bekele Gerba — while those who back then feared Neftegna and Wayyane hid like a rat. The Qeerroo whom ABO and KFO built were freed... [those critics] criticize without shame... he wants to advise about so-and-so in KFO.

OriginalText: Seerri vaaksinii dirqamaa mirga dhuunfaa ni miidhaa?
EnglishTranslation: Does mandatory vaccine law harm individual rights?

OriginalText: Har'a Shaashamannee keessatti sagantaan amantii gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A religious program was held today in Shaashamannee

OriginalText: በባህር ዳር ላይ ይህ መልእክት የሀይማኖት ጥያቄ ነው ወይስ የህግ ጉዳይ?
EnglishTranslation: In Bahir Dar, is this a religious issue or a legal one?

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Finfinnee keessatti odeeffannoo COVID siyaasaa paartiirraa fageessuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Finfinnee should keep COVID information away from party politics

OriginalText: ይህ ሰው ትግራውያንን እያገለገለ ነው ወይስ እየወቀሰ?
EnglishTranslation: Is this person defending Tigrayans or attacking them?

OriginalText: ዘራፊ ደፋሪ አውዳሚዎች ናቸው አሁን እማ ገባን የኦሮሞ ፖለቲከኞች ማብቂያ ግዜ ደርሷል!
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] They are looters, rapists, destroyers. Now we finally get it — the Oromo politicians' end-time has come!

OriginalText: የBahir Dar ካውንስል የህዝብ ቦታ ሰልፎችን በአንድ መስፈርት ማስተናገድ አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Bahir Dar council should manage public-space rallies under one standard

OriginalText: ውዶች ተደራጁና አማራ ክልል ግቡ ቤተሰቦቻችሁን ለማዳን ከፈለግህ
EnglishTranslation: Dear ones, organize and enter the Amhara region — if you want to save your families.

OriginalText: ኮቪድ በእንቁላል እና በማር ብቻ ይፈወሳል
EnglishTranslation: COVID can be cured only with eggs and honey

OriginalText: Dhugaan jirtuu kanuuma, dhimmii FINFINNEE Oromoo birati ijaa tokkon ilaalama.
EnglishTranslation: The plain truth is this: the matter of FINFINNE is seen with one eye [unanimously] among the Oromo.

OriginalText: እሮሙማ አብይ ከመምጣቱ በፊት በለንደን ያደረጉት የተስማሙበት አደገኛ ፀረ ሴማዊነት ሰልቃጭነት ማየት ብቻ በቂ ነው ያለፈው 6 የመከራ አመታት ደሞ ዘግናኝ ነው ሻሸመኔ፣ቡራዩ፣ወለጋ፣አሩሲ፣ነገሌ፣አ.አ የተደረገው ተጨባጭ ጭፍጨፋ ማፈናቀል ተጨባጭ ምስክር ነው።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] It is enough just to see the dangerous, devouring 'anti-Semitic' agreement the Oromummaa[-ists] reached in London before Abiy came to power; and the past six years of suffering are horrifying — the concrete massacres and displacement carried out in Shashemene, Burayu, Wellega, Arsi, Negele and Addis Ababa are concrete testimony.

OriginalText: ወያኔዎች ከሻሸመኔ መባረር አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane should be expelled from Shashemene

OriginalText: ሆዳም አታልቅስ ሰላምክን ክብርህን ለማግኘት ከፈለክ ዝመት ፋኖ ጋር ተቀላቀል። አለበለዛ አታልቅስብን።
EnglishTranslation: Glutton, don't cry. If you want to win your peace and honour, march out and join Fano. Otherwise, don't cry to us.

OriginalText: የኮቪድ ክትባት መስጠት የልጅ መውለድን ፈጽሞ ያቆማል
EnglishTranslation: COVID vaccination completely stops childbirth

OriginalText: Dirree Dhawaa keessatti namoota 'ወያኔ' jechuun arrabsuun haa dhaabatu; Rakkoon mariidhaan ni furama
EnglishTranslation: Stop insulting people with 'ወያኔ' in Dirree Dhawaa; Rakkoon mariidhaan ni furama

OriginalText: ሁሉን የታደለ አምሃራነት የተለየ ፍጥረት ነውኮየአንድነት መፍለቂያ ባንዳ በዛበትእንጂ
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Amhara-ness, blessed with everything, is a special creation — the wellspring of unity — except that 'bandas' [traitors] have multiplied within it.

OriginalText: አብይ ሆይ! የመውግያውን ብረት ብትቃወም ባንተ ይብስብሃል!! አይደለም ጀዋር አጥሩ የተነካለት በኦሮሚያ ውስጥ የሚኖሩትን ያንተንና የምስትህን ዘሮች ያኔ በቁም እንዳቃጠልካቸው እወቅ!!
EnglishTranslation: Abiy! If you oppose the gun, it will go even worse for you!! It is not only Jawar whose 'fence' has been touched — know this: your own descendants and your wife's descendants who live in Oromia will burn alive, just as you burned [people] alive back then!!

OriginalText: warra Oromoo mootummaa keessaa haqamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos should be removed from government

OriginalText: ጫሉ ሁንዴሳ፤ የኦሮሞን ህዝብ ጥያቄ ለመቀልበስ ታስቦ፤ የተገደለው ልክ የዛሬ አራት አመት ነው! በኢትዮጵያ ከሃጫሉ የጭካኔ ግዲያ ወዲህ በትንሹ ከሚልዮን ህዝብ በላይ ተገሏል። በኦሮሚያና በትግራይ የነ ብርሃኑ ነጋን በጭራሽ የማይሆን የወደቀ ሴይጠናዊ ቅዥት ለመተግበር፤ አካላዊ ግዲያ ከተፈፀመባቸው ሚልዮኖች በተጨማሪ፤ የበርካታ ሚልዮኖች ህልምና ተስፋ ተገሏል። ብርሃኑ ነጋና መሰሎቹ በህይወት እያሉ አይሆንም የተባለ ይመስል፤ ምንም ዓይነት አገራዊ ቅዋሜ ያሌለበትና መላው የኢትዮጵያ ህዝብ የተቀበለው የኦሮሚኛ ቋንቋን የኢትዮጵያ የፌደራል መንግስት የስራ ቋንቋ የማድረግ የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ትንሿ ጥያቄ እንኳን ሳይመለስ ተንጠልጥሎ እንዲቆይ ተደርጓል። ይልቁንም የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ቋንቋውን የፌደራል የስራ ቋንቋ የማድረግ ጥያቄን ለማድበስበስ፤ በነ ብርሃኑ ነጋ ሴራ፤ የመንግስትን ስልጣን ለ27 ዓመታት ይዞ የኖረው ህወሃትም ሆና የትግራይ ህዝብ ያልጠየቀውን፤ የአፋርና የሱማሌ ህዝብም ጠይቆት የማያቃቸውን፤ የትግርኛን፤ የአፋርና የሱማሌ ቋንቋን የኢትዮጵያ ፌዴራል መንግስት የስራ ቋንቋ እናደርጋለን ብለው ብቅ አሉ። ነገሩ የተጠነሰሰው ኦሮሚኛን ቋንቋ ለማሳነስ እና ጥያቄውን አድበስብሶ ከተቻለ ለማጥፋት ነው። አሁን ደግሞ የኦሮሚኛ ቋንቋን የኢትዮጵያ የፌደራል የስራ ቋንቋ ማድረግን፤ የፌዴራል ስራዓቱን ለማፍረስ የተቋቋመው "የብሄራዊ እርቅ ኮሚሽን" የሚባለው የደባ ስብስብ ማሻሻጫ አጀንዳ አድርገውት ብቅ ብለዋል። አልገባቸውም ይሆናል እንጂ፤ የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ጠላቶች ዛሬ አቅደው እየፈፀሙት ያለው የሃጫሉ ሁንዴሳ፤ የበቴ ኡርጌሳ እና የበርካታ መቶ ሺዎች፤ ሚናልባትም ሚልዮኖች ንፁህ ኦሮሞዎች ግድያ፤ የኦሮሞን ህዝብ ፍፁማዊ እና ስር ነቀል ድል እንዲያመጣ ሁኔታዎችን በማመቻቸት ሂደቱን ያፋጥነዋል እንጂ አያዘገየውም
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Marks four years since Hachalu Hundessa was killed 'to reverse the Oromo people's demands,' and claims that since his 'cruel murder' at least a million people have been killed in Ethiopia. Alleges that to implement Birhanu Nega's 'failed satanic fantasy' in Oromia and Tigray, beyond the millions physically killed, the dreams and hopes of millions more were destroyed. Says that — as if forbidden while Birhanu Nega and his like live — even the small Oromo demand of making Afaan Oromo a federal working language (which faces no national objection and which all Ethiopians accept) has been left hanging. Argues that to bury that demand, Birhanu Nega's plot used the TPLF (27 years in power) to propose making Tigrigna, Afar and Somali federal working languages — which those peoples never even requested — solely to diminish Afaan Oromo; and that the so-called 'National Reconciliation Commission,' a body set up to dismantle federalism, has now turned the Afaan-Oromo demand into a bargaining chip. Concludes that the enemies' ongoing killing of Hachalu, Bate Urgessa and hundreds of thousands (perhaps millions) of innocent Oromos will only hasten, not delay, the Oromo's 'absolute and radical victory.'

OriginalText: ስለ ክትባት ውይይት በሬዲዮ ላይ ተደርጓል
EnglishTranslation: A discussion about vaccination was aired on radio

OriginalText: Ergaan Bahirdar keessaa kun dhimma amantii moo dhimma seeraa dha?
EnglishTranslation: Is this message from Bahirdar a religious issue or a legal issue?

OriginalText: የAdama ካውንስል የህዝብ ቦታ ሰልፎችን በአንድ መስፈርት ማስተናገድ አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Adama council should manage public-space rallies under one standard

OriginalText: Har'a Dirree Dhawaa keessatti sagantaan amantii gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A religious program was held today in Dirree Dhawaa

OriginalText: ህገመንግስታዊ መብትን መጠቀም ማንም የማይጋፋዉ መብት ነዉ ፡፡ የአገዎ ህዝብ የስልጣኔ ቀዳሚ ህዝብ ሆኖ ሳለ እንዲህ ወደ ኃላ እንደቀር መደረጉ ያሳዝናል ፡፡ የቅማንት ህዝብንም ጨምራችሁ አንድ ላይ ክልል ብትመሰርቱ ግን የበለጠ ጥሩ ይሆናል ; በማንነታችሁም ከአንድ ነገድ ስለሆናችሁ :
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Exercising a constitutional right is a right no one can infringe. It's saddening that the Agew people, a pioneer of civilization, have been pushed backward like this. It would be even better, though, if you formed a region jointly, including the Qemant people, since by identity you are of one stock.

OriginalText: Warri kiristaanaa dhibee kana akka adabbii irratti fayyadamu
EnglishTranslation: The Christian side uses this disease as a punishment narrative

OriginalText: Dhukkubni kun qormaata amantii qofa waan ta'eef yaala hin barbaachisu
EnglishTranslation: Because this disease is only a test of faith, treatment is unnecessary

OriginalText: አፄዎቹ ጨቋኝ ኛቸው አፄዎቹ አህዮች ናቸው ሞት ለአቻሜለህ ታምሩ ይሄ የአህያ ልጅ ።
EnglishTranslation: The emperors are oppressors; the emperors are donkeys. Death to Achamyeleh Tamiru, this son of a donkey.

OriginalText: Adaamaa keessatti duulli vaaksinii COVID itti fufe
EnglishTranslation: The COVID vaccination campaign continued in Adaamaa

OriginalText: Dirree Dhawaa keessatti duulli vaaksinii COVID itti fufe
EnglishTranslation: The COVID vaccination campaign continued in Dirree Dhawaa

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa hiddan buqiifnaa daadhabnuu ilmoo itti guddifnaa jedhaan haayonii oromoo amma kunotii itti geenyee jiraa kana bodda naafxanyaan oromoo hiin tufatuu nutii oromoon soddanee osso hin tanne osumaa beeyinutu usnee male waan biraa isinitii hin fakkatiin yaa naafxanyaa yoo feete immo of egaadhuu
EnglishTranslation: 'We will uproot the Neftegna by the roots; if we fail, we'll raise a child/generation to it,' the Oromo scholars say — and now we have reached this point. After this the Neftegna will not despise the Oromo. It isn't that we Oromo were afraid — we knew and kept silent, that's all; don't take it for anything else. O Neftegna, if you want [trouble], then watch yourself.

OriginalText: Itoophiyaa diiguf Kan kaayyeeffate naafxaanyaa malee sabbontoota oromoo miti.midiyyaalee biyyitti Kan akka,EBC,EBS,FBC, kun sirnaa naafxaanyaa leellisuu OBN,immoo midiyyaa ummaatati jedha afaan mootummaa gabaasa Kan ummaata dhiise.OMN deebi'uu qaba.
EnglishTranslation: It is the Neftegna — not Oromo nationalists — who aim to dismantle Ethiopia. Country media such as EBC, EBS and FBC glorify the Neftegna system; OBN, which claims to be the people's media, [merely] reports in the government's voice and has abandoned the people. OMN must be brought back.

OriginalText: ኦሮምያ ሙሉዉን በአፅማችን የወሰድን ርስታችን ነዉ ይላሉ ።
EnglishTranslation: They say: 'All of Oromia is our inheritance, which we took with our bones [sacrifice].'

EnglishTranslation: [Largely incoherent — flagged.] A long, fragmented stream-of-words mixing Afan Oromo, English and Arabic phrases ('subahannallah', 'congratulations'), names (Meles Zenawi, Zinnash Tayyaachow, Caaltuu Saanii, Abishee Garba, Abiy, Dawite), a call to 'free OLF leaders,' and repeated phrases.
