OriginalText: የAdama ካውንስል ለሃይማኖት ዝግጅቶች እኩል ፈቃድ መስጠት አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Adama council should grant equal permits for religious events

OriginalText: Ati Lafa Imimmaanii Kan taate Yaa Arsii Dhumaatiin Namoota Nagaa Kan si keessatti taasifamu kun yoom Xumura Argata Laata
EnglishTranslation: O Arsi, you who have become a land of tears — when will this annihilation of peaceful people carried out within you find its end?

OriginalText: አማራ በዚህ አይነት ዘግናኝ ሁኔታ ነው በአብይና ሽመልስ አብዲሳ የሚገደለው ታዲያ ቢያንስ በወገኑ የሚሳለቀው ቡድን በመቃብሩ ላይ መደነሱን ቢያቆሙ ፣ ግን የዛሬ ገዳዮች ነገ እንደሚሞቱ ሊያውቁት ይገባል
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Amhara is being killed in this horrific way by Abiy and Shimelis Abdisa. At the very least, the group that mocks its own kin should stop dancing on his grave — but today's killers should know that tomorrow they too will die.

OriginalText: አማራዊነትን ከፍ ለማድረግ እና የትግሉን ቛያ ለማጠናከርና ድሉን ለማፋጣንና ቅርብ ለማድረግ የአማራ ሊሂቃን መሠባሠብ በቁርጠኝነትና በአፋጣኝ መሠራት አለበት ።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] To elevate Amhara-ness, strengthen the foundation of the struggle, and hasten and bring the victory closer, the Amhara elites must gather with determination and act urgently.

OriginalText: አማራዎች ከኦርቶዶክስ ጋር ተባብረው ሀገርን እያበላሹ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas are teaming up with orthodox christians to ruin the country

OriginalText: Iddoo uummataa irratti walga'iin amantii hundi seera tokko jalatti ilaalamuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: All religious gatherings in public spaces should be treated under the same law

OriginalText: "የወገኖቻችን ደ'ም የፈሰሰበት አደባባይ ላይ የአብይን ጄኔራሎች አጋድመን ባ'ና ር'ድ እናቶቻችን ወንድ ልጅ አልወለዱም የእኔም እናት ዘመነ የሚባል ልጅ አልወለደችም።" አርበኛ ዘመነ ካሴ
EnglishTranslation: [Martial-vow idiom, faithful.] 'On the public square where our people's blood was spilled — unless we fell Abiy's generals and slaughter them, [it means] our mothers bore no sons, and my own mother bore no son named Zemene.' — Patriot Zemene Kasse.

OriginalText: የስድብ ቃላትን እናቁም፤ ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ ወይም ‘ነፈጠኛ’ ብሎ ማንኛውንም ብሔር ማጥላላት አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: የስድብ ቃላትን እናቁም; no ethnic group should be insulted with words like ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ or ‘ነፈጠኛ’

OriginalText: Simply, Oromo must punish fanno and all armed amma bandit … they just killed ayadhii xilaa few days ago!!! Where is drones ??? Brahanuu Dulaaa do not let Oromo soldiers risk in Amaraa??
EnglishTranslation: (Code-mixed.) Simply, the Oromo must punish Fano and all armed [Amhara] bandits... they just killed Ayadhii Xilaa a few days ago!!! Where are the drones??? Birhanu Jula, do not let Oromo soldiers be put at risk in Amhara??

OriginalText: Wanuma hudaafu oromon of qopheessu qaba keessattu ummani Kenya kan walloo
EnglishTranslation: For everything, the Oromo must prepare itself — especially our people of Wollo.

OriginalText: Gareen hawaasaa Shaashamannee keessatti waa'ee eeyyama bakka uummataa ibsa kenne
EnglishTranslation: The gareen hawaasaa gave an explanation about public-space permits in Shaashamannee

OriginalText: Wallaggi silaa nurraa citee oromoon ni bilisoomti. Kan oromoo diigu wallagga
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] If Wellega were cut off from us, the Oromo would be freed. The one that divides the Oromo is Wellega.

OriginalText: Jimmaa keessatti namoota 'ወያኔ' jechuun arrabsuun haa dhaabatu; Nagaan ni injifata
EnglishTranslation: Stop insulting people with 'ወያኔ' in Jimmaa; Nagaan ni injifata

OriginalText: warra Oromoo biyya kanaaf balaa dha
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos are a threat to this country

OriginalText: ሚኒሊክ ኤርትራን ጅቡቲን የሸጠ ጡት ቆራጭ ነው ።
EnglishTranslation: Menelik is a breast-cutter who sold off Eritrea and Djibouti.

OriginalText: Oromoo argitan ijoollee diqaalaan Amanta jala dhokate Alaba keenya gubdu enyuu akka tate bara. Oromoo hunda waanin isiin gaafadhu hundu nama Amantan Koo Oromummaa koo na caalaa erga jeetan Oromoo enyuu ta'uuf deema? Warrii isilama Musislimuman Oromummaa irra na caalaa jeedhani jiru:: Orthodoksi Pheenxee fi Waaqedfatanoo mal jeetu Oromumma moo Amantatu isiini dursa?? Mee haqa jiru baru feedha inbox na bareesa wal yakkuf miti dhugaa baruufn barbada. Dhugumaa Oromoo tokkoti Oromummaa isaa irra anantatu itti ana dhugaa kana qoorachun barbabada inbox na bareesa Amanta keesan waliin. Dhugaa barbada nama yakkuuf miti.
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] The Oromo you see — the 'diqaalaa' (mixed-heritage) children hiding behind religion who burn our flag — know what they've become. To all Oromo I ask: since you say 'my faith comes before my Oromummaa'... what will the Oromo become? Muslims say their being Muslim comes before their Oromo-ness; Orthodox, Pente, and Waaqeffataa — what do you say, does Oromo-ness or religion come first?? I want the truth — message my inbox, not to accuse but to learn. Write to my inbox with your religion. I seek truth, not to accuse anyone.

OriginalText: COVID damma fi buuphaa qofaatiin ni fayya
EnglishTranslation: COVID can be cured only with honey and steam

OriginalText: Vaaksiiniin dhaloota guutumaan guutuutti dhaaba
EnglishTranslation: Vaccination completely stops childbirth

OriginalText: Najat kormmittii sabboonttuu dubarttii teenna BAGA OROMOO TAATE, BAGA DHALATTES. Jabaadhuu WBO Nuuf leellisu itti fufi. NAMNNI WBO hin deeggarre Diina Oromooti. OROMIYAAN TAN OROMOOTI.
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Najat, our nationalist heroine — congratulations on being Oromo, congratulations on being born. Be strong. WBO, keep championing us. WHOEVER DOES NOT SUPPORT THE WBO IS AN ENEMY OF THE OROMO. OROMIA BELONGS TO THE OROMO.

OriginalText: Oromoon Oromiyaa ottu ijjisaa arguu dhabuif demaa jiraa
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Oromo is on its way to losing Oromia before its very eyes.

OriginalText: Seerri vaaksinii mana maree keessatti irratti mari'atamuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: Vaccination law should be debated in parliament

OriginalText: Jechi 'ነፈጠኛ' postii Finfinnee keessaa kana irratti arrabsoo moo ibsa siyaasaa dha?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Finfinnee, is 'ነፈጠኛ' an insult or political description?

OriginalText: naftaanya down(100%)
EnglishTranslation: Neftegna down (100%).

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ ኮ ታጠቅ ራስህን ልጆችህን ዘመዶችህን ጠብቅ ኦሮሚያን ለራስህና ለልጆችህ ስትል ለመጨረሻ ጊዜ ነፃ አውጣ ሞኝነትህ አልጠቀመም ዛሬም የዋህነት አስገድሎሃል የድንቁ ልጅህን ሃጫሉን ጉማ ሳታወጣ አትተኛ ነገ ቀጣይ አንተ ነህ አባቶችህን ወንድሞችህን ከእስር አስፈታ ነፍጠኛ ዛሬም ነገም ጠላትህ ነው እንበርታ በርቱ ደሞቼ nu oromo dha!!!
EnglishTranslation: Oromo, arm yourself; protect yourself, your children, your relatives. For yourself and your children, liberate Oromia — for the last time. Your foolishness has not helped you; your naivety still gets you killed today. Do not sleep before exacting the gumaa (blood-vengeance) for your wondrous son Hachalu. Tomorrow it is your turn. Free your fathers and brothers from prison. The Neftegna is your enemy today and tomorrow. Let us be strong, be strong, my brothers. We are Oromo!!!

OriginalText: እግዚአብሔር ተበቃይና መዓትን የተሞላ ነው፤
EnglishTranslation: 'The Lord is avenging and full of wrath;' (Scripture — Nahum 1:2b.)

OriginalText: እነዚህ ሰዎች በቤተ ክርስቲያን ስም ህዝብን እያታለሉ ነው
EnglishTranslation: These people are deceiving the public in the name of the Church

OriginalText: Jarri dhara itti beekti !
EnglishTranslation: Those people are experts at lying!

OriginalText: warra Amaaraa bakka uummataa keessaa ari'amuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas should be driven out of public spaces

OriginalText: በመቀሌ ኦሮሞዎችንም አማራዎችንም ማክበር አለብን
EnglishTranslation: In Mekelle, we should respect both Oromos and Amharas

OriginalText: በአነዲት ሀገር ውስጥ ሕዝቦች ለዘመናት በሚኖሩበት ቦታ ሌላ ኃይል መጥቶ የኔ መሬት ነው ማለት አይችልም በዚህም የተነሳ ኦሮሙማ ብዙ ወንጀል ሠርቷል ጊዜው ሲደርስ የሄን የወንጀል ሃሳብ ያመነጨ የዘረኝነት ፕሮፖገንዳ የረጨ የአማራ ሕዝብ እንዲገደል እንዲፈናቀል ብዙ አረመኔያዊ ሥራ እንዲሠራበት ያደረገ ተለይቶ ተጠያቂ ይሆናል
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] In a single country, where peoples have lived for ages, no other force can come and say 'this is my land.' On that basis, Oromummaa has committed many crimes. When the time comes, whoever conceived this criminal idea, sprayed racist propaganda, and caused the Amhara people to be killed, displaced and subjected to savage acts will be singled out and held accountable.

OriginalText: ትግራውያን በህዝብ ቦታ ላይ እንኳን ሊታዩ አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans should not even be seen in public spaces

OriginalText: ኮቪድ የእነዚያ ማህበረሰቦች ብቻ ነው የሚያስፋፋው
EnglishTranslation: COVID is being spread only by those communities

OriginalText: Ermias Legesse Wakjira ና Habtamu Ayalew Teshome  በትግራይ #ethio360 ይደመጣል የሚል የ Medhin Gebreslassie ዜና ሰምተው  "የትግራይ ህዝብና የኣማራ ህዝብ" ዓይነት ጨዋታ ሊጫወቱ ቃጣቸው ። እኔ #ኢትዮ360 ከሚከታተሉ ተጋሩ ኣንዱ ነኝ። ምክንያቱ የጠላቴን ጥግ ማወቅ ስላለብኝ። የኣማራነት ጥግ እንደ ሃብታሙ ኣያሌውና በቃሉ ዓይነት ኣድፍጠው ቆይተው ጊዜ ጠብቀው ከጀርባህ በመውጋት የሚጥሉህ መሰሪዎች የታነፀ ነው። በደብረፅዮንና ኣብይ ንግግር ለምን ኣማራ ይከፋል ብለው ጠየቁ? ይከፋል ብቻ! እስኪ ስለምዕራብ ትግራይ ቢያወሩ የኦሮሞ ልሂቅ ለምን ይናደዳል? ከሻዕብያ ጋር ተጋብቶ ምዕራብ ትግራይን የወረረውን ደግፎ የቆመው ኣብን ነው ወይስ ኦፌኮ፤ ባልደራስ ነው ወይስ ኦነግ?
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Mocks Ermias Legesse Wakjira and Habtamu Ayalew Teshome for trying to play a 'Tigray-people-and-Amhara-people' card after hearing Medhin Gebreslassie's report that #ethio360 is watched in Tigray. The poster, a Tegaru who follows #ethio360 'to know my enemy's limits,' argues that 'Amhara-ness' is built by schemers like Habtamu Ayalew and Bekalu who lie in ambush and stab you in the back. Asks why the Amhara take offence at Debretsion's and Abiy's talk, and why the 'Oromo elite' get angry when Western Tigray is discussed — pointing out that it wasn't ABN, OFC, Baldera or OLF who married Shaebia (Eritrea) and backed the invasion of Western Tigray.

OriginalText: የስድብ ቃላት በምርጫ ዘመቻ ላይ መከልከል አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Slurs should be banned during election campaigns

OriginalText: የእነሱ ሀይማኖት በከተማው ውስጥ ቦታ ሊኖረው አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: Their religion should have no place in the city

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ ከአድስ አበባ ይውጣልን ያለበለዝያ በመከላከያ እርምጃ እንወስዳለን እኛ ከድንበር ጥበቃ አካል
EnglishTranslation: Let the Oromo get out of Addis Ababa for us, otherwise we will take 'defensive' action — we are part of the border guard.

OriginalText: Jechoota jibbaa akka '[SLUR_TIGRAY]' marsaa hawaasaa irratti hin facaasinaa; Nagaan ni injifata
EnglishTranslation: Do not spread hate words like '[SLUR_TIGRAY]' on social media; Nagaan ni injifata

OriginalText: ይህች በፎቶው ላይ የምታዩት፤ በ2019 የኦሮሞን ህዝብ "መንጋ" ብላ የሰደበች ህልና ደሳለኝ የምትባለው ሴት ነች። ዛሬ ጠቅላይ ሚንስትር አብይን እዛው ፊንፊኔ ቁጭ ብላ የተሳደበችበትን dehumanizing ቋንቋ እኔ እዚህ ገፄ ላይ አልደግመውም። በጣም አዘንኩ!  ያች ዘረኛና ፋሽስት፤ የኔ ባደረገችው ብትቀጣ ኖሮ፤ ዛሬ በጠቅላይ ሚንስትር አብይ ላይ ይህን የመሰለ መርዝ ለመትፋት አትዳፈርም ነበር።  ወይ ነዶ!!
EnglishTranslation: This woman you see in the photo is [named individual], who in 2019 insulted the Oromo people by calling them a 'mob/herd.' Today, sitting right there in Finfinne, she insulted PM Abiy with dehumanizing language I won't repeat on my page. I'm very saddened! Had that 'racist and fascist' woman been punished when she did it to mine, she wouldn't dare spit such poison at PM Abiy today. Outrageous!!

OriginalText: Oromoon biyyaa diguu ammaa dhagenye
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Now we've heard [the claim] that the Oromo is destroying the country.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ የሚለው ቃል በዚህ ፖስት ውስጥ ፖለቲካዊ ነው ወይስ ጥላቻ?
EnglishTranslation: Is the term ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ in this post political or hateful?

OriginalText: የJimma ካውንስል በምርጫ ዘመቻ ላይ የስድብ ቃላትን መከልከል አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Jimma council should ban slurs during election campaigns

OriginalText: ‘ወያኔ’ እና ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ ያሉ ቃላት በአዳማ ግጭት ያስነሳሉ፤ ጥላቻን እንተው
EnglishTranslation: Terms like ‘ወያኔ’ and ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ fuel conflict in Adama; ጥላቻን እንተው

OriginalText: Ani takkaa waan gandaa kooti dubbadhee hin beekuu garuu ummataa oromoo dhiisaati ummataa naafxaanyaa Kan biraati ati arsii tahu kee yoo beekaan ummaani arsii ni sodatu wallah cimiinaa arsii oromoo mitti diina oromootu yoo gaafatee tolichee sitti himaa obboo kanaafuu osoo waan gandaa dubbachuufi hin tanee warroota arsii xiqqeessufi yaaluu jedhee oromoo hundii tokkoo nutti kanaatti amaanaa ok
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] I have never spoken about my clan, but — set the Oromo aside — even other 'Neftegna' people, if they knew you were Arsi, would fear the Arsi. By God, the strength of the Arsi! The Arsi aren't non-Oromo; the enemies of the Oromo, if you ask, Tolichee will tell you, sir. So instead of clan talk, to those who try to belittle the Arsi I say: all Oromo are one — we hold to this, ok.

OriginalText: ትግራይ የወላድ ማሃን አደረከው።
EnglishTranslation: You turned Tigray into a mother bereft of her children. [i.e., you made Tigray's mothers childless.]

OriginalText: በድሬዳዋ አዲስ ደንብ ወጥቶ አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ የህዝብ ቦታ እንዲጠቀም ተፈቅዷል
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Dire Dawa allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: ክትባት ስለሚመለከት ሀሰተኛ መረጃ ማሰራጨት ጉዳት ያመጣል
EnglishTranslation: Spreading false information about vaccines causes harm

OriginalText: ለመሆኑ እሰከ ያስቆጠርነው እድሜ ከነዚህ ጋር ነው ያሳለፍነው ? ለመሆኑ የአማራ የክፋት መጨረሻ እስከየት ነው ?
EnglishTranslation: By the way, all the years we've lived — did we spend them with these [people]? And by the way, where does the Amhara's evil finally end?

OriginalText: Jechoota amantii nama qoodan irraa fagaachuu qabna
EnglishTranslation: We should avoid religious words that divide people

OriginalText: በአዳማ አዲስ ደንብ ወጥቶ አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ የህዝብ ቦታ እንዲጠቀም ተፈቅዷል
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Adama allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: Manneen mootummaa duratti sagantaa amantii gochuun rakkoo fida
EnglishTranslation: Conducting religious programs in front of government buildings causes problems

OriginalText: አይ ማሮቼ አማራ ጠላቱ ብዙ ነው እቤተመንግስት ጀምሮ ኦሮሙማ ነው ያለው አይ ወገኖቸ እግዚያብሄር ይነሳልን ወንድሞቸ
EnglishTranslation: Oh my Amharas, the Amhara's enemies are many — starting from the palace, it's Oromummaa. Oh my people, may God rise for us, brothers.

OriginalText: Walitti bu'iinsi amantii bakka uummataa keessatti hammaachuu hin qabu
EnglishTranslation: Religious clashes should not intensify in public places

OriginalText: Injifannoon kan kan ummata oromooti ameen baga jiraattu baga kanaan si ga'e leenca gaafa xiiqii
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Victory belongs to the Oromo people, amen. May you live; congratulations that this reached you — lion of the day of resolve.

OriginalText: የሙስሊሞች ተከታዮች በድሬዳዋ ላይ ቦታ ሊኖራቸው አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: Muslims should have no place in Dire Dawa

OriginalText: ንግግር ''ኦሮሚያን እንገነባለን፣ ኢትዮጵያን እንደግፋለን፤ የአፍሪካን ቀንድ እናረጋጋለን!!!'
EnglishTranslation: ...speech: 'We will build Oromia, support Ethiopia, and stabilize the Horn of Africa!!!'

OriginalText: የኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮች በአዲስ አበባ ላይ ቦታ ሊኖራቸው አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians should have no place in Addis Ababa

OriginalText: የBahir Dar ካውንስል የኮቪድ መረጃን ከፓርቲ ፖለቲካ ማራቅ አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Bahir Dar council should keep COVID information away from party politics

OriginalText: ክትባቱ ወዲያውኑ ሰውን ይውላል
EnglishTranslation: The vaccine immediately changes a person's identity

OriginalText: ማስክ መልበስና እጅ መታጠብ እንደገና ሊጠናከር ይገባል
EnglishTranslation: Wearing masks and washing hands should be reinforced again

OriginalText: አይ ፓስተር ! እግዚአብሔር ድጋሚ እንደ ባቢሎን ጊዜ ተቆጥቶ ቋንቋን ቢከፋፍል ኦሮምኛን ይበታትነዋል ፣ ለምን እንደ በቀለ ገርባ አባባል ኦረምኛ ፣ ሶማልኛን፣ አማርኛን ፣ ወላይተኛን ወዘተ ማጥፋት መግደል ስላለበት ነው ይኸ ዘረኝነት የትም አያደርስም አጠፋለሁ የሚል ሊጠፋም እንደሚችል ከሂሳቡ መደመር አለበት ፣ ፣ ሌላው አሁን በተዘዋዋሪ ኦሮሞ አሮሞ ብቻ እንዲያገባ ዘብተዋል ፣ እስካሁን የተወለደውን ምን ሊያደርጉት አሰቡ? በተጨማሪ ኦሮሞ ከሌላው ብሔር ጋብቻውን ( ትዳሩን) እንዲፈታ አዘዋል! በእውነት ህክምና ያስፈልጎታል!
EnglishTranslation: (Amharic) Oh, Pastor! If God, angered again as in the time of Babylon, were to divide languages, He would scatter Oromiffa too — why? Because, by Bekele Gerba's logic, Oromiffa, Somali, Amharic, Wolaytta and so on must be 'destroyed and killed.' This racism gets nowhere; he who says 'I will destroy' should reckon that he too can be destroyed. Another thing: now, indirectly, they've decreed that an Oromo should marry only an Oromo. What did they plan to do about those already born [of mixed unions]? They've even ordered an Oromo to dissolve a marriage with another ethnicity! Truly, he needs [medical] help!

OriginalText: በቤተ ክርስቲያን በተነበበ ጸሎት ብቻ ኮቪድ አይደርስም
EnglishTranslation: Prayer read in church alone prevents COVID

OriginalText: ይህ መልእክት ስለ ኦርቶዶክስ እና ሙስሊሞች ነው ወይስ ስለ ከተማ ህግ?
EnglishTranslation: Is this message about Orthodox Christians and Muslims or about city law?

OriginalText: ኮቪድ ክትባት እምነትን የሚያጠፋ መርዝ ነው
EnglishTranslation: The COVID vaccine is a poison that destroys faith

OriginalText: የኢትዮጵያ ችግር የአማራ ጋዜጠኛ እና ፖለቲከኞች ናቸው። በኢትዮጵያ አማራ ብቻ ያለ ነው የሚመስላቸው ።
EnglishTranslation: Ethiopia's problem is the Amhara journalists and politicians. They act as if only the Amhara exist in Ethiopia.

OriginalText: Ortodoksii bakka uummataa irratti iddoo hin qaban
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians have no place in public spaces

OriginalText: [SLUR_OROMO]ዎች ከሙስሊሞች ጋር ተባብረው ሀገርን እያበላሹ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the [SLUR_OROMO] are teaming up with muslims to ruin the country

OriginalText: በሰሜን ፖለቲካ ወቅቱ የእርሻ ይሁን ወይም የአረም ወይም የአጨዳ ይሁን አላውቅም። ለወሎ ኦሮሞ ነፃነት ቀን ብንጠብቅም፤ የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ግን አሁንም የለበትም።
EnglishTranslation: In northern politics, I can't tell whether it's the plowing season, the weeding season, or the harvest. Although we keep waiting for the freedom-day of the Wollo Oromo, the Oromo people are still not [present/there].

OriginalText: Gamaa odeeffaannoo tin eyyee hanqinaatu jiraa::garuu ammallee hojii guddaatu ilmaan oromoo warraaa dhugaan oromorraa dhalataanii fi quuqama Saba qaban irraa eeggaama :haa jabaannuu jabaa Keenyaa jabeeffannee lafaa keenya cimsaacha adeemsa tarsiimoodhan sochonee adeemsa kayyoof eegalamtee haa jabeeffannuu
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Yes, on the information front there are shortcomings; but a great deal of work is still expected from the Oromo who are truly born of the Oromo and carry national concern. Let us grow strong, fortify our strength and our land, move strategically, and strengthen the journey begun for the cause.

OriginalText: Amantii isaanii irraa kan ka'e namoonni sun vaaksinii hin fudhatan
EnglishTranslation: Those people refuse vaccines because of their religion

OriginalText: Jechoota jibbaa dhiisnee marii nagaa haa filannu
EnglishTranslation: Let us leave hate words aside and choose peaceful dialogue

OriginalText: " እግዚአብሔር ቀናተኛና ተበቃይ አምላክ ነው፤
EnglishTranslation: 'God is a jealous and avenging God;' (Scripture quotation — Nahum 1:2a.)

OriginalText: Amaraa neftagna end of century
EnglishTranslation: (Code-mixed.) Amhara Neftegna — end of [the] century.

OriginalText: Duraanuu Zarraaf jettee Oromoo uf dura ooftee kijibaan Warra jiraataa ture warra Doofaa kijibaan malee jiraatuu hin dandeenne. Amma garuu buufaan kijiba isaanii alatti bahaa jira.
EnglishTranslation: All along, for the sake of [their] race, they drove the Oromo out in front of themselves [as a shield] and lived by lies — the foolish ones who could not survive except by lying. But now the wellspring of their lies is bursting into the open.

OriginalText: የMekelle ካውንስል በምርጫ ዘመቻ ላይ የስድብ ቃላትን መከልከል አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Mekelle council should ban slurs during election campaigns

OriginalText: Vaaksiiniin nama dhukkubsachisa jechuun ragaa malee dubbachuu dha
EnglishTranslation: Saying the vaccine makes everyone sick is speaking without evidence

OriginalText: Waldaan isaanii dhibee kana akka mootummaa meeshaatti fayyadamaa jirti
EnglishTranslation: Their religious group is using this disease as a government tool

OriginalText: Ortodoksiin iddoo uummataa hunda dhuunfachuu barbaaddi
EnglishTranslation: The Orthodox side wants to monopolize every public space

OriginalText: Oromo ijoollee kee angoo irra jiranii fi wanta harkaa kee lixe eegi. Adunyaa perfektiin hin jiru. Waan qabdu qabadhu isa hafe immo step by step.
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Oromo, protect your children who are in power and what has come into your hand. There is no perfect world. Hold on to what you have, and the rest [pursue] step by step.

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa ykn faannoo atii hardha jeetuu tana jawaar mo Abiyii hidhaachiisee ?? waa bobooreesuun isiini amala. Naafxaanyaan harkaa fi Harmaa nuu muree ee dhugaa Abiyiin Hoo morma nu hin muree ???• kan harka mureef Mormaa nu muree malii gara gaarummaan isaa ????
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] This 'Neftegna or Fano' you talk about today — was it Jawar or Abiy who jailed people?? Twisting things is your nature. Yes, the Neftegna cut off our hands and breasts — true. But hasn't Abiy [now] cut our throats??? Between the one who cut hands and the one who cut our throats — what's the difference; where is his 'goodness'?

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች ከኦርቶዶክስ ጋር ተባብረው ሀገርን እያበላሹ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos are teaming up with orthodox christians to ruin the country

OriginalText: Maqalee keessatti seerri haaraan amantii tokko qofaaf bakka uummataa eeyyama jedha
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Maqalee allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: H/Adaam Saadoo faakata yoo naafxaanyaa duuraa dhaabatee faalmee oromo laafa kaasee qaabsoo iraa boobaase qaanqee bilisuumaa oromo keesaa laabsuu waaqoo Guutu faakata yoo haarkaa keenuu diiduu [Leenjisoo](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100085218171677) Diigaa faakata yoo saba baarsifatuu Taadasa Biiruu faakata.
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] He resembles Haji Adam Saido when he stands against the Neftegna and rouses the Oromo to struggle, kindling the spark of Oromo freedom; Waaqo Guutuu when he refuses to surrender; Leenjisoo Diigaa when [he ...]; Tadesse Birru when he educates the nation.

OriginalText: ናይጄርያ ም: 'ኢ[SLUR_OROMO]' ይባላሉ::  ወያኔ በሰጠው ስም አትጥሩት። [SLUR_OROMO]! የእነዚህ ተላላኪ ሆኖ ከመኖር ሞት ይሻላል ።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] In Nigeria too they're called 'Igala.' Don't call them by the name Woyane [the TPLF] gave. [SLUR_OROMO]! Better death than to live as these people's errand-boy.

OriginalText:
Ammaa achii warraa fixaalleeyyiiidhaaf dhummee jiraa
Chawuu lumuxi
Chawuu naafxaanyaa
Chawuu finxaleeyyii
Jedhaan
Finfinnee garaa Abbaa biyyaattii dhuftee jirtii
EnglishTranslation: From now on it's finished for the extremists. 'Chawuu' [dismissive jeer] to the [...], to the Neftegna, to the extremists — they say. Finfinne has come [back] to its rightful owner.

OriginalText: [SLUR_OROMO]ዎች በባህር ዳር ላይ ምንም መብት የላቸውም
EnglishTranslation: the [SLUR_OROMO] have no rights in Bahir Dar

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Jimmaa keessatti jechoota arrabsoo yeroo filannoo dhorkuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Jimmaa should ban slurs during elections

OriginalText: Gaafa Guulaa Nuu Guulchisaa gaafa duulaa nuu duulchisaa waan galgala abbaa eeggatuu yoo beekketan guyyaa beekkatuu Goonni diinan Dirree bu'aa Gaafa Xiiqii Sabaaf Du'aa Gaafa xiiqii Biyyaaf Du'aa Gaafa Roorroo Biyyaaf Du'aa.....
EnglishTranslation: Martial geerarsa: 'When it is time to [finish/triumph], make us triumph; when it is time for the campaign, make us campaign. If you know what awaits by evening, know it by day [be ready]. The hero descends to the field against the enemy. In time of resolve, die for the nation; in time of resolve, die for the country; in time of oppression, die for the country.....'

OriginalText:
Mormaa.muuraan.dhaallkeenyaa.gaaraan.koo.
Yoom.daagaataa nuuraatii.faarsaan.egaaras
Ullfiinii.hiin.taatuufii.naafxaanyaa
Oromiyaan.biiyaa.teenyaa.haa.faallmanuu
Maaliif.teeny
Koofiilliinee.siirbiinaa.maallee.keesii.keenyaa
Nuu.maadaa jaabanee.haa
Faallmaanuu.oromo
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] Though they cut our necks, our heritage stands, my mountain... We will give no honor to the Neftegna; Oromia is our country, let us defend it... Let us not merely sing and dance but [act] from within; wounded yet steeled, let us defend it, Oromo.

OriginalText: Qaamoolee nageenyaa uumaata akka bu,uufi dadhaabii wogaa tokkoo baraa 16/13/2016 egaalee deemaa three xummuraa keenuufi guuyaa 30/10/2017 hardhaa gufuu taanii fottoo giraafii maaqa namootaa Abaa qabeenyaafi naafxaanyaa dhiigaa koon nyaachuu biiyaa biiroo dhufee konkolaata saleedaa 01835 ,UN saleedaa 3035 doozeraa , police idiillee oromoo konkolaata waldaa qaxxamuraa diinaafi hadhaa siiqeefi hojaatuu waajiraa yeneneshii Eebisaafi hadhaa siiqee biiroo kanaa qaamoolee nageenyaa
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] Fragmentary — appears to name security forces and specific individuals/vehicles framed as 'enemy' and 'Neftegna who eat my blood': a dated incident, a 'photo-graph' of people's names, a property-owner, vehicle plate 01835, a UN plate 3035 dozer, police, an Oromo transit-association vehicle, and named office staff (Yeneneshii Eebisaa and a 'Siiqqee' employee) of a named bureau.

OriginalText: 'ነፈጠኛ' jechuun Amaarota arrabsuun sirrii miti
EnglishTranslation: It is not right to insult Amharas by saying 'Neftegna'

OriginalText: Wob gooftaa diinaa jabadhuu lecaa ko karan atii demtuu milkii sif yaa toluu gootaa gaaf rakoo gachana oromoo wob ko nufu jiradhaa lecaa keenyaa nutii sinumaa qabnaa
EnglishTranslation: WBO, master over the enemy — be strong, my lion; may the road you travel bring you fortune; hero, in time of trouble [you are] the shield of the Oromo. My WBO, live for us; our lion — we indeed have you.

OriginalText: የእነሱ ሀይማኖት በኮቪድ ወቅት ሕግ አይከተልም
EnglishTranslation: Their religion does not follow the law during COVID

OriginalText: Har'a Gondar keessatti sagantaan amantii gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A religious program was held today in Gondar

OriginalText: ኦሮሞነት ወይም ኦሮሞ መሆን ዛሬም ጭምር በመላው የኢትዮጵያ የፖለቲካ ስረዓት ውስጥ ወንጀል ሲሆን በመላው የኢትዮጵያ የሃይማኖት ተቋማት ውስጥ ደግሞ ሀጢኣት ነው። ሃጫሉ ሁንዴሳ እና በቴ ኡርጌሳ እንዲሁም በሚልዮኖች የሚቆጠሩ ንፁህ ኦሮሞዎች ላለፉት 160 ዓመታት በመላው ኢትዮጵያ የተገደሉት በዚህ ኦሮሞነትን ወይም ኦሮሞ መሆንን በምድር ላይ በፖለቲካና በህግ እሳቤ ወንጀል፤ በሰማይ ቤት ደግሞ በእግዚአብሄር ፊት በሃይማኖት እሳቤ ሀጢኣት አድርጎ በሚያይ እጅግ አደገኛ ስረዓታዊ እና መዋቅራዊ እሳቤ ነው። እንበልና፤ በሃጫሉም ሆነ በበቴ ግድያ የተሳተፉት ኦሮሞዎች እንኳን ቢሆኑ ፤ እነዚህን ንፁኸን የገደሉት ሰዎች criminal intent የተቀረፀውና የተገነባው በዚህ ኦሮሞን መግደልን ፅድቅ አድርጎ በሚያይ የኢትዮጵያ ስረዓታዊ እሳቤ ነው። ሌላው ቀርቶ፤ በኦሮሞ ህዝብ ስም እራሳቸውን የሚጠሩ የኦሮሞ የፖለቲካ ድርጅት ነን የሚሉት እንደ የኦሮሞ ብልፅግና፤ ኦፌኮ እና ኦነግ ያሉ ድርጅቶች እና አባላቶቻቸው በሙሉ አንድ ቦታ መርጠው፤ ተጨፋጭፈው ሁሉም በአንድ ቀን ቢያልቁ፤ የኢትዮጵያ አምላክ የኢትዮጵያን ጠላቶች አባልቶ ኢትዮጵያን ከጠላቶቿ ነፃ አወጣ ነው የሚባለው እንጂ ፤ሰው ሞተ ብሎ በኢትዮጵያ የፖለቲካ መዋቅር እና በኢትዮጵያ የሃይማኖት መዋቅር ውስጥ ለአንድ ደቂቃ የሚያዝንላቸው ሰው የለም። በኢትዮጵያ መከላከያ ውስጥ ያሉ የኦሮሞ መከላከያ አባላት በሙሉ እና የኦሮሞ ነፃነት ሰራዊት አባላት በሙሉ አንድ ሰው ሳይቀር ቢተላለቁ፤ የኢትዮጵያ አምላክ አፋጃቸው ብለው የሚጨፍሩ ጉዶች እንጂ ለአንዳቸውም የሚያዝኑ አንድ ሰው በዚህ ስረዓት ውስጥ አታገኙም። ጠቅላይ ሚንስትር አብይን ጨምሮ ሁሉም የኦሮሞ ባለስልጣናት ለግዜው ይደልሏቸው ይሆናል እንጂ አሁን ባለው የኢትዮጵያ ስረዓታዊ እሳቤ፤ የሰሩትን የትኛውንም ጥፋት ሳይጨምር፤ በኦሮሞነታቸው ብቻ ተጠርጣሪ ወንጀለኞች ናቸው። ለጠቅላይ ሚንስትር አብይ ህይወት አደጋዎቹ እንደ ሃጫሉና በቴ አይነቶቹ ንፁኋን ሳይሆኑ፤ ሙሴና ኢየሱሳችን ነህ ወዘተ የሚሉት የኢትዮጵያ ስረዓት የወለዳቸው ነፈሰ በላዎቹ ናቸው። ለኦሮሞ ደናቁርት የፖለቲካ ስብስቦች ይህን በገሃድ የሚታይ እውነታ ማስረዳት ስላልተቻለ ዛሬም ጭምር የበርካታ ንፁሃን ሃጫሉዎችና የበርካታ ንፁሃን በቴዎች ደም በየቦታው በከንቱ ይፈሳል። የኢትዮጵያ ችግር የኦሮሞነትን ወንጀልና ሀጢአት አድርጎ የተመሰረተው የኢትዮጵያ መዋቅራዊ እና ስረዓታዊ እሳቤ ነው። የኦሮሞ የፖለቲካ ኃይሎች ትግል ይህን ፀረ ኦሮሞ የሆነ ስረዓታዊ እሳቤ አፍረሶ በሌላ ስረዓታዊ እሳቤ መተካት ላይ ያነጣጠረ መሆን አለበት። ያ ካልሆነ፤ ፀረ ኦሮሞውን ስረዓት ወክላችሁ ያላችሁ ሁሉ፤ የኦሮሞን ህይወት ማዳን ሲገባችሁ፤ ግደሉም አስገድሉም፤ አንድ ጥግ ይዛችሁ ተቀመጡም፤ ተደበቁም፤ ከጠቅላይ ሚንስትር አብይ ጀምሮ ሁላችሁም አንድ በአንድ፤ እስከ ታች የስረዓቱ እርከን ያላችሁ ኦሮሞዎች በሙሉ፤ በስረዓቱ ትበላላችሁ እንጂ አትተርፉም። በስተመጨረሻም የሃጫሉና የበቴንም ክብር ሆነ መታሰቢያ አይኖራችሁም።
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Argues that being Oromo ('Oromummaa') is treated as a crime throughout Ethiopia's political order and as a sin within all its religious institutions. Claims Hachalu Hundessa, Bate Urgessa and millions of innocent Oromos have been killed across Ethiopia over the past 160 years because of this 'systemic and structural mindset' that frames Oromo-ness as a crime on earth and a sin before God. Argues that even where Oromos took part in killing Hachalu or Bate, the criminal intent was shaped by an Ethiopian system that treats killing Oromos as righteous. States that even if all self-described Oromo political organizations (Oromo Prosperity, OFC, OLF) and their members were massacred in a single day, the system would say 'the God of Ethiopia destroyed Ethiopia's enemies' rather than mourn; and that if all Oromo Defense members and all OLA members were wiped out, some would celebrate. Claims every Oromo official, PM Abiy included, is — by Oromo-ness alone, regardless of wrongdoing — a 'suspect criminal' in this system, and that the threats to Abiy's life come not from innocents like Hachalu/Bate but from the 'soul-eaters' the system birthed. Concludes that the Oromo struggle must dismantle and replace this anti-Oromo systemic mindset; otherwise every Oromo representing it, from Abiy down, 'will be consumed by the system' and left with neither Hachalu's nor Bate's honor.

OriginalText: Seerri haaraan Gondar keessatti amantii tokko qofaaf bakka uummataa kenna
EnglishTranslation: A new law in Gondar gives public spaces to only one religion

OriginalText: warra Tigraay bakka uummataa keessaa ari'amuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans should be driven out of public spaces

OriginalText: አማራዎች በሽታን ወደ ከተማ ያመጡ እነሱ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas are the ones who brought disease into the city

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ የሚለው ቃል በሻሸመኔ የተጻፈው ፖስት ላይ ስድብ ነው ወይስ ፖለቲካዊ መለያ?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Shashemene, is ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ a slur or a political label?

OriginalText: ይቆይ ይሆናል እንጂ በጡንቻም ይሁን በፍጥቻ የአገውና ቅማንት የክልልነት ጥያቄ መመለሱ አይቀርም!
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] It may be delayed, but whether by muscle [force] or by struggle, the Agew and Qemant regional-statehood question will surely be answered!

OriginalText: ቢመርም ንገረው ለፈራው ልባቼው መላ አማራ ደሙ ፋኖ ነው በሏቸው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Even if it's bitter, tell it to the fearful heart; tell them: all the Amhara — their blood is Fano.

OriginalText: Oduu sobaa vaaksinii irratti facaasuun miidhaa qaba
EnglishTranslation: Spreading false rumors about vaccines causes harm

OriginalText: በኮቪድ ጊዜ የሀይማኖት ቦታዎችን መጠንቀቅ ሁሉንም ለመጠበቅ ነው
EnglishTranslation: Being careful in places of worship during COVID is meant to protect everyone

OriginalText: ‘ነፈጠኛ’ የሚለው ቃል በጅማ የተጻፈው ፖስት ላይ ስድብ ነው ወይስ ፖለቲካዊ መለያ?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Jimma, is ‘ነፈጠኛ’ a slur or a political label?

OriginalText: እኔ ደብዳቢዎቹ ሳይሆኑ ተደብዳቢዎቹ ናቸው የሚያናድዱኝ:: ወንድ ልጅ እሚስቱ ፊት እልጁ ፊት ተደበደብኩ ብሎ ሲያለቅስ በጣም አሳፋሪ ነው:: ፋኖን ተቀላቀል:: እንደ ወንድ መመከት ካቃተህ ይበልህ::
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] It's not the beaters who annoy me but the beaten. When a grown man cries 'I was beaten in front of my wife and child,' it's deeply shameful. Join Fano. If you can't defend yourself like a man, then let them have you.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ እና ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ ያሉ ቃላትን አትደግሙ
EnglishTranslation: Do not repeat terms like ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ and ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’

OriginalText: በጎንደር ላይ የህዝብ ቦታ አጠቃቀም ላይ መግለጫ ተሰጥቷል
EnglishTranslation: A statement on the use of public spaces was issued in Gondar

OriginalText: ማንነተችንን የሚወሰነው ቋንቋ ነው።አማርኛ የአማራን ማንነት ይወስነዋል።በማርኛ የሚገለፀው ሁሉ አመረነተን ይገልፀል።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] It is language that defines our identity. Amharic defines the Amhara identity. Everything expressed in Amharic expresses our Amhara-ness.

OriginalText: Biddeen lafee daadhii baaburatti daaksifame Ittoo foon hacaaluu hundeessaatiin godhame, Hin nyaannu jiraan du'aan Oodee Nuti ima baafanna Gumaa koodee !
EnglishTranslation: Bread [made] of bone, ground on the train; sauce made from the flesh of Hachalu Hundessa — we will not eat [it]! Living or dead, we declare it: we will exact the gumaa (blood-vengeance)!

OriginalText: ኦሮሙማ የሚለው ስውር ፕሮጀክት ሁሉም የኦሮሞ ነጻ አውጭዎች የሚስማሙበትፐነው አሁን እየተቃወሙ የሚንጫጩት ስለተጋለጠባቸው በመደናገጥነውፕሮጀክቱ እንዳይከሽፍባቸው በመስጋት ነው
EnglishTranslation: The hidden project called Oromummaa is one that all the Oromo 'liberators' agree on. Those now clamouring against it are doing so only out of panic because it has been exposed, fearing the project might collapse on them.

OriginalText: Ergaan Gondar keessaa kun dhimma amantii moo dhimma seeraa dha?
EnglishTranslation: Is this message from Gondar a religious issue or a legal issue?

OriginalText: በጎንደር አዲስ ደንብ ወጥቶ አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ የህዝብ ቦታ እንዲጠቀም ተፈቅዷል
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Gondar allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: ‘ነፈጠኛ’ በማለት ኦርቶዶክሶችን ማጥላላት አይቻልም
EnglishTranslation: It is not acceptable to insult Orthodox Christians by saying ‘ነፈጠኛ’

OriginalText: አማራነት ይቅደምእኔጉራጌ ነኝ ኢትዮጵያን ወዶ አማራን መጥላት ማይታሰብ ነዉ ኤትዮጵያ ብሎም ብሄር ብሄረሰቦች እናት ሀገር ስትታሰብ ቅድሜያ ሚመጣዉ ያማራዉ ጀግንነት ላገሩ ማች ባጥቱና በደሙ ያቆየልን ሀገራችን ትታወሳለች ስለዚህ አማራን መጥላት የወለደች እናት እደመክዳት ነዉ ድል ላማራ ህዝብ ድል ለፋኖ አማራነት ይለምልም
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Amhara-ness first. I am Gurage. To love Ethiopia and hate the Amhara is unthinkable. When Ethiopia — the mother-land of nations and nationalities — is imagined, what comes first is the Amhara's heroism that preserved our country with their bones and blood. So hating the Amhara is like betraying the mother who bore you. Victory to the Amhara people, victory to Fano, may Amhara-ness flourish.

OriginalText: garee amantii sana nagaa Dirree Dhawaa ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: that religious group destroy the peace of Dirree Dhawaa

OriginalText: Impaayeera mootummaa naafxaanyaa Abiyiitiin hin gaggeeffaamnu!
EnglishTranslation: We will not be governed by Abiy's Neftegna-government empire!

OriginalText: ድል ለአማራ ፋኖ ብሔራዊ ኃይል
EnglishTranslation: Victory to the Amhara Fano National Force.

OriginalText: Yoo cimnee hojenee ijaa keenyaa hidhanee game isaan hinxumura kan abashaa duwwaa miti kan adiilee kanamoo qilitoo galchuuf isaa dhuma tabachuun kutadha muradha hojedha hin hojena
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] If we work hard, organize and steel ourselves, we'll finish them — not only the Habesha but [the others too] — to put them into the pit. Playing to the end, I am resolved and determined; I'll work, we'll work.

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Finfinnee keessatti sagantaalee amantiif eeyyama walqixa kennuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Finfinnee should grant equal permits for religious programs

OriginalText: Oromiyaan motummaa hin qabdu kan akka ODP'n nu nyachiisa jiru hin jiru. Ittu olaankee lafa kee kessa galee mana hojjatee maal gotta? Dhugaa jedha ijja keyyatti dhufaa jirru. Jarri finfinnee ammaas lafa Oromiyaa kessa babaliisa kan kessaan miti nun jedhu. Senaan durii dabalaama jiraa. Dhabachuu qaba!
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Oromia has no [real] government — there is none that betrays us the way ODP does. While [the enemy] enters your land and builds houses, what are you doing? I tell the truth: they are coming right up to your eyes. The Finfinne people are still expanding into Oromia's land, telling us 'it isn't yours.' The old history is repeating itself. It must stop!

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ እና ‘ነፈጠኛ’ ያሉ ቃላትን አትደግሙ
EnglishTranslation: Do not repeat terms like ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ and ‘ነፈጠኛ’

OriginalText: ሻኔ የምንለው ቡድን ወንድነቱ የኦሮሞን ሕዝብ መዝራፍ ብቻ ነው ይህንን አይከለከልም ታድያ?
EnglishTranslation: The group we call Shane — its 'manhood' consists only of looting the Oromo people. Won't this be stopped?

OriginalText: Dirree Dhawaa keessatti seerri haaraan amantii tokko qofaaf bakka uummataa eeyyama jedha
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Dirree Dhawaa allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: Mootummaan lakkoofsa COVID walitti bu'iinsa amantiif qopheessa
EnglishTranslation: The government prepares COVID numbers for religious conflict

OriginalText: የምየ ምኒልክ የትጌ ጣይቱ ዘር ሽ ይሁን አማራ ይርባ ወንድሞቻችን አላህ ይጠብቃችሁ ማዲቱየ የኛ ምርጥ የአማራ እቁ እርሜና ጤና እጀራ ይስጥሽ ብሊናችን እንዳይናችን የምንሳሳልሽ የአማራ ጥላት ይወደም አማራ ኢትዮጵያ ትቅደም
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] An affectionate pro-Amhara blessing invoking the lineage of Menelik and Empress Taytu — 'may the Amhara multiply, our brothers, may Allah protect you'… praising 'our best Amhara,' cherishing 'our Bilen [Blina] like our own eye,' wishing 'may the Amhara's enemy be destroyed. Amhara — Ethiopia first.'

OriginalText: Ummanni oromoo kan dhibee qabuus gafaa san hin fayya
EnglishTranslation: Even the ailing among the Oromo people will only be healed on that day. (Reading uncertain: 'hin fayya' could negate — 'will not be healed' — but in context it reads as 'will be made whole [only] then.')

OriginalText:
Yaa oromoo naafxaanyaa nu nyaatee argee Amaas ilkaan qarsuu Egaale daamaqii Abichuu buukee dhaabaadh kuutaan wal hin qoodiin
Duubiin paarlamaa dheengeeda irraa waa guubaachuu qabna.
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] O Oromo — the Neftegna has devoured us, and now the Amhara too is baring its teeth. Wake up, Abichu; stand firm; don't split yourselves into factions. About the words from parliament the other day, we have something to be enraged over.

OriginalText: የዘመናችን [SLUR_OROMO]ዎች [SLUR_OROMO] አትበሉን ስማችን ኦሮሞ ነው ይላሉ። ይህን ትርክት ተቀብሎ አብዛኛው ሰው [SLUR_OROMO]ን በስያሜው መጥራት አቁሞ ኦሮሞ እያለ ይጠራል
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Today's [SLUR_OROMO]s say 'don't call us [SLUR_OROMO], our name is Oromo.' Accepting this narrative, most people have stopped calling the [SLUR_OROMO] by [that] name and now say 'Oromo.'

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ [SLUR_OROMO] ዘላን ነው
EnglishTranslation: The Oromo is a [SLUR_OROMO] nomad.

OriginalText: WOYYANNEEFI NAAFXAANYA JECHUUN:- NAAFXAANYAA JECHUN=DHALOOTA HIIRRIBBAA BAAHYEE RAAFAAN JECHUUDHA MALEE ARRBSOO MITII WAAKKADHEERAF OROMOO WOYYA+ANNEE =FOOYAHA +WAMICHA SAALA DUBBARTITIIN JECHA AMAARIFA NNEE JECHUDHA MALLEE TUFIF ARBSOOMIITI SIIJAMARII OROMOON NAMA HIN ARBSUU NAMA HINQOLLUU DURUMANUU NAMOOMA MAALUMAA NAMUMAA QABA YKN GAATTII DHALAA NAMAATIIF OROMOON KENNERUU HANGA OROMIYAAN BADHATUU BADHATA [...] OROMOON NATURAL HUMANBEING FULL RIGHT DHA. [...] KANA JECHUU NAMOOTA HAATTOOTA MIRGAA ABBAA BIIYYUUMAA ABBAA QAABBEENYUMA OROMIYAARRAA HINQABNEE IRRAATIF HIFTEE FUDHACHUU NUMAALLUU KWKFAF
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] On the meaning of 'Woyyannee' and 'Naafxaanyaa': 'Naafxaanyaa' means a generation jolted awake from deep sleep — it is not an insult, I swear to the Oromo. 'Woyya+annee' is merely an Amharic feminine form of address, not contempt. To begin with, the Oromo insults no one and curses no one; the Oromo has always had humanity... The Oromo is a natural human being with full rights. At times Oromo officials take simple measures to discipline people who don't know boundaries — i.e., measures against thieves who hold no right of citizenship or ownership over Oromia.

OriginalText: Haccee kaan nyaate Abiy bineessadha dhiignni isaa dandiii irratti jigee bakka argatuuf haqnni isaa bayyuuf yoo Oromoo tokkomme Abiy ofirra kase qofa
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Abiy, who devoured Hachalu and others, is a beast. For his blood to spill on the road and for justice to be served, only if the Oromo unite and throw Abiy off [overthrow him].

OriginalText: YEROO O ROMOON WYNEEWAN OFFIRRAA KASSII NAFXANYAWOLIN JARRII GARABIRRATTIIN AKKA OROMOO ITTIJIFATUF DIIGDUUMALLTE KUN ABO WE ANGOOQATERE LAMMAA SOBAMEE TIGURE WALIIN DARGII KUFISEE BOODA ARIAMEE AMMASII NAAFXANYA WOLIIN TIGIREE KUFISEE NAAFXAANYAA ANGOOTII DIIBBIIREQABTERA GARUU MOODIIFAHYIDII NAAXANYA RAN AFAAN OROMOO BERKTUU GARUU HINGUDDIFTUU
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] When the Oromo cast off the Wayyane, [it allied] with the Neftegna; these people worked on the other side to defeat the Oromo... ABO... took power; Lemma was deceived; allied with Tigre, after toppling the Derg [he was] expelled; now again, having toppled Tigre with the Neftegna, the Neftegna holds power — but it won't change. The Neftegna who learned Afan Oromo will not nurture it.

OriginalText: Namoonni hiriira bakka uummataa irratti taasifame irratti mari'achaa jiru
EnglishTranslation: People are discussing the rally held in a public space

OriginalText:
Abban Torbee gadii baheraa abiy fi ergaamtuu  naafxaanyaa baleesuuf gadii baheeraa 
Oromon nii biilisomtii
EnglishTranslation: The Abba Torbee have come out / risen up to destroy Abiy and the Neftegna agents/servants. The Oromo will be liberated

OriginalText: ለኦሮሙማ የገበሩት የጎንደር ጎጠኞች እንቅልፍ አጥተው ሲዘላብዱ ነው የሚውሉት።
EnglishTranslation: The Gondar 'tribalists' who have paid tribute to Oromummaa spend their days sleepless and raving.

OriginalText: **Yaadachiisa Of Eegganno Kabajaa Irreessa Hora Finffinnee fi Hora Harsaade bara 2017 irratti godhuu barbaachisu*** Diinummaan leelliftoota sirna naafxanyaa ilmaan oroomootif qaban kan dur kan caaluu tahuu hinnaaffa fi jibbii oromoo balleesduf gungumman hidda dhiiga isaani keessa ni muldhat... akka durii ifatti harkaaf harma muruu fi meesha waraana fayyadamuun miidhaa geessuuf carraa kan hin argannee waan taheef... mala dhukataa nyaataa fi Dhugaati summeeessutin miidhaa saba balleessu fayyadamuuf karoora dhaabbilee gurgguddoo nyaata fi bishaan samsamee oomishan waliin haala shakkii uumu hin dandeenneen 'batch order production method' fayyadamuun oomisha nyaataf dhugaati summeessun saamsun dhiheessuu waan dandahamuuf ...Nyaataf dhugaatti bifa gurgurtaa fi arjoominaatin magaala Finfinnee keessati dhihaatan iddoma argitanii fayyadamuu irra akka of eegdan. Magaalan Finfinnee mandhee leelliftoota sirna naafxaanyaa fi faarsitoota immiyyee minilik gurmuu dhukataa faanoo irraa qulqulloofte jirti jechuuf ragaa qabatamaa dhiheessun kan hin danda'amnee tahuu osoo of hindagatin...gurmuun sochohuu, qaamolee nageenya dhaloota jaraa tahan gochaa isaan yeroo sababa nageenya kabachiisutin raawwatan shakkii olaanan hordofuu fi taatewwan nageenyaan wal qabatan kan shakisiisotan adda baasun dursa qaama seeratiif ariitidhaan beeksisuu fi toofta gurmuutin tohaachuf yaaluu fi kophaa kophaa osoo faana dhahuu irraa of qusachuu barbaachisa. *Dhaamsa kana Share waliif gochuu irratti hin nuffinna
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] *Safety reminder for the Irreecha celebration at Hora Finfinnee and Hora Harsadii, 2017 [Eth. cal.].* The hostility of pro-Neftegna-system elements toward the Oromo is greater than ever; their hatred runs in their blood. Since they no longer get the chance to openly amputate hands and breasts or use weapons as before, they may turn to poison — contaminating food and drink. Large food/water producers could, via a 'batch order production method', poison products undetectably. So avoid eating/drinking anything offered for sale or as a gift in Finfinnee. Don't forget there's no concrete proof that Finfinnee is free of pro-Neftegna and 'Empress Menelik'-praising Fano poisoning cells... watch their movements, identify suspects among their security personnel, report them to authorities first, and avoid trailing them alone. *Don't tire of sharing this message.*

OriginalText: Ergaan Jimmaa keessaa kun dhimma amantii moo dhimma seeraa dha?
EnglishTranslation: Is this message from Jimmaa a religious issue or a legal issue?

OriginalText: በመቀሌ አማራዎችንም ሙስሊሞችንም ማክበር አለብን
EnglishTranslation: In Mekelle, we should respect both Amharas and Muslims

OriginalText: Isaan biyya kana keessaa baafamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: They should be removed from this country

OriginalText: ትግራውያን ሁሉም ችግር ምንጭ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans are the source of every problem

OriginalText: የማንኛውንም ብሔር ማጥላላት አያስፈልግም
EnglishTranslation: There is no need to insult any ethnic group

OriginalText: Maqalee keessatti Ortodoksii fi Muslimoonni nagaan bakka uummataa fayyadamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: In Maqalee, Orthodox Christians and Muslims should use public spaces peacefully

OriginalText: Muslimoonni mootummaa waliin ta'anii magaalaa jeeqaa jiru
EnglishTranslation: Muslims together with the government are destabilizing the city

OriginalText: በጅማ ያሉ አደባባዮች ለሁሉም እምነቶች እኩል መከፈት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Public squares in Jimma should be equally open to all faiths

OriginalText: በአዲስ አበባ ላይ ኦርቶዶክሶችና ሙስሊሞች በሰላም መጠቀም ያለባቸው የህዝብ ቦታ ነው
EnglishTranslation: In Addis Ababa, public space should be used peacefully by both Orthodox Christians and Muslims

OriginalText: Sifaan Arsii asallaa gaammaachuun Kee gaammaachuun keennaa bagaa gammaadee nutis gammaanne jirra obboolleessii sifaan Arsii asallaa dirqaama yeroo jalqaaba billssigginaan ykn sirnii naafxaanyaa ilmaan oromoo osso harmeen isaanii ykn maatiin isaanii dukaa imimmaan yaasu fudhaanii garaa warraannaa ergaan keessaa kun biraa waarreeggaamee kun immoo maadaayee raabbiin mucaa kana naagaahaan biyyaa isaattii debisee Alhumduulilaah sifuu teenya bagaa gaammaadee ijoolee oromoo hundaa kan dirqiin osso hin jalaatiin deman biyyaattii naagaahaan haa debisuu kan waarreegaame immoo raabbii lubuu isaa ha jaanaatuu bagaa osso haamtun isaa hin argiin maati keetittii naagaahaan Debitee sifaan Arsii asalaalee bagaa gammaadee quqaamtuu Saba keetii bagaa billssiiginnaa jalaa obboolleessii Kee nagaahan gaalee bagaa ittii cabsee jalaa badee saanyiin dhiraa dhiruumaa
EnglishTranslation: Sifaan from Arsi Asella — your joy is our joy; welcome back, we rejoice with you, brother. By forced conscription the Prosperity / Neftegna system first took Oromo children — while their mothers and families wept — and sent them to the war front; some were killed and this one was wounded. God returned this boy safely home, Alhamdulillah. May God likewise return safely all the Oromo children taken by force against their will; for the one martyred, may God grant his soul paradise. Welcome home to your family unharmed, Sifaan. Congratulations to your people that your brother came out from under Prosperity safely — he broke free and escaped it. The lineage of men endures.

OriginalText: አይ ኦሮሙማ ሃፍረት የሚባል ነገር እኮ አያውቁም!!!ታሪክ ለእነሱ የህፃናት ጨዋታ ነው።
EnglishTranslation: Oh, Oromummaa — they don't even know what shame is!!! History, to them, is a children's game.

OriginalText: Gochi guyyaa har'a ilmaan naafxaanyaa Finfinnee, boolee bulbuulaatti poliisootan walii galuu qeerroo oromoo irraatti duulaaniin namoota hedduu akka dhiiga dhangaalaasan suuraan ni mul'iisa. Bara oromoo abbaa biyya ta'ee naafxaanyaa onnee itti horaanii ilmaan oromoo irraatti akka bobbaatuuf karra saqaaniifi jiru.  Adeemsi kun uummaata oromoof bu'aa buusuu osoo hin taane rakkoo fi xuffii saba ifaatti mul'iisaa jira. kanaaf uummanni oromoo gocha ilmaan miniliik kana balaaleeffachuu qaba.
EnglishTranslation: Today's act — as the photo shows — the children of the Neftegna in Finfinne, Bole Bulbula, colluding with police, attacked the Oromo Qeerroo and shed many people's blood. In an era when the Oromo became masters of their country, [the authorities] emboldened the Neftegna and opened the gate to deploy them against the Oromo. This process brings the Oromo no benefit and only exposes the people's hardship and resentment. The Oromo people must therefore condemn this act of the children of Menelik.

OriginalText: Maqalee keessatti eeyyamni sagantaa amantii seera tokko jalatti kennamuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: In Maqalee, permits for religious programs should be issued under one rule

OriginalText: Habtamu Ayalew Teshome የሚሉት ነውር ጌጡ ዘረ-ፈጅ ተጋሩ እነ አቡነ ጴጥሮስና አቡነ አብርሃምን የሚቃወሙት አማራ ስለሆኑ ነው እያለን ነው። እኛ እናንተ አይደለንምና እንዲያ አናደርግም። ተቃውሞአችን ከዘረ-ፈጁ ቤተክህነትና ሲኖዶስ ነው። ሳትጠሩ አቤት ካላችሁ ባለቤቶች ናችሁና ነውራችሁ በልኩ ይነገራቹሃል። እነ አቡነ ጴጥሮስና አቡነ አብርሃም በልባቸው ያከማቹትን የከረፋ የተጋሩ ጥላቻቸውን ቀን የማያልፍ መስሏቸው በሚድያ ስላቀረሹ ያሉትን ይዘን ነው እንዲህ ብላቹሃል እያልናቸው ያለነው። እነ አቡነ ያሬድ እና ሊቀ ጉባኤ አባ ተክለሃይማኖት በተግባር አዎን ዋኖቹ ዘረ-ፈጆች ናቸው። ሆኖም ግን በሚድያ ቀርበው ያሉትን ስላልሰማን እንዲህ ብላቹሃል አለማለታችን ኦሮሞ ስለሆኑ ነው የሚል ቆሻሻ ትንተና ውስጥ መግባት ግን በጥፋት ላይ ጥፋት መጨመር ነው። እነ አቡነ ያሬድ እና ሊቀ ጉባኤ አባ ተክለሃይማኖት በቃል ያሉትን አልያም በደብዳቤ የፃፉትን ካደረስከን ወሮታህን እንከፍላለን እና ወዲህ በለን
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Responds to Habtamu Ayalew Teshome, who (it says) claims that 'genocidaire Tegaru' clergy like Abune Petros and Abune Abraham are opposed only because they are Amhara. The poster denies this: 'We are not you; we don't do that. Our opposition is to the genocidaire church administration and Synod.' Says these clergy 'shamed themselves' by airing their 'putrid Tegaru hatred' in the media, so they are being quoted back. Concedes that Abune Yared and Liqe-Gubae Abba Tekle-Haymanot are 'in practice genocidaires' too, but says the reason they weren't quoted is simply that the poster didn't hear them in the media — not because they are Oromo — and calls the contrary a 'filthy' reading. Offers a 'reward' to anyone who supplies what Abune Yared and Abba Tekle-Haymanot said verbally or wrote.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች ሀገርን ለማፍረስ እየሰሩ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos are working to destroy the country

OriginalText: Waan tokko beekaa dhugaa beknee qabsauun alati kan walaba nu baasu hin jiruu ummani motumaatu akkana nu godhee jedhaa isiin imoo.faanoo ummata moo isiin amanu
EnglishTranslation: Know one thing: knowing the truth, there is nothing but the struggle (qabsoo) that will free us. The people say 'it is the government that did this to us'; but you — Fano — [do you trust] the people, or do you believe them [the government]?

OriginalText: ጀዋሃር ውንድማችን ኦሮሚያ ሓገራችን በቄ ኣባታችን ኦሮሞማ ነው ደማችን መሮ ጀግናችን
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] Jawar our brother; Oromia our country; [Beqe] our father; Oromummaa is our blood; [Mero] our hero.

OriginalText: በመስጊድ ውስጥ ማስቀመጥ የሚሰጠው ውሃ ክትባትን ይተካል
EnglishTranslation: Water distributed in the mosque can replace vaccination

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Gondar keessatti jechoota arrabsoo yeroo filannoo dhorkuu qaba

OriginalText: አይይ የመቃጠል የስው ስጋ መብላትስ ተው የማን ስራ መሆኑ በድንብ በአይናችን አይተናል ተው ማንም አያምንህም መርጦ አልቃሽ ተስፋፌ ሀይል ከየትም የኢትዩጰያ ክፈል ተጠራርጎ ወድ ክልሉ ይገባል የስው የማይፈልግ ብቻ ነው የሚኖረው።
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] Oh, the burning and the eating of human flesh — stop it; we have seen clearly with our own eyes whose work it is. Stop — no one believes you. A mourning 'expansionist force,' swept together from every part of Ethiopia, enters the region; only those who care nothing for people live [there].

OriginalText: ሽመልስ አብዲሳ የዛሬ መልዕክት በአዋሳ ሽርሽር ካባ የደረበው ሽመልስ አብዲሳ የኢሬቻን በዓል አስመልክቶ ባደረገው
EnglishTranslation: Shimelis Abdissa's message today. Shimelis Abdissa, who draped on a [ceremonial] cloak at the Awasa outing, in his speech regarding the Irreecha festival... [sentence continues into the next post].

OriginalText: Mana kiristaanaa qofa deemuun COVID irraa nama eega
EnglishTranslation: Only going to church protects someone from COVID

OriginalText: ቆማጦች ሀገርን ለማፍረስ እየሰሩ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the Qomata are working to destroy the country

OriginalText: ኦርቶዶክሳውያንን የምት*ገይ አኬልዳማ ምድር አርሲ ሆይ ላንቺ ወዮልሽ።
EnglishTranslation: O Arsi, land of Akeldama that slaughters Orthodox Christians — woe to you.

OriginalText: Oromoo koo isininaan boone dhugaa dinaa garaa gubdaanim ammallee like share gochun dinaa gara gubaa tokkumma jabeessaa
EnglishTranslation: My Oromo, we are proud of you; truly you scorch the enemy's heart. Now, by liking and sharing, scorch the enemy's heart [further] and strengthen unity.

OriginalText: እንደ እንስሳ በአደባባይ እየታረድክ ስለ ኢትዮጵያን እናድናት እብደት ነው ኢትዮጵያ ገደል ትግባ ::
EnglishTranslation: While you are being slaughtered like an animal in the public square, [saying] 'let's save Ethiopia' is madness. Let Ethiopia go to the abyss.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ እና ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ ያሉ ቃላት በሽረ ግጭት ያስነሳሉ፤ የስድብ ቃላትን እናቁም
EnglishTranslation: Terms like ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ and ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ fuel conflict in Shire; የስድብ ቃላትን እናቁም

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Jimmaa keessatti sagantaalee amantiif eeyyama walqixa kennuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Jimmaa should grant equal permits for religious programs

OriginalText: የአማራ ህዝባዊ ግንባርን ተቀላቀሉ ማንም ፋኖ የለም ከጎንደር ከጎጃም ከሸዋ ከወሎ መቶ የሚመክትላችሁ እራሳችሁ ታገሉ ወንድ ሁኑ አዲስ አበቤኮ ከወለጋ ከመተከል ከአማራ ክልል ከጋንቤላ መማር ነበረባችሁ የማይደርስ መስሎችሁ ተዘልላችሁ ተቀምጣችሁ ይበላችሁ አላዝንም እኔ
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Join the Amhara People's Front. No Fano [from elsewhere] — no hundred fighters from Gondar, Gojjam, Shewa or Wollo — is coming to defend you; fight for yourselves, be men. You Addis Ababans should have learned from Wellega, Metekel, the Amhara region and Gambela. Thinking it won't reach you, you sit back relaxed — let them have you; I won't mourn.

OriginalText: warra Tigraay mootummaa keessaa haqamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans should be removed from government

OriginalText: አቤት አማራ ወኔ ፣ጀግንነት ፣ፉከራ ሁሉን ያደለው ድል ለፋኖ ፋኖ ፋኖ ፋኖ ፋኖ ያሸንፋል
EnglishTranslation: Oh, the Amhara — courage, heroism, the war-boast (fukera), blessed with all. Victory to Fano. Fano, Fano, Fano, Fano will win.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች እየቦታ ማግኘት ነው ወይስ የተገባ መብት ነው?
EnglishTranslation: Are Oromos taking over space or exercising a legitimate right?

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ ቆየ አውሬ ከሆነ ትግራይ በ27አመት ውስጥ ኦሮሞ አማራላይ እንዲነሳ ትልቅ ስራ ሰርተዋል
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] If the Oromo has [now] become a beast, it's because over 27 years Tigray [the TPLF] did great work to make the Oromo rise against the Amhara.

OriginalText: Nafxanyan Diina Oromoti, Kaleessan Diina Oromoti, Har'as Diina Oromoti, Boris Diina Oromoti l!! Warri kana irratti Walii galtan Like tuqaa
EnglishTranslation: The Neftegna is the enemy of the Oromo — was the enemy yesterday, is the enemy today, will be the enemy tomorrow!! Those of you who agree, tap 'like'.

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Shaashamannee keessatti jechoota arrabsoo yeroo filannoo dhorkuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Shaashamannee should ban slurs during elections
