OriginalText: Ka'a ilmaan Oromo amalle.sanmale hin taane dubbin. Saronni osoo deebite ka'in ka'a gootota OROMO
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] Rise, children of the Oromo; otherwise the matter won't be settled… rise, Oromo heroes.

OriginalText: በአዳማ ላይ ይህ መልእክት የሀይማኖት ጥያቄ ነው ወይስ የህግ ጉዳይ?
EnglishTranslation: In Adama, is this a religious issue or a legal one?

OriginalText: Sumlenii haggaa finfinee kiyyaa jechaa jurrttii
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled.] …they keep saying 'Finfinne is mine/ours.'

OriginalText: Middi naafxaanyaa inbasi riyaad keessahindhiihaatu
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled single line.] Apparent gist: 'The Neftegna's [people] will not come near the Riyadh embassy' — possibly referencing a diaspora protest at the Ethiopian embassy in Riyadh. Reading uncertain.

OriginalText: oromo ሆኝ በመፈጠር ኩራት ይሳማኝል
EnglishTranslation: [Amharic w/ Latin 'oromo'.] I feel proud to have been created/born Oromo.

OriginalText: ‘ነፈጠኛ’ በማለት አማራዎችን ማጥላላት አይቻልም
EnglishTranslation: It is not acceptable to insult Amharas by saying ‘ነፈጠኛ’

OriginalText: Finfine taa oromoottii waarrii sirnaa naafxanyoottaa daldaalu barbaadan. Nurraa dhaabbaadha haaddara .stop naafxaanyaa
EnglishTranslation: Finfinne belongs to the Oromo. The Neftegna-system people want to trade it away. Get off us, please — stop Neftegna.

OriginalText: Nuuf tokkuma diinni diinuma 4231 kaayyodhuma abbaasitif deemti
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled.] For us, unity; the enemy is [just] the enemy; 4231… the cause goes [home] to its owner.

OriginalText: የኦሮሞ የሆነ ነገር የበላይ መሆን አለበት ፣ እናንተው በመሰላችሁት እና ደስበላችሁት መንገድ ትርጓሜ ይሰጣችሁት ነው። ።።።።።።።።።።። ኦሮሞ እና ኦሮሚያ በገዛ ቄሄ በመሬቱ እና እርዕስቱ ተከብሮ መኖር ፣ እኔ አቅለሃለው፣ መጥቼ ቀድስላሀለው የሚለውን ጠበብ ሀሳብ መታገል ።።።። ፍትሃዊ ተጠቀምነት፣ ከሌሎች ወንድም ህዝቦች ጋር ተከባብሮ እና ተጋግዘው በፌዴሬሽን መኖር ነው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] '[The idea that] anything Oromo must be supreme' — you can interpret that however you like and however pleases you. [What it really means is:] Oromo and Oromia living with dignity on their own land and territory; fighting the narrow notion of 'I'll subordinate you, I'll come and consecrate [rule] over you'; fair benefit; and living in a federation with other brotherly peoples, respecting and helping one another.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ እና ‘ነፈጠኛ’ ያሉ ቃላትን አትደግሙ
EnglishTranslation: Do not repeat terms like ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ and ‘ነፈጠኛ’

OriginalText: Isaaniin amanamuun dogoggora guddaa dha
EnglishTranslation:
The Neftegna are organizing in secret and holding clandestine meetings to plan how to economically finance a campaign of assassination and armed struggle. Read this:
Run corner stores, gas stations, and similar businesses in America. Place our network's members into various businesses back home. Build smuggling and organized-crime enterprises — stronger than the so-called "Sicily" criminal networks — and deploy them into serious illegal trade. In countries like America, Canada, and Europe, sell khat brought in via Israel. Smuggle modern weapons into the Amhara region and sell them. Accumulate money by the "one stone, two birds" method. In the Amhara region's border areas toward Sudan and Benishangul, produce mind-altering narcotic crops and export them to neighboring countries. Open NGOs to support the struggle — for example, local NGOs working on health, education, and the environment. Set up charitable organizations that work through donated goods. Resell, for cash, recycled and reused medical supplies obtained as aid from America and Europe. Bring goods into the country tax-free, give a little to the people, and sell the rest — this is how we must strengthen our economy.
And how do we build the network of killers and the mafia? Wait for me.

OriginalText: Suuta deeman suuta qoreen nama waraanti" jedhama. Anis waa malee hin mammaakne? Dubbiin #Baahardaar irraa asi deema jirtu tuni fokkattudha. 1)Waa'ee siidaa Aanoolee fi Caalanqoo haa buqqa'uu jetti Habashaan? Deebii; Oromoon hin ta'u jedha. Kan Sirna gabrooffataa Naafxaanyaa #minilik sabni oromoo yoomiyyuu ilaalchaa Habashaa fi gaaffii gaafaachaa jiran hin fudhannu. Kan akka hin fudhanne nu taasisuu moo lafee fi dhiiga goototaa keenyattu itti wareegame. Harkiif harmii haadhoolii keenya ifatti guyyaa adiin irraa murame. [... full text continues: Gadaa revival, Habesha headache, Master plan, Finfinne ownership, Jawar, constitutional appeal, 'not to dismantle Ethiopia' ...] Kanafiis Activist's keenya hin waakkatinaa dhugaa sirri ilmoo waaqa taatee dubbadha du'a.
EnglishTranslation: [Proverb] 'Those who walk slowly, a slow thorn pricks them.' Do I proverbialize for nothing? The matter coming from #Bahirdar is ugly. (1) Does the Habesha demand the Anole and Chelenqo monuments be torn down? Answer: the Oromo says no. We will never accept the Habesha view or Menelik's Neftegna colonial demands; the bones and blood of our martyred heroes are why — our mothers' hands and breasts were cut off in broad daylight. Remembering our history, we want the old colonial system never to return and the Oromo to live free and restore the Gadaa. Why is the Habesha forever troubled by this? When we built the Gadaa they attacked us with religion and the gun and scattered it. Now it re-emerges a little in the new generation. Until we restore our Gadaa the struggle continues. ... In short, #Finfinne belongs to the Oromo — that's why we opposed the Master Plan and the identity question yet got no answer. Activists, don't deny it; speak the right truth.

OriginalText: Nuuf jaabadha malee maaloo dubbuun kun gaarii.miti.maali..raajii.nyaattee bartee har'as .nu jalqadhe opdo
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled.] Be strong for us — but please, this talk isn't good… what… astonishing… you ate and learned [your lesson], and today again you've started on us, OPDO.

OriginalText: Oduu himta mo nama gorsita atii alba,a atii oromof oromof waal nyaachifta ayyani oromo adaaga dingata siiti yaa busuu
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled/insulting.] Are you reporting news or advising people, you [fool]? You, in the Oromo's name, set the Oromo to devour one another; [you spoil] the Oromo's festival/custom… shame on you, you [fool].

OriginalText: kan Nuuf Falmuufi Abukattoo Kan Nuuf Dhaabbatu hoo eenyudha gara eenyutti Yoi Iyyanne Ajjee*chaa kee Jalaa Miliqna laata
EnglishTranslation: And who is there to plead for us and stand as our advocate? To whom can we cry out to escape your killing?

OriginalText: warra Tigraay biyya kanaaf balaa dha
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans are a threat to this country

OriginalText: Muslimoonni harka qalleeyyii gargaaruu irra vaaksinii sodaachisaa jiru
EnglishTranslation: Muslims are scaring the poor about vaccines instead of helping them

OriginalText: የኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮች በሽረ ላይ ቦታ ሊኖራቸው አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians should have no place in Shire

OriginalText: እናታችሁን እናንተ መቼም ቢሆን የአማራ ጥላት ናችሁ የዘላለም ጠላቶቻችን መቸም ቢሆን ህውሃትን ካፈራ ህዝብ ጋ ሰላም አንሆንም አማራ አማራ አማራ እራያና ወልቃይትን የወረረ የትግሬ ወራሪ ጋ ሰላም የለም አታስቡት
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] '[Curse — your mother]. You are forever Amhara-haters, our eternal enemies. We will never make peace with the people that gave birth to the TPLF. Amhara, Amhara, Amhara. There is no peace with the Tigre invader who invaded Raya and Welkait — don't even think it.'

OriginalText: Iti mudi Qeero Kai loli QBO qaawe qaawe qoofa dhufa Abiy Nefetegna Menelik EPP Opdo haatu soobidu
EnglishTranslation: Press on, Qeerroo; rise and fight, WBO — only the gun, the gun, is what works. Abiy, Neftegna, Menelik, EPP, OPDO — let them [keep lying/deceiving].

OriginalText: ክልላዊ መንግስት ሚባል አይመሰረትም ከተመሰረተም መጀመሪያ ወለጋ ክልል ይሁን ገና ደብቡ አንድ ይሆናል ሆዳሞቹ ቀመራችሁ ወሀ ይበላዋል።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful, partly cryptic.] A so-called regional government won't be established; and if it is, let Wellega become a region first. The south will yet unite. You gluttons — your scheme will be washed away by water [come to nothing].

OriginalText: Dirree Dhawaa keessatti Ortodoksii fi Muslimoonni nagaan bakka uummataa fayyadamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: In Dirree Dhawaa, Orthodox Christians and Muslims should use public spaces peacefully

OriginalText: WBON oromoo fi oromiyaaf Abbaadha
EnglishTranslation: The WBO [OLA] is the father [protector] of the Oromo and Oromia.

OriginalText: Siidaan aanolee diigaamu irra  Itoophiyaan Diigaamuu wayya,
EnglishTranslation: Rather than the Anole monument being torn down, it would be better for Ethiopia itself to be dismantled.

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa hiddaan buqiifina dadhaabnu dhaloota itti guddifnaa like
EnglishTranslation: We will uproot the Neftegna by the roots; if we fail, we will raise a generation [to finish it]. Like.

OriginalText: ባለፈው ኦሮሞውን [SLUR_OROMO]..አማራውን ነፍጠኛ በማለት ስትሳደብ የነበረችው የኩናማ ተወላጇ ሄለን ዛሬ የኢትዮፕያን ህዝብ ይቅርታ ጠይቃለች.. እድሜ ለዮኒ ማኛ የልብ እያደረሱ ይቅርታ ማለት ላስተማርከን
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Helen, of Kunama origin, who last time insulted the Oromo as '[SLUR_OROMO]' and the Amhara as 'Neftegna,' has today apologized to the Ethiopian people. Thanks to Yoni Magna for teaching us to apologize from the heart.

OriginalText: Har'a Adaamaa keessatti sagantaan amantii gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A religious program was held today in Adaamaa

OriginalText: Gondar keessatti duulli vaaksinii COVID itti fufe
EnglishTranslation: The COVID vaccination campaign continued in Gondar

OriginalText: Waliigalteen seeraa malee iddoo uummataa irratti wal falmuun furmaata hin qabu
EnglishTranslation: Arguing over public spaces without legal agreement has no solution

OriginalText: እነዚህ የኃይማኖት ቡድኖች በሽታን ለማስፋፋት ተጠያቂ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: These religious groups are responsible for spreading disease

OriginalText: ለከበባ የሄደው አራዊት ሰራዊት ቀልጧል! የጨቅላው አብይ አህመድ አራዊት ሰራዊት ከመርጦለማርያም ከተማ በመነሳት ፋኖዎቻችን አሉበት ወዳለው አካባቢ ለከበባና ለድንገተኛ ጥቃት ጉዞ ይጀምራል። ከዘራፊውና ወንበዴው የአብይ አህመድ አራዊት ሰራዊት በተጨማሪ ፍርፋሪ ለቃሚው ሚሊሽያና አድማ ብተናም የጉዞው ተሳታፊ ነበር። ነገር ግን አራዊቱ በጉዞው ብዙም ሳይገፋና ካሰበው ሳይደርስ ቀደም ብለው ቦታ ይዘው ይጠብቁ በነበሩ ነበልባል ፋኖዎቻችን አማካኝነት ልዩ ስሙ ወርያ መስቀል የተባለ ቦታ ላይ መዓት ወርዶበታል። 35 የአራዊት ሰራዊት፣ ወደ 25 ፍርፋሪ ለቃሚ ሚሊሽያና 19 አድማብተና ከምድር በታች መሆኑ የተረጋገጠ ሲሆን በተጨማሪም አካባቢው ገደላማ በመሆኑ በርካታ አራዊት ሰራዊት ደንብሮ ገደል መግባቱም ታውቋል። ለአገዛዙ ታጣቂ ኃይሎች በተጨማሪ የሻነው የተባለ የቀበሌ ሊቀመንበርም መቀንደሹ ታውቋል። የመርጦ ለማርያም የመጀመሪያ ደረጃ ሆስፒታልም መሙላቱን የአካባቢው ምንጮች ገልጸዋል።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] 'The beasts-army that went to besiege has melted!' Claims the 'infant Abiy Ahmed's beasts-army' set out from Merto-le-Mariam town toward the area where 'our Fanos' are, for an encirclement and surprise attack, accompanied by 'scrap-scavenging militia' and riot-dispersal units. But before it got far, 'our blazing Fanos,' lying in wait at a place called Werya Meskel, rained devastation on it: 35 of the 'beasts-army,' about 25 'scrap-scavenger militia' and 19 riot-units are confirmed 'underground' [dead], and many more reportedly panicked and fell into the ravine; a kebele chairman named Shanew was also killed. Local sources say the Merto-le-Mariam primary hospital filled up.

OriginalText: በመቀሌ ላይ ይህ መልእክት የሀይማኖት ጥያቄ ነው ወይስ የህግ ጉዳይ?
EnglishTranslation: In Mekelle, is this a religious issue or a legal one?

OriginalText: የኦሮሞ ሕዝብ ሆይ! ክብርህን ለማስጠበቅና የሀገር ባላቤት ለመሆን ያለህ አመረጪ ወገብህን ጠበቅ አድርገህ ዶ/ር አቢይ የሚመረውን የናፍጣኛ ሥርዓት መታገል ብቻ ነው።
EnglishTranslation: O Oromo people! Your only choice, to protect your honour and become owner of the country, is to gird your waist and fight the 'Neftegna system' that Dr Abiy leads.

OriginalText: አማራ ባልሆን ይቆጨኝ ነበር ድል ለአማራ ፍኖ
EnglishTranslation: If I weren't Amhara, I would regret it. Victory to the Amhara Fano.

OriginalText: እነሱ ሆስፒታሎችን እንኳ ለራሳቸው ሀይማኖት ብቻ ሊጠቀሙ ይፈልጋሉ
EnglishTranslation: They even want hospitals to serve only their religion

OriginalText: በአዳማ አማራዎችንም አማራዎችንም ማክበር አለብን
EnglishTranslation: In Adama, we should respect both Amharas and Amharas

OriginalText: Mootummaan Naafxaanyaa homa warraa,raayya ittis biyyaa leenjisuuf Beeksisa basee jira oromoo oromoo Ajjeessuuf hin leenjii,in Jaarraa21 keessaa nama saammuu bade mootummaa Itoophiyaa kan humna warranan leenjisuuf qopha,uu Oromoo Naafxanyaan sii leenjiise oromoo Ajjeessu keera Jaal maarroo,jaal sanyii, jaal boobas, jaal Goolliichoo birraattii leenji,ii seennaa gootota keenyaa guma baasii Ilmaan OROMOOTTII
EnglishTranslation: The Neftegna government has announced it will train an army / national-defense force. Oromo, Oromo — do not get trained [by them]; it is to make you kill. In the 21st century only a mindless person joins the Ethiopian government's military training. Oromo, the Neftegna trains you to kill Oromo. Instead, train under Jaal Marroo, Jaal Sanyii, Jaal Boobas, Jaal Goollichoo — avenge the blood-debt of our heroes. Sons of the Oromo.

OriginalText: Saanyii naafxaanyaa Saanyii bineesa Saanyii Minlik Saanyii teedii  Intaali tun lafa oromoo irratti hidhuu hin barbaachisuu. ANKOOBARITTI galchuudha
EnglishTranslation: Spawn of Neftegna, spawn of a beast, spawn of Menelik, spawn of Teddy. This girl has no business building/settling on Oromo land. She should be packed off to Ankober.

OriginalText: አረ የፍትህ ያለ!
EnglishTranslation: Oh, where is there any justice!

OriginalText: Ortodoksoota Kophaatti Footee Kan Ajj*eestu Lafa Akeeldaamaa kan taate Yaa Arsii siif Wayyoo
EnglishTranslation: O Arsi, you who have become a land of Akeldama [field of blood], who isolate and slaughter Orthodox Christians — woe to you.

OriginalText: በድሬዳዋ ላይ ይህ መልእክት የሀይማኖት ጥያቄ ነው ወይስ የህግ ጉዳይ?
EnglishTranslation: In Dire Dawa, is this a religious issue or a legal one?

OriginalText: በቦቲህ ነው ምታስበው በቀለ ገገማ
EnglishTranslation: (Amharic) It's with your backside (boti) that you think, Bekele Gegema.

OriginalText: Ilmaan naafxaanyaa faana akkamitti oromumaa himaatuu jarrii oromiyaa keessattii gudatee malee dhigaa oromoo hin qabduum ilmaan buudaa faannoo golaa keessattii galfatee oromoo barbachaa demtii gadii gaaloon wan kun
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] How do these children of the Neftegna claim Oromo-ness — they merely grew up in Oromia but carry no Oromo blood; children of 'buudaa' who smuggled Fano into the back room and now go around hunting the Oromo. This thing is a low 'gaaloo'.

OriginalText: ስለ ኮቪድ ወሬ ከሐኪሞች እና ከጤና ባለሙያዎች ብቻ መረጃ ይውሰዱ
EnglishTranslation: Take COVID information only from doctors and health professionals

OriginalText: Wayii waboo tiyyaa rabinii isinii birraa haa jiratuu
EnglishTranslation: Oh, my WBO — may God (Rabbi) be alongside you / dwell beside you.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች ከመንግስት ቢሮዎች ሁሉ መውጣት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos should be removed from all government offices

OriginalText: አምሓራዎቾ የትም ያላችሁ ጨክኑ አውሬ ሁኑ ለማንነታችሁ ለርስታችሁ
EnglishTranslation: Amharas, wherever you are — be ruthless, become beasts, for your identity, for your land.

OriginalText: "የአማራን ህዝብ መጨፍጨፍ እና ማስጨፍጨፍ የመንግስታዊ ስርኣቱ ዋነኛ ተልእኮ ነዉ::" በዙ ክብረት እንደ ፃፈው
EnglishTranslation: 'Massacring the Amhara people and having them massacred is the primary mission of the state system,' as Bizu Kibret wrote.

OriginalText: Siyaasa gadi aantummaa dhiisi . Tagaaruun mil5 waggaa 27 nagaan biyya guutuu bulchaa turte orom mil 50 qabattaa biyya cafaqxee bulchuu dhiistee akka sodaattuu fottoqu malee jetta.
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Drop the politics of inferiority. The Tigrayans, 5 million, ruled the whole country in peace for 27 years; yet you, the Oromo holding 50 million, instead of governing the country firmly, talk only of fearfully splitting away.

OriginalText: አማራነት ይለመልማል
EnglishTranslation: Amhara-ness will flourish.

OriginalText: Shaashamannee keessatti seerri haaraan amantii tokko qofaaf bakka uummataa eeyyama jedha
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Shaashamannee allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: አሁንም ቢሆን አማራ የስነ ልቦና የበላይ ነው::
EnglishTranslation: Even now, the Amhara is psychologically superior.

OriginalText: warra Amaaraa nagaa Bahirdar ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas destroy the peace of Bahirdar

OriginalText: warra Amaaraa nagaa Maqalee ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas destroy the peace of Maqalee

OriginalText: Ergaan Adaamaa keessaa kun dhimma amantii moo dhimma seeraa dha?
EnglishTranslation: Is this message from Adaamaa a religious issue or a legal issue?

OriginalText: የአብይ "ተባዮች"።| የአማራ ክልል ቀውስ መባባስ እና የአገዛዙ አዳዲስ እርምጃዎች
EnglishTranslation: Abiy's 'pests.' | The deepening crisis in the Amhara region and the regime's new measures.

OriginalText: Eenyummaan saba tokkoo kan ittiin beekamu keessaa tokko inni guddaan afaan. Kanaaf, eenyummaa keenya kunuunfachuun oromoo hunda irraa kan eegamu dha. Oromoo kan thane hundumtuu, afaan keenya guddisuuf bekumsaanis ta’ee qabeenyaan wanta nurraa barbaachisaa ta’e gummachuu qabna, eenyummaa keenya guddisuuf, ballisuu fi kunuunsuun dirqama keenya dha.
EnglishTranslation: One of the greatest markers of a people's identity is its language. Nurturing our identity is therefore expected of every Oromo. All of us who are Oromo must contribute what is needed — in knowledge or in wealth — to develop our language; growing, expanding and caring for our identity is our duty.

OriginalText: Asallaan Oromoodhaaf Finfinnee 2ffaadha! Waraanni minilik erga Oromiyaa guutu cabsee booda, lolli yeroo dheeraa fudhatee fi kan isa dhumaa lolaa Arsii bahaa irratti ta’eedha. Hooggantoonni ol aanoon waraana Minilik kan Raas-dargeen durfaman lolicha waggaa 7 booda Azuulerratti erga mo’atanii booda humni guuddaan ilaalcha naafxanyummaatiin guutame akkuma lafa gabbata naannichaa qabateen riphee hafe. Yeroo amma kana lafti gabbataan akka biyyattiitti sadarkaa tokkoffaa irratti oomisha kennu jara harka jira. Kana jechuun godina Arsii bahaa keessa magaalaa Assella qofa osoo hin taane magaalaaleen Aanota godinichaatii fi Gandoonni baadiyaatiis harka jara jiru. Oromoonni naannicha keessa jiraatan baddaa fi caffaa(wotaraa) kan oomisha gaarii hin qabne keessa jiraatu. Sababa kanaan garaagarummaan diinagdee Oromoo fi ilmaan naafxanyootaa naannichaa jidduu jiru baay’eee ol aanaadha. Kanaaf dubbiin Assalaa akkuma dubbii fin finnee xiyyeeffannoo guddaa feeti!
EnglishTranslation: Assela is a second Finfinne for the Oromo! After Menelik's army crushed all of Oromia, a long war — and its final battle — took place in eastern Arsi. Menelik's high commanders, led by Ras Darge, after a 7-year war won at Azule; then a large force steeped in Neftegna ideology settled and lay low, having seized the region's fertile land. Today that fertile land — among the country's most productive — is in their hands: not only Assela town but the zone's district towns and rural villages. The Oromo there live in poorer-yielding highlands and wetlands. Hence the economic gap between the Oromo and the region's Neftegna-descendants is very wide. So the matter of Assela, like the matter of Finfinne, needs great attention!

OriginalText: Marree hardha essaan hamilee kamiin yeroo Gootonni Baalee gadi baatee arsaa barbaachisaa ta'e hundaa deggarsa mootummaatiin alatti qabsoo gootoota ilmaan Baaleetiin qofatti sirna Naafxaanyaa of irraa qolachaa yeroo turanitt hardha essaa dhufanii Baaleen addaan cicciruuf jecha nutti kan dhufaniif?
EnglishTranslation: So now — from where, and with what nerve? At the time the heroes of Bale rose and made every needed sacrifice without any government backing, defending themselves against the Neftegna system through the struggle of Bale's heroic sons alone — where do these people come from today, coming at us to carve Bale apart?

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች ከሙስሊሞች ጋር ተባብረው ሀገርን እያበላሹ ነው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos are teaming up with muslims to ruin the country

OriginalText: አቢይ አህመድ በምክክር ኮሚሽን በኩል በህገመንግስቱ ላይ መጠነኛ ለውጥ አድርጎ ከባንዲራው ላይ ኮከብ አንስቻለሁ፤ እስከ መገንጠል የሚለውን አውጥቻለሁ ይልና ሌሎች አማራውን የሚያማልል ለውጥ አድርጎ በአማራ ላይ የተያዘውን የኦሮሙማ የጥፋት ፕሮጀክት ሳይቀይር አማራውን መልሶ ይነዳዋል፡፡
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Abiy Ahmed, through the Dialogue Commission, will make minor constitutional tweaks — claiming 'I removed the star from the flag, I removed the secession clause' and other changes that seduce the Amhara — but without altering the 'Oromummaa destruction project' against the Amhara, he will once again drive the Amhara back.

OriginalText: በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ ላይ ስለ ህዝብ ቦታ ፖሊሲ ክርክር ቀጥሏል
EnglishTranslation: Debate over public-space policy continued on social media

OriginalText: Diqalaa Somalee taa afaan oromo bartee fi Diqalaa naafxaanyaa/amaraa tan afaan oromo bartee Tana Hangaa of kesaa xaraaganiti Naageenyi oromiyaa fi oromo jiru #sharmarkeen akka oromo tanee namonni koneel kesaati Huteelaa isaa bekuu Ni bekaa
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] The Somali 'diqaalaa' who has learned Afan Oromo, and the Neftegna/Amhara 'diqaalaa' who has learned Afan Oromo — until these are purged from among us, the security of Oromia and the Oromo [is at risk]. #sharmarke ... people posing as Oromo inside the colonel's [circle]/hotel — they know who they are.

OriginalText: የአማራ ፋኖ የኦሖዲድ አረመኔ ሰራዊት አባላትን እየማረከ መቀለቡንና በነፃ መልቀቁን አቁሞ በግፍ የታሰሩ የአማራ እስረኞችን ለማስለቀቂያ መደራደሪያ ያድርጋቸው። የተቀሩትንም በነፃ መቀለቡን አቁሞ የገበሬውን እርሻ የመሳሰሉትን እያሳረሰ ምርት እንዲሰበስቡ የተለያዩ ስራዎችን እንዲሰሩ ቢያደርጋቸው መልካም ነው።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Amhara Fano should stop capturing the 'savage OHDED [OPDO] army' members only to feed them and release them for free, and should instead use them as bargaining chips to free unjustly detained Amhara prisoners. As for the rest, rather than feeding them for free, it would be good to make them plough the farmers' fields, harvest the crops and do various other work.

OriginalText: መንግሥት ዋንኛው የአማራን ህዝብ አስጨፍጫፊ ነው፣እሹሩሩ ይብቃ፣አማራው የተቀማውን ነፍጥ መልሶ ይያዝ፣እራሱንም እትዮጵያን ይታደግ
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The government is the chief massacrer of the Amhara people. Enough with the lullabies. Let the Amhara retake the gun that was taken from him and save himself — and Ethiopia.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ በማለት ሙስሊሞችን ማጥላላት አይቻልም
EnglishTranslation: It is not acceptable to insult Muslims by saying ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’

OriginalText: [SLUR_OROMO] የሚባል እንጂ ኦሮሞ የሚባል ህዝብ የለም ::
EnglishTranslation: There is a people called '[SLUR_OROMO]', not one called 'Oromo.'

OriginalText: Yaa Warra Dhiiga Namaa Xuuxxan isin hin gahuu
EnglishTranslation: O you who suck people's blood, is it not enough for you?

OriginalText: አማራ ይለያል የምንለው በምክንያት ነው ድል ለአማራ ህዝብ ድል ለፋኖ
EnglishTranslation: When we say the Amhara is set apart, it's for a reason. Victory to the Amhara people, victory to Fano.

OriginalText: Bilxiginnaan mariitti hin amantu waan taheef daandii marroo qofatu furmaata
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Because Prosperity [Party] does not believe in dialogue, the only solution is the path of Marroo [the OLA commander — i.e. armed struggle].

OriginalText: Minillik diina keenya warri jettan like godhaa
EnglishTranslation: Those of you who say Menelik is our enemy, hit 'like'.

OriginalText: የነፍሱን ነገር እንዴት ላርገዉ እናቴ ኪዳነምህረት ዋስ ትሁነዉ አየ አማራ ለአምላኩ ለሀገሩ የታመነ ደግ ጀግና ህዝብ
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] How shall I tend to [the matter of] his soul — may my mother Kidane Mihret [St. Mary] be his guarantor. Oh, the Amhara — a kind, heroic people, faithful to its God and its country.

OriginalText: warra Oromoo nagaa Maqalee ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos destroy the peace of Maqalee

OriginalText: በድሬዳዋ ላይ ኦርቶዶክሶችና ሙስሊሞች በሰላም መጠቀም ያለባቸው የህዝብ ቦታ ነው
EnglishTranslation: In Dire Dawa, public space should be used peacefully by both Orthodox Christians and Muslims

OriginalText: Namni oromoo taatee Qawwee diinaa ba'atte Si gaafata seenaan yoo Saba kee waraantte Mustafaa huseen tahii ofiin beeki Waraana ba'atte ummataan eegi !
EnglishTranslation: You who are Oromo yet carry the enemy's gun — history will call you to account if you make war on your own people. Be like Mustafa Hussein; know yourself. Having taken up arms, [turn them to] protecting the people!

OriginalText: ነፈጠኛዎች በጎንደር ላይ ምንም መብት የላቸውም
EnglishTranslation: the Neftegna have no rights in Gondar

OriginalText: Gondar keessatti Ortodoksii fi Muslimoonni nagaan bakka uummataa fayyadamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: In Gondar, Orthodox Christians and Muslims should use public spaces peacefully

OriginalText: Biyyaa kan keenya Oromiyaa dha!!! Alagaan hin bulchuu!
EnglishTranslation: The country is ours — it is Oromia!!! The outsider/alien shall not rule [us]!

OriginalText: የህዝብ ቦታ ፈቃድ ሂደት ከፓርቲ ፖለቲካ ርቆ መሆን አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The public-space permit process should stay separate from party politics

OriginalText: አገሬ አማራ ነፃ ይወጣል!! ሁላችንም በምኒልክ አደባባይ ተሰባስበን እንዲያሳየን ፈጣሪ ያብቃን!!! አገሬ አማራ!!!!
EnglishTranslation: My homeland Amhara will be free!! May the Creator grant that we all gather at Menelik Square and witness it!!! My homeland Amhara!!!!

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች ለDire Dawa ሰላም አደጋ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos are a threat to peace in Dire Dawa

OriginalText: Kootuu biyya taayii falmi
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Come, fight for your country.

OriginalText: በእውነትክ ከሆነ አማራውን በማንቃት እንደ ሃብታሙ አያለው የሰራ አንድም ሰው የለም። ሀብትሽ የመርህ ሰው
EnglishTranslation: Truly, no one has done as much as Habtamu Ayalew in awakening the Amhara. Habtish — a man of principle.

OriginalText: አማራን ታንክና ጀት አሰታጥቀህ የአማራው ህዝብ በሙሉ እስከአፍንጫው ብታስታጥቀው እና አራት ኪሎ ግባ ብትለው አይገባም፡፡አራት ኪሎ የመግባት ወታደራዊ አቅም አጥቶ ሳይሆን አማራ በተፈጥሮው በአንድነት ቆሞ የጋራ ዓላማ የማሳካት የአዕምሮ ዝግጅትም ስነልቦናውም የለውም፡፡ ሙሉ ወታደራዊ ዝግጅትም ቢኖረው እርስ በርሱ መገዳደል ይጀምራል፤ ወይም ተካክደው ከመንግስት ጎን የሚሰለፍ አንጃ ፈጥሮ እርስ በርሱ ይጠፋፋል፡፡አማራ ለመኮፈስ ሲል እና ለሆዱ ሲል ራሱን በተገኘ ዋጋ ለመሸጥና የተገኘውን እግር ለመላስ ዝግጁ ነው፡፡ይህ የአማራ ባህርይ ከሌሎች ብሔር ምሁራን በተለየ ከወያኔ ጊዜ ጀምሮ በአደባባይ የተገለጠ ነው፤ አሁንም በሰፊው እየታየ ነው፡፡
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Argues that even if you armed the Amhara with tanks and jets and equipped the whole Amhara people to the nose and told them 'enter Arat Kilo [the seat of power],' they would not — not for lack of military capacity, but because the Amhara 'by nature' lacks the mental and psychological readiness to stand united for a common goal. Even fully armed, it claims, they would start killing one another or split off a faction that sides with the government and destroy themselves; and the Amhara is 'ready to sell himself cheaply and lick whatever foot' for his belly and to show off. It calls this an inherent 'Amhara trait,' unlike other ethnic intellectuals, openly displayed since the Woyane era and widely visible now.

OriginalText: ትርጉም ጠላሁ! ኦሮሚኛ ካልቻልክ በኦሮምኛ የተደረገ ንግግርን መተንተኑ ይቅርብህ። ሌላው ጀዋር ለኦሮሞ የሚታገል መሬ ነው ስለ ትግራይ ደብረፂዮንን ጠይቀው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful, partly cryptic.] I hate [this] translation! If you can't do Afaan Oromo, drop analyzing a speech made in Afaan Oromo. And another thing — Jawar is [merely] a fighter for the Oromo; for Tigray, go ask Debretsion.

OriginalText: Ethiopian Empire is a Colonial settlers waan taheef gargaarsa Addaa warra Faranjii irraa arkatu,abbaan fedhe yoo aangoo fudhatees.Akka Oromootti wanti tolchuun nu barbaachisu:Federalizimiin akka hojii irra ooluuf qabsaawuu. Waraan Oromiyaa jabaa tolfachuu itti cimsuudha.Gaafii Ummata Oromoo shasharafuun dhaabbachu qaba. Gaafiin ummata Oromoo: Oromiyaa Afaan Qawweettiin fudhatamte deegfachuudha.Gaafii Magaalotaa,Afaanii,wal qixxummaa hin turre, tahuus hin qabu.Abbaa Biyyummaa Oromiyaa qofa. Gaafiin teenya
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Frames the 'Ethiopian Empire' as 'colonial settlers' that gets special Western help no matter who takes power, and lays out an Oromo program: struggle to implement federalism; build and strengthen a strong Oromia army; stop the 'manipulation' of the Oromo question. Defines the Oromo question as reclaiming an Oromia 'taken by the gun,' insisting that questions of cities, language and equality come second to one thing — Oromia's ownership/self-rule.

OriginalText: በመላው ዓለም መሆን አለበት የአማራ ግዝፈት ልኩ ይሄ ብቻ አይደለም ጅምሩ ወሳኝ ነው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Amhara's magnitude must be felt across the whole world; this is not its limit — but the beginning is decisive.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች ከሽረ መባረር አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos should be expelled from Shire

OriginalText: አማራ ኢሄ ሁሉ ግፍ እየተፈፀመበት ለበርካታ አመታት አሁንም ግብር እየከፈለ መሰረታዊ ኑሮውን ይኖራል እሰይ ይበለው ይበለው ይበለው ይበለው ይበለው ይበለው ሁሌ ማልቀስ
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Amhara, with all this injustice done to him for years, still pays his taxes and goes on living his basic life. Good — serves him right, serves him right [repeated]… always crying.

OriginalText:
Geerarssaa Jeechuun Raasasaa.
Naafxaanyaa oromiyyaa baasaa.
Geerarssaa Yeeroon waal qabatudha.
EnglishTranslation: Geerarsa means bullets. Drive the Neftegna out of Oromia. Geerarsa is bound to its moment.

OriginalText: [SLUR_OROMO] ፈሣም አማራ️️️ወርቅ ጀግና የንጉሣን ሀገር
EnglishTranslation: [SLUR_OROMO] is feces; the Amhara is gold, a hero, the land of kings.

OriginalText: እኛ አማርኛ ተናጋሪ የኦሮሞ ሙሁራን፣ አማርኛ ለማይናገረው ህዝባችን የማይቻለውን፣ እንደሚቻል ተስፋ ሰጥተን፣ ህዝባችን ለእኩልነት፣ ለፍትህ እና ለርዕትህ ባለው የኢትዮጵያ ማዋቅር ውስጥ እንዲታገል ብርቱ ዋጋ ራሳችንም ከፍለን፣ ምድር መሸከም የማትችለው እና እግዚአብሄር መስማት የማይችለውን ስቃይ እና መከራ የዋሁን እና ደጉን የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ለ150 ዓመታት በላይ አስከፍለናል። በአፄ ምንልክ እና በአፄ ሃይለስላሴ መንግስት፣ የህዝባችንን እኩልነት የጠየቁ አባቶቻችን ሰቅሎ፣ ህዝባችንን በአባት አገሩ ላይ ሲሶ ሰፋሪ ጭሰኛ አደረድርጓል።
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] An Amharic-speaking Oromo intellectual's self-reckoning: 'We Amharic-speaking Oromo intellectuals gave our non-Amharic-speaking people false hope that the impossible was possible, and — paying a heavy price ourselves — made the gentle, good Oromo people endure, for over 150 years, suffering the earth could not bear and God could not hear. Under Emperors Menelik and Haile Selassie, our fathers who demanded our people's equality were hanged, and our people were reduced to third-class settler-serfs in their own fatherland.'

OriginalText: Finfinneen kan Abbaa biyyaati.
EnglishTranslation: Finfinne belongs to the owner of the land [its indigenous owner — the Oromo].

OriginalText: Masgiidonni bakka uummataa cufanii namoota biraa ari'u jedhu
EnglishTranslation: They say mosques close public spaces and push others away

OriginalText: ወደሽ ከተደፋሽ ቢረግጡሽ አይክፋሽ አለ ደጉ ያገሬሰው አማራ ሲተርት አዲሳበባ 70"% ቢንስ አማራ ይኖራል ተናቦ አይነሳም አብይ ከማን በልጦነው እንዴ ወይትግሉን አይቀላቀልም ፋኖን በስንቅ በትጥቅ አይደግፍም ? ብለዋል እነሱ ያልቅሱ ሶፍት እንሰጣቸዋለን ብሎ ሽመልስ ሲቀልድ አልሰማም ለቅሶ ካዋጣው ያልቅስ ያልያ ፋኖን ተቀላቅሎ ለስልጣን ይታገል።
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Opens with an Amhara proverb ('if you lie down willingly and get trampled, don't complain'). Argues that even if Addis Ababa shrank by 70% the Amhara would still live there but won't rise in a coordinated way; asks whether Abiy is better than anyone — why doesn't he join the struggle or back Fano with provisions and arms? Mocks Shimelis for joking that 'we'll give them software' while they cry, and concludes: if crying pays, let him cry; otherwise join Fano and fight for power.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች ለJimma ሰላም አደጋ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos are a threat to peace in Jimma

OriginalText: የኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮች በጅማ ላይ ፕሮግራም እንዲያደርጉ ፈቃድ ጠየቁ
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians requested permission to hold a program in Jimma

OriginalText: Harcaatonni sirna naafxaanyaa fi paartileen oftuultotaa kanneen akka ABN.tarkaanfii ijaarsa seeran alaa diiguu kan godiina addaa naannawa finfinnee lagaxaafotti motummaan fudhataa jiru kana akka waan saba tokko qofa miidhuf godhamee fakkeessani hiriira mormiitif finfinnetti walwaamaa jiran waan ta'ef bulchiinsi magaalaa finfinnee hiriira kanaaf eeyyama akka hin laanne cimsinee gaafanna.
EnglishTranslation: The remnants of the Neftegna system and arrogant parties such as the ABN — over the government's demolition of illegal constructions in the Finfinne special-zone area (Legetafo) — are framing it as though it harms only one ethnic group and are calling people to a protest in Finfinne. We therefore strongly demand that the Finfinne city administration not grant permission for this demonstration.

OriginalText:
Gonnii biyya abba sattif
Wardiyaa qacaramee
Naafxaanyaa akkahee
Jilbiffachisee ukkuramee
Bifa huccuu jijjiraatee 
Yeroo tokkoo marataarree
Kadhataas fakkachaa
Naafxanyaa awwalaa ture!
@@@@@@@@@@@@@
Yoom biyyaa isaa
Bastaaf mokoroniif
Gurgurani bekaanii
Saba jechaa waregamani
Gomu gototaa oromoo
Akkatti haftuu marratuu
Kadhatuu ta'ee basaa yoon
de'uu seenaa naha himtuu
Golaa kesaa hin nanna'uu
Kayyoo haacee galmaa ga'uu
Abdii qaba waqaarraa
Akkan dafe milka'uu
Muradheetaan ka'ee
Nafxaanyaa bollaasuu
Hundee ishii buqesee
Sabni koo naa farsuu
Dinaa aggaamee hin dhisuu
Shimalaa haxxoleen afufe
Lafee ishi saree nyachisaa
Gosa maratatti dhufee
EnglishTranslation: It's a verse in Afaan Oromo, structured in two movements. The first recounts a grievance narrative — that the "Neftegna," disguised and humbled at times, has historically "buried" the Oromo, sold out the country "for pasta and macaroni" (an idiom for selling out cheaply to foreigners), with martyrs dying "in the name of the people." The second movement turns to vengeance: the speaker declares he has resolved to rise and destroy the Neftegna — "to pit them into a grave," "uproot them by the root," with his people cheering him on; he vows not to spare the enemy, raising the shimala (a fighting stick/staff), and ends with grotesque dehumanizing imagery (feeding the enemy's bones to dogs) and a call extending "to every clan

OriginalText: በጎንደር ያሉ አደባባዮች ለሁሉም እምነቶች እኩል መከፈት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: Public squares in Gondar should be equally open to all faiths

OriginalText: አማራዎች እየቦታ ማግኘት ነው ወይስ የተገባ መብት ነው?
EnglishTranslation: Are Amharas taking over space or exercising a legitimate right?

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Maqalee keessatti hiriira bakka uummataa seera tokko jalatti bulchuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Maqalee should manage public-space rallies under one rule

OriginalText: ኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮችና አማራዎች በከተማው ላይ አደጋ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians and the Amharas are a threat to the city

OriginalText: ቆማጦች ሁሉም ችግር ምንጭ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Qomata are the source of every problem

OriginalText: ኦርሚያ ላይ ያሉ ህዝቦች እራሣቸውን መከላከል ጀመሩ እንጂ ሊላ ህዝብ መቸ መጣ
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The peoples in Oromia merely began defending themselves — when did any other people come [to attack]?

OriginalText: በጅማ ላይ የሙስሊሞች ዝግጅት ተካሂዷል
EnglishTranslation: A Muslims event was held in Jimma

OriginalText: አንድ ሁን አማራ [SLUR_OROMO] አሰፍስፎ ሊበላህ ነው
EnglishTranslation: Unite, Amhara — the [SLUR_OROMO] is lurking, poised to devour you.

OriginalText: ባለፈው [SLUR_OROMO] እና ነፍጠኛ ብላ ለተሳደበችው ሄለን ሀይሉ ታማኝ በየነ ይናገራል እንዴት የኦሮሞና የአማራ ህዝብስ እንዴት ሄለንን ይሰድባል? ምንስ አጠፋች እቺ የ22 አመት ወጣት ሄለን እኮ.... ይላል... አይ ታማኝ እውነትም ታማኝ እስቲ ፍቅሩን ግለፁ share በማድረግ ለሄለንም እግረመንገዱን እንዲደርሳት። ፔጅአችንን like በማድረግ አዳዲስ መረጃ ያግኙ።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Tamagn Beyene speaks up for Helen Hailu, who was last time insulted as '[SLUR_OROMO]' and 'Neftegna': 'How can the Oromo and Amhara people insult Helen? What did this 22-year-old Helen even do?' — Oh Tamagn, truly faithful. Show the love by sharing so it reaches Helen too; like our page for new updates.

OriginalText: የጤና ቢሮ በሽረ ስለ አደባባይ ፈቃድ ማብራሪያ ሰጠ
EnglishTranslation: The የጤና ቢሮ gave an explanation about public-square permits in Shire

OriginalText: ኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮችና [SLUR_OROMO]ዎች በከተማው ላይ አደጋ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians and the [SLUR_OROMO] are a threat to the city

OriginalText: Jechi '[SLUR_OROMO]' postii Finfinnee keessaa kana irratti arrabsoo moo ibsa siyaasaa dha?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Finfinnee, is '[SLUR_OROMO]' an insult or political description?

OriginalText: Dirree Dhawaa keessatti namoota '[SLUR_OROMO]' jechuun arrabsuun haa dhaabatu; Bakka uummataa hundaaf
EnglishTranslation: Stop insulting people with '[SLUR_OROMO]' in Dirree Dhawaa; Bakka uummataa hundaaf

OriginalText: Woyyaanee nagaa Finfinnee ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane destroy the peace of Finfinnee

OriginalText: አማራኮ አማርኛ ማለት ነው። አማርኛ ደግሞ ኢትዮጵያዊነትን የሚያጠናክር የኢትዮጵያን ሕዝብ የሚያስተምር አንድነትን የሚያጠናክር ታላቅ መሣሪያ ነው።አማርኛ ደግሞ በተፈጥሮ አማራ ተብሎ እንዲጠራ ካደረገው ሕዝብ አእምሮ ጋር ተጣምሮ ሌሎች እንዳይማሩት አላደረገም።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] 'Amhara' means Amharic. And Amharic is a great instrument that strengthens Ethiopian-ness, teaches the Ethiopian people, and strengthens unity. And Amharic, bound up with the mind of the people naturally called Amhara, has not prevented others from learning it.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ የሚለው ቃል በአዲስ አበባ የተጻፈው ፖስት ላይ ስድብ ነው ወይስ ፖለቲካዊ መለያ?
EnglishTranslation: In the post from Addis Ababa, is ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ a slur or a political label?

OriginalText: ሞት አይቀርም ዝም ብለን ከምንሞት እራሳችን እንከላከል
EnglishTranslation: Death is unavoidable; rather than die doing nothing, let us defend ourselves.

OriginalText: Ortodoksii mootummaa waliin ta'anii magaalaa jeeqaa jiru
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians together with the government are destabilizing the city

OriginalText: Amaantaan Naafxaanyaa Kaaminii??? Seera Ba'uu B 24፣12 Ammas Waaqayyo Musee dhaan, Tulluutti Ol Ba'ii Gara Koo Kottuu, Achi Turi! Ani Gabatoota Dhagaa, Seera Fi Abboommii Sabni Kun Akka Ittiin Gorfamuuf, Ani Irratti Caafee Sitti Nan Kenna Jedhe, Museen Gondaaredh?? Museen Gojaameedha?? Amaantaa Fi Siyaasaa Adaan Baasuun Baarbaachisadha Peenxotan Adaabadha Taauu Baanaan Naaegi Hooji Keessaan Sinifin Gaadhisaa [text repeats once]
EnglishTranslation: Which is the 'Neftegna religion'??? [Quotes Exodus 24:12] Again God said to Moses, 'Come up to me on the mountain and stay there; I will give you the stone tablets, the law and commandments I have written, so this people may be instructed.' Was Moses a Gondare?? Was Moses a Gojjame?? Religion and politics must be kept separate. [garbled closing — appears to reference Pentecostals/punishment and 'do your job in peace'].

OriginalText: Waaboo ABBaa Haqaa maLee hinbeynuun Jennaa waan ifiifituu kankeetii Huubbaadhuu oRomoo
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled.] WBO [OLA], 'we know nothing but the Father of Justice,' we say… understand what is your own, Oromo.

OriginalText: Lafti oromiyaa saamamaa jira oromoon calliseetuma ilaala jirra
EnglishTranslation: Oromia's land is being plundered, and the Oromo just watches in silence.

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Maqalee keessatti odeeffannoo COVID siyaasaa paartiirraa fageessuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Maqalee should keep COVID information away from party politics

OriginalText: Finfinnee(Addis Ababa)is not capital city of Ethiopia.Capital city of Oromia
EnglishTranslation: Finfinnee (Addis Ababa) is not the capital city of Ethiopia. [It is the] capital city of Oromia. (English in original.)

OriginalText: አማራው ሁሌም ቢሆን ለዳርድንበሩ እየተሰዋ ሀገሩን አቁሟል። እንደ ክልልም ሆነ እንደ ሀገር ለአካል ጉዳተኞችም ሆነ ለተሰው ሀገር ወዳድ የሰራዊቱ አባላት የሚቋቋሙበት ወይም ቤተሰባቸው የሚደገፍበት ስርዓት አለመኖሩ በጣም ያማል! በደርግ ጊዜ የጀግኖች አምባ ተቋም በደብረ ዘይት ከተማ ለጦር ጉዳተኞች ደረጃውን የጠበቀ አገልግሎት ሰጥቷል። አሁን ዋናው ነጥብ ፌደራል መንግስት ለአማራ ክልል መንግስት ከወያኔም ሆነ ከሱዳን ለሚሰነዘርበት ጥቃት አስቀድሞ የተለየ ድጋፍ ማድረግ ይጠበቃል። ሁሉም ክልሎች የልዩ ሀይል አባላት በመላክም ሆነ የገንዘብ ርዳታ ለአማራ ክልል አርሶ አደር የሚውል መደገፍ ይኖርባቸዋል። የመከላከያ ደጀንነት በጦር መሳርያም፣በገንዘብም ሆነ በሰው ሀይል አፋር ክልል ድረስ የተሟላ እና ዝግጁ የሆነ ጦር መዘጋጀት አለበት። የአፋር ክልልም በቂ ድጋፍ ማግኘት ይኖርበታል። ምክንያቱም ወልቃይት በተለይ የኢትዬጵያ ህልውናን ስለሚወስን ነው።
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Argues the Amhara have always sacrificed for the country's borders and 'held the nation up,' and laments that neither the region nor the country has a system to support disabled or fallen patriotic soldiers and their families — recalling the Derg-era 'Heroes' Camp' institution in Debre Zeit that served war-wounded. Argues the federal government must give the Amhara regional government special, pre-emptive support against attacks from 'Woyane' (TPLF) and Sudan; that all regions should send special-force members and money to support Amhara-region farmers; that defense reserves should be fully armed and ready in arms, money and manpower as far as the Afar region, which should also be supported — because Welkait in particular determines Ethiopia's very survival.

OriginalText: Saba raabbii qabu:Hiidhannoo ABO fi ijjannoo isa biyya etoophiyaaf,Falaasama fi qiyasa qabsoo daandii sirrii ummaata qabsisuufi sabi fi San_lammii irratti hunda'e ennummaadhan wal nyaatu Namummaa itti garsisuuf,Amantaa fi Dimookraasiin bu'ura Feedralizimi dhugaa ta'u ABO akka gaariitti etoophiyaa raabbii isa wajjiin ijaare jira (Badhaatu Oromiyaa,Handhura Fifinnee ,Masaara Gullallee).
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] 'A people that has God': praises the OLF's armament and its stance for Ethiopia, the philosophy and measure of a struggle that leads the people on the right path and would teach humanity to nations and nationalities that 'devour one another' over ethnicity and citizenship, and holds that faith and democracy should be the basis of true federalism — concluding that the OLF has, with God, built Ethiopia well ('Blessed Oromia, the navel Finfinne, the palace Gullalle').

OriginalText: Mariin paanaalii waa'ee siyaasaa fi amantii marsaa hawaasaa irratti gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A panel discussion on politics and religion was held online

OriginalText: የፋኖ ደጋፊ የሖናችሑ ኢትዮጵያዊያን በሙሉ ትገላችን መኘሻነሻችን አማራ መድረሻችን ኢትዮጵያ የፋኖን አመራሮች አክብሩልን
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful, partly garbled.] All you Ethiopians who are Fano supporters — our struggle[?]… our resting place is Amhara, our destination is Ethiopia. Honour the Fano leaders for us.

OriginalText: garee amantii sana mootummaa keessaa haqamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: that religious group should be removed from government

OriginalText: 'Woyyaanee' jechuun asitti arrabsoo moo ibsa siyaasaa dha?
EnglishTranslation: Is 'Woyyaanee' here an insult or a political description?

OriginalText: ነፈጠኛዎች ለBahir Dar ሰላም አደጋ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Neftegna are a threat to peace in Bahir Dar

OriginalText: ወያኔዎች በሽታን ወደ ከተማ ያመጡ እነሱ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane are the ones who brought disease into the city

OriginalText: ሰውን በቅማል መሰየም ( dehumanizing )የዘር ማጥፋት ቅስቀሳ ነው ይጠየቅበታል
EnglishTranslation: [Amharic w/ English inline.] Labelling a person as 'lice' (dehumanizing) is genocide incitement, and one will be held accountable for it.

OriginalText: የኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮች በመቀሌ ላይ ፕሮግራም እንዲያደርጉ ፈቃድ ጠየቁ
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians requested permission to hold a program in Mekelle

OriginalText: Ahii ..Naafxaanyaa kana akkamitti caadhiftee Boruu amma Mani ispoortii oromiyyaa keessaa jiruu hunddi haa cuufamu jeeti. EST Akkamitti iyyuu dhiftee???
EnglishTranslation: Ahh.. how could you tolerate this Neftegna? Now [she/he] says all the sports establishments in Oromia should be shut down. EST — how on earth did you let this happen???

OriginalText: ቆማጦች በሽታን ወደ ከተማ ያመጡ እነሱ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Qomata are the ones who brought disease into the city

OriginalText: ይህ የፊንፊኔ ከተማን የተቆጣጠረው የግንቦት 7ና ፋኖ ፋሽስት ቡድን ኦሮሚኛ ተናጋሪ ኦሮሞዎች በፊንፊኔ ከተማ አስተዳደር ውስጥ እንዳይሳተፉ ለማድረግ፤ በአማርኛ ቋንቋ ብቻ ያወጣው ፈተና ነው። ፈተናውን የግንቦት 7 ፋኖ ፋሽስት ቡድን አስቀድሞ ለአማርኛ ተናጋሪዎች ከነመልሱ ተበትኗል። ስለዚህ ኦሮሞ የሆኑ የፊንፊኔ ከተማ ሰራተኞች በሙሉ በዚህ የዘረኞቹ ፈተና ላይ በ4 ምክንያቶች መሳተፍ የለባቸውም። 1ኛ፤ ዘረኞቹ ፈተናውን ለአማርኛ ተናጋሪው በትነዋል። ስለዚህ መፈተኑ ዋጋ የለውም። 2ኛ፤ የመፈተኛ ቋንቋው ኦሮሚኛ እንጂ አማርኛ መሆን የለበትም። 3ኛ፤ የፊንፊኔ ከተማ የአንድ ብሄር ጣሪያ 40% መብለጥ የለበትም የሚለው ዘረኛ መመሪያ በኦሮሞ ላይ ተፈፃሚ መሆን የለበትም። የፊንፊኔ ከተማ ሙሉ በሙሉ በኦሮሞ መተዳደር አለባት። ሁሉም የፊንፊኔ ሰራተኛ 100% ኦሮሚኛ ተናጋሪ መሆን አለባቸው። 4ኛ፤ የኮታ ቀመር በኢትዮጰያ የሚያስፈልገው በክልል ሶስት ሲሆን የክልሉ አስተዳደር ኦሮሞ፤ አገዎና ቅማን በኮታ ቢያንስ 30% መከፋፈል አለባቸው። ፊንፊኔ የኦሮሚያ ዋና ከተማ ነች። መተዳደርም ያለባት በኦሮሞ ነው። የስራ ቋንቋዎም ኦሮሚኛ መሆን አለበት። የከተማዎም ሰራተኞች በሙሉ ኦሮሚኛ ተናጋሪ መሆን አለባቸው።
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] Claims the 'Ginbot-7 and Fano fascist group' that controls Finfinne (Addis Ababa) issued a civil-service exam in Amharic only, to keep Afaan-Oromo-speaking Oromos out of the city administration, and pre-distributed the exam with answers to Amharic speakers. Urges all Oromo city workers to boycott the 'racists' exam' for four reasons: (1) the answers were leaked to Amharic speakers, so it's worthless; (2) the exam language should be Afaan Oromo, not Amharic; (3) the 'racist' 40%-single-ethnicity cap must not apply to Oromos — Finfinne should be administered entirely by Oromo and 100% of its workers should be Afaan-Oromo speakers; (4) ethnic quotas are needed in Region 3 (Amhara), where Oromo, Agew and Qemant should each get at least 30%. Concludes that Finfinne is Oromia's capital, must be governed by Oromo, with Afaan Oromo as the working language and all city workers Afaan-Oromo-speaking.

OriginalText: sinumaa abbaan biyyaas, kutataa leencaa bosona!
EnglishTranslation: You indeed are the owner of the country — the resolute one, lion of the forest!

OriginalText: ሞጋሳ የዘር ፍጅት ማስፈጸምያ ስርዓት! በቄሮ የሚፈጸመውን ጭፍጨፋ የታሪክ ስር ለመረዳት ይህንን ጥንቅር ይመልከቱ
EnglishTranslation: Mogasa is a system for carrying out genocide! To understand the historical roots of the massacre carried out by Qeerroo, look at this compilation.

OriginalText: Masgiidaa fi mana mootummaa walitti dhiyeessuun rakkoo guddaa dha
EnglishTranslation: Putting a mosque close to a government office is a big problem

OriginalText: አፄ ኃይለሥላሴ ሥልጣኑን ለማቆየት ስንት እና ስንት ደሀ ኢትዮጵያውያንን ቢሾፍቱ ሀይቅ እየወሰደ አርዶ ለሴጣን ይገብር የነበረ ሴጣን የሴጣን ዘር እንደነበረ ታሪክ ባይመዘግበውም ቃል በቃል ለትውልድ የተተላለፈ እርኩሣዊ ተግባሩን የምንረሣው እንዳይመስልህ ።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Don't imagine we forget Emperor Haile Selassie's wicked deeds — that to keep his power he took countless poor Ethiopians to Bishoftu Lake, slaughtered them and offered them as sacrifices to Satan; he was Satan, a seed of Satan — handed down word for word to generations even though history did not record it.

OriginalText: የGondar ካውንስል የኮቪድ መረጃን ከፓርቲ ፖለቲካ ማራቅ አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Gondar council should keep COVID information away from party politics

OriginalText: Namni hundi vaaksinii fudhachuu isaa ofii isaatiin murteessuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: Everyone should decide for themselves whether to take the vaccine

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ በማለት ኦሮሞዎችን ማጥላላት አይቻልም
EnglishTranslation: It is not acceptable to insult the Oromos by saying ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’

OriginalText: ወያኔዎች በህዝብ ቦታ ላይ እንኳን ሊታዩ አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane should not even be seen in public spaces

OriginalText: የተጠቀሰው ቃል ተቃውሞ ነው ወይስ ስድብ አልታወቀም
EnglishTranslation: It is unclear whether the quoted term is protest language or an insult

OriginalText: ደም መጣ*ጮች ሆይ አይበቃችሁምን?
EnglishTranslation: O blood-suckers, is it not enough for you?

OriginalText: Diiqqallaa Naafxaanyaa kana amaa maaltuu asii nutii deebisee .duura fannoo faarsaa turee.amaa akamin asii deebi,ee Qixxeen diina koo adamsuun si adamsa. Ati na biratti jibbamaa akka taate beeki. Harmi haadhoolii keenyaaf harki haadhoolii keenyaa siif jiidhaa ture. Kan si guddise nu'i [...] akka waan ati foon nama keenyaa nyaattee dhiiga nama keenyaa dhugdeettan si lakkaa'a. [...] Ani nama saba koo ajjeeseef dhiifama hin qabu. [...] Warri ati erga guddatte itti galte sun Horrootti akka morma obboleessa koo kutan, Walloo Sanbateetti akka abbaa koo fannisaani qaama hormaata isaa irraa kutan, Araddaa kootichatti akka morma Obbo Ciibsaa kutani fudhatanii galan, Salaalatti akka morma Darajjee Amaaree maqaa waaqaa waanani irraa kutan, Shawwaaroobit keessatti akka hayyoota keenya akka bineensaatti ari'anii ajjeesan beektaa laata? [...] ani guyyaa saafaan ija kee si keessaa fuudha [...] ati bakka hundaatti akka saree soroobdee bultuutti lakkaa'amta. [...] Dhaamsa koo: gad ba'i, Kara Booranaa Oromoo dhiifama gaafadhu. [...] Abbush Zalake = Lamroot Kabbadaa = warra nu jaamse. Kanaaf amman lubbuun jirutti qixxeen diina koo lagadhuun si lagadha. Share godhii ittin ga'i dhiiro
EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] This 'diqaalaa' Neftegna — what brought it back to us now? It used to praise Fano; how has it returned? Like one who hunts my enemy, I hunt you. Know that you are hated by me. Our mothers' breast and hand were tender for you; we raised you... I count you as one who ate our people's flesh and drank our people's blood. I have no forgiveness for one who killed my nation's people. Do you know that those you joined cut my brother's throat at Horro, hanged my father at Wallo Sanbatee and mutilated him, cut Obbo Ciibsaa's neck in my district, cut Darajjee Amaaree's throat at Salaalee, drove out and killed our scholars like animals at Shawwaaroobit? ... I will take out your eye in broad daylight — would those who love me be angry? Drop your song; you are burying yourself with your own hand; everywhere you'll be counted a scavenging dog. My message: come out, go to the Borana Oromo and ask forgiveness, admit your wrongs. If not, as long as I live I boycott you as my enemy. [Names: Abbush Zeleke = Lamrot Kebede = those who blinded us.] Share this so it reaches him, folks.

OriginalText: የስድብ ቃላትን እናቁም፤ ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ ወይም ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ ብሎ ማንኛውንም ብሔር ማጥላላት አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: የስድብ ቃላትን እናቁም; no ethnic group should be insulted with words like ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ or ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’

OriginalText: Warii hmunaa qabdaa Arsii kesaa Garaa Wabotii dabalamaa
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] Those who have strength, from within Arsi — join toward the WBO [OLA].

OriginalText: የኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮች በጅማ ላይ ቦታ ሊኖራቸው አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians should have no place in Jimma

OriginalText: garee amantii sana nagaa Finfinnee ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: that religious group destroy the peace of Finfinnee

OriginalText: Muslimoonni dhibee babal'isaa jiru
EnglishTranslation: Muslims are spreading disease

OriginalText: ወያኔዎች ሁሉም ችግር ምንጭ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane are the source of every problem

OriginalText: የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ከብረት የጠነከረ አንድነት ያስፈልገናል አንድነታችንየጥንካሬያችን መሰረት ነው ::
EnglishTranslation: (Amharic) We, the Oromo people, need a unity stronger than iron. Our unity is the foundation of our strength.

OriginalText: አማራ ሆይ የጀግኖች አባቶቻችንን ታሪክ እያበላሸን ነው ምንድነው ሁሌ ማልቀስ ለምን አንተስ አታስለቅስም እንዴ እነሱም ሰው እኛም ሰው በቃ መንግሥት የለም እራስክን አስጠብቅ ኣረ በዛ ማርያምን እኔ አሁንስ ማዘን ልተው ነው በቃ በቃ በቃ እግዚአብሔር ከኛ ጋር ነው ይረዳናል እንታገልለ[SLUR_OROMO] አማራ ማልቀስ ነውር ነው [SLUR_OROMO] ወራሪ ነው
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] 'Amhara, we are spoiling the history of our heroic fathers — what is this endless crying? Why don't you make them cry too? They're human, we're human. Enough — there's no government; protect yourself… I'm going to stop mourning now. Enough, enough. God is with us, He'll help us. Let us fight, [SLUR_OROMO]! Amhara, crying is shameful. [SLUR_OROMO] is an invader.'

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa ykn haattuu
EnglishTranslation: Neftegna, or [rather] thief.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ እና ‘ወያኔ’ ያሉ ቃላትን ይቁሙ
EnglishTranslation: Stop terms like ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ and ‘ወያኔ’

OriginalText: የሙስሊሞች ተከታዮች በድሬዳዋ ላይ ፕሮግራም እንዲያደርጉ ፈቃድ ጠየቁ
EnglishTranslation: Muslims requested permission to hold a program in Dire Dawa

OriginalText: ፋኖ እና ደጋፊዎች ለዘላለም ኑሩ ክብር ለአማራ ፋኖ እና ለልዪ ሐይል
EnglishTranslation: Fano and its supporters, live forever. Honour to the Amhara Fano and to the Special Force.

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa hardhaas boruus dinaa oromoottii abiyii hardhaas boruus dinaa oromoottii
EnglishTranslation: The Neftegna, today and tomorrow, is the enemy of the Oromo; Abiy, today and tomorrow, is the enemy of the Oromo.

OriginalText: በህዝብ ቦታ ላይ የእነሱ መገኘት ለማን ችግር ነው?
EnglishTranslation: Whose problem is their presence in the public square?

OriginalText: waan orommoo baasu yeroo amaa kanaa waanti harooffti hin uumaanee duruumaa waaraanaa kaabaa yoo irraa anee inihafee garbuudhaa jeechaa turun issaan nibeekamaa kanaafu orommoon jabaatee ofirraa itssun ykn barbaadeesu qaba kanumaa mali!!!
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] What can save the Oromo at this time — nothing new has been created. Long ago, in the northern war, had [we] been spared, they used to call us 'barley' [i.e. fodder/expendable]; they are known for that. So the Oromo must grow strong and defend itself, or pursue [its aim]. That's all!!!

OriginalText: Sorry I truly respect my cousins But ኦሮሞ ሐገር ማስተዳደር አይችልም የሚባለው አሁን ገባኝ። አንዳንድ አወቅን የሚሉ ምሁር ተብየዎች ሁሉንም ነገር አንደ ህጻን ልጅ የ ኔ ነው ስለሚሉ ነው።
EnglishTranslation: [English + Amharic.] 'Sorry, I truly respect my cousins, but' — now I understand why it's said that 'the Oromo can't govern a country.' It's because some so-called intellectuals who think they know it all claim everything is 'mine,' like a small child.

OriginalText: ሁሉንም ነገር ከማመን በፊት ማረጋገጥ አለብን
EnglishTranslation: We must verify everything before believing it

OriginalText: እነዚህ ቡድኖች ሕዝባችንን ለማጥፋት እየሰሩ ነው
EnglishTranslation: These groups are working to destroy our people

OriginalText: Bahirdar keessatti eeyyamni sagantaa amantii seera tokko jalatti kennamuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: In Bahirdar, permits for religious programs should be issued under one rule

OriginalText: Ajajoonni Olaanoon ABO/WBO, ajajoonni WBO zooniilee saddeettan irra jirtan, miseensonni waraanaa dirree hunda irraa diina kuffiistanii kufaa jirtan, deggertoonni qabsoo bilisummaa Oromoo impaayerattiin ala akkasumas keessa jirtan cufti, Maatiin qabsaa'otaafi Wareegamtootaa hundi keessan baga kabaja guyyaa gootota Oromoon isin gahe!
EnglishTranslation: Senior commanders of ABO/WBO, WBO commanders across the eight zones, combat members felling the enemy on every front, all supporters of the Oromo liberation struggle inside and outside the empire, and all families of fighters and martyrs — happy Oromo Martyrs' Day (GGO)!

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa duutuun du'aa farsiitti.  oftullumaan amaalumaa naafxaanyaa tii namiitti saareen kun galmaa miliniyeemii keessaatti ummaata jalaalaa fi tokkumaa guutamee jiru keessaatti dhufuu milinik dhuftee sagaantichaa addaan kuttee.  aldeetti kun
EnglishTranslation: The dying Neftegna celebrates death. Arrogance is the Neftegna's nature; this 'dog' of a person — at the Millennium Hall, before a crowd full of love and unity — this Menelik came and cut the program short (interrupted it). This incident...

OriginalText: የBahir Dar ካውንስል በምርጫ ዘመቻ ላይ የስድብ ቃላትን መከልከል አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Bahir Dar council should ban slurs during election campaigns

OriginalText: Dhugumayyuu Minilik Bineensaa
EnglishTranslation: Truly, Menelik [is a] Beast.

OriginalText: warra Tigraay nagaa Maqalee ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans destroy the peace of Maqalee

OriginalText: ለአገው ህዝብ ሳይሆን ለአማራ የሚሰሩ አገዎች በደም አገው ቢሆኑም በተግባር አማራ ስለሆኑ አይቆጠሩም::
EnglishTranslation: Agews who work for the Amhara rather than for the Agew people — even if they are Agew by blood, in practice they are Amhara, so they don't count [as Agew].

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ እና ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’ ያሉ ቃላትን አትደግሙ
EnglishTranslation: Do not repeat terms like ‘[SLUR_OROMO]’ and ‘[SLUR_AMHARA]’

OriginalText: [SLUR_OROMO]ና ሰገራ እየደር ይገማል::
EnglishTranslation: [SLUR_OROMO] and feces stink more as they pile up.

OriginalText: የአለም፡ጀግና፡ትግራዮች፡ናቸው፡ታንክን፡የሚያህል፡በክላሽ፡እልሃቸው፡ይገርማል፡፡
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The world's heroes are the Tigrayans; their daring — taking on something as big as a tank with a Kalashnikov — is astonishing.

OriginalText: ትክክለኛ መጠሪያቸው [SLUR_OROMO] ነው ወራሪ አረመኔን በገዛ ስሙ ነው መጠራት አለበት::
EnglishTranslation: Their correct name is '[SLUR_OROMO]'; an invading savage must be called by its own name.

OriginalText: Dirree Dhawaa keessatti eeyyamni sagantaa amantii seera tokko jalatti kennamuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: In Dirree Dhawaa, permits for religious programs should be issued under one rule

OriginalText: Hinjifanon umete Oromof hatau
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Victory has come — let it be for the Oromo.

OriginalText: Qabsoon itti fufa ammas Opodion baduu Qabdi. ............!!!!!!!
EnglishTranslation: The struggle continues; once again, ODP/OPDO must perish.

OriginalText: Manneen mootummaa cinaa masjiida ijaaruun sirrii miti
EnglishTranslation: Building a mosque next to government offices is not right

OriginalText: እጅግ ክብር እና ምስጋና የሚገባችሁ ውድ የአማራ ጀግኖች ፋኖዎቻችን እኔ እናንተን እንድወድ ያደረገኝ ነገር ቢኖር እንደ ክርስቶስ ለሰው ልጅ ነፃነት ስትሉ የምትከፍሉትን መስዋትነት ነው
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Dear Amhara heroes, our Fanos, who deserve the greatest honour and thanks — what made me love you is the sacrifice you pay for human freedom, like Christ.

OriginalText: የክትባት መርፌ የGPS መከታተያ ይዟል
EnglishTranslation: The vaccine needle contains a GPS tracker

OriginalText: የኦርቶዶክስ እና የሙስሊም ፕሮግራሞች ለትራፊክ እንዳይጎዱ ቅድመ እቅድ ያስፈልጋል
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox and Muslim programs need advance planning so they do not disrupt traffic

OriginalText: ኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮች በህዝብ አደባባይ ላይ እንኳን ሊሰበሰቡ አይገባም
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians should not even gather in public squares

OriginalText: ያልገባኝ ነገር ቢኖር ይሕ ሞጋሳ ሆነ ገዳ አደገኛ ከሆነ ለምን አነደ ጥሩ ነገር በዩኔስኮ ተመዘገበ አንደ ጥሩ ነገር? ሁለተኛ ማስረጄ ካለ ከዩኔስኮ ማሰረዝ አይቻልም ወይ?
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] What I don't get is: if this Mogasa or Gada is dangerous, why was it registered at UNESCO as a good thing? And second — if there's evidence, can't it be de-registered from UNESCO?

OriginalText: ዶንቆሮ ፈጣሪ እባብን ሐሳቡን አይቶ እግርን ነሳው ይባላል።
EnglishTranslation: Dimwit — it is said the Creator, seeing the snake's intent, took away its legs.

OriginalText: warra Oromoo nagaa Finfinnee ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos destroy the peace of Finfinnee

OriginalText: Nagaan ni injifata; gosaa fi amantii irratti arrabsoon akka '[SLUR_TIGRAY]' hin barbaachisu
EnglishTranslation: Nagaan ni injifata; slurs like '[SLUR_TIGRAY]' are not needed against ethnicity or religion

OriginalText: Ergaan kun amantii irratti moo siyaasaa irratti xiyyeeffata?
EnglishTranslation: Is this message focused on religion or politics?

OriginalText: አማራየ ሁሌም ንገስልን አማራ ሙስሊም ክርሥቲያኑ አንድ ነን
EnglishTranslation: My Amhara, reign over us always. Amhara — Muslim and Christian — we are one.

OriginalText: Jimmaa keessatti Ortodoksii fi Muslimoonni nagaan bakka uummataa fayyadamuu qabu
EnglishTranslation: In Jimmaa, Orthodox Christians and Muslims should use public spaces peacefully

OriginalText: ፋኖ የአማራ ኩራት ፋኖ የአማራ ማገር ነዉ ️ ፋኖ የኢትዮጵያ ብርሀን ነው
EnglishTranslation: Fano is the Amhara's pride; Fano is the Amhara's pillar; Fano is the light of Ethiopia.

OriginalText: Warri amantii sana hordofan vaaksinii diduun dhibee babal'isu
EnglishTranslation: Followers of that religion spread disease by rejecting vaccines

OriginalText: Naafxaanyaa gubaa ilmaan oromoo yaayan feedhuu Arbbayu yoo taa,e miraa cunqrfaamotaa waan dubaatufii maalee maalii baadiin inni qaabuu saabaa kiiyaa Mee yaayan jabadhuu leccaa keenyaa budaa Gaara gubii
EnglishTranslation: Burn the Neftegna! ... sons of the Oromo ... [if it is so], the sentiment of the oppressed ... what fault does he have, my people? Be strong, sons ... [slur 'budaa'] ... burn the mountain. (Heavily garbled; gist: an exhortation to 'burn' framed around the feeling of the oppressed.)

OriginalText: ''abbaan iyyatu malee gandi namaaf hin birmatu'' warraaqsi oromoon ajjeechaa haacaaluuf taasise mee ammam ga'aadha nama jechisiisa mee??? oromoon humna hin taaneen ukkaanfamee rafee jira yoom akka dammaqus naaf hin galu
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] 'Unless the father himself cries out, the village won't rush to his aid.' One has to wonder how sufficient the uprising the Oromo made over Hachalu's killing really was??? The Oromo has been choked by a force that shouldn't [be able to] and lies asleep — when it will awaken, I cannot tell.

OriginalText: Siyaasni Sirna Naafxaanyaa jarraa 21ffaa Keessaattis Wal Qixxummaa Sabaa Fi Sab Lammootaatti Hin Amananii. Naafxaanyaan Nama Ajjeessuun Diimookiraasii moo akkami? Sararri Diimaan Darbamee Jette Jaartiin tun Odeessituu hoo? Bu'aa Siyaasaaf Jecha Barattootaa Sabaan Oromoo Tahan Addaan Baasuun Ajjeessuuf Hoo? Ol aantummaan seeraa Naafxaanyootaa irratti fudhatamuu qaba. Keessaattuu Namootaa suuraa Kana Gadiitti Argaman Kanneentuu Biyyaa Jeequmsaaf Kakkasaa Jira. Barattootni Keenya Univaarsiitii Waldiyaati Ajjeefamuun Qaamaan Miidhamuun Cubuu Hojjatanii Osoo Hin Taanee Taphaa Siyaasaatiif Hojjatamee.Oromiyaa Keessatis Akka Jeequmsii Kahuu Barbaadaniti.Kun Milkaahuuf Hin Qabu. Diinaa Sossoobuun Hin Barbaachisuu Dhugaa Itti Himuu Malee
EnglishTranslation: The politics of the Neftegna system, even in the 21st century, does not believe in the equality of nations and nationalities. Is the Neftegna's killing of people democracy? 'A red line has been crossed,' this old woman keeps prattling, does she? Is singling out ethnically-Oromo students, for political gain, in order to kill them? The rule of law must be applied against the Neftegna. Especially the people in the photo below — these are the ones inciting the country to unrest. Our students killed and injured at Woldia University did no crime; it was done for political games. They want unrest stirred in Oromia too. This must not succeed. There is no need to appease the enemy — only to tell them the truth.

OriginalText: በባህር ዳር አዲስ ደንብ ወጥቶ አንድ ሀይማኖት ብቻ የህዝብ ቦታ እንዲጠቀም ተፈቅዷል
EnglishTranslation: A new rule in Bahir Dar allows only one religion to use public spaces

OriginalText: Gondar keessatti eeyyamni sagantaa amantii seera tokko jalatti kennamuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: In Gondar, permits for religious programs should be issued under one rule

OriginalText: እነዚህ ሰዎች ከከተማችን መባረር አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: These people must be driven out of our city

OriginalText: ትግራውያን ለAdama ሰላም አደጋ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Tigrayans are a threat to peace in Adama

OriginalText: ኦሮሞ በ4 ነገዶች ማለትም 4 የተለያዩ ብሄረሰቦች መሆን በሚገባቸው ነገዶች፣ በ29 ጎሳዎች፣ በብዙ በሚቆጠሩ ንኡስ ጎሳዎች፣ ተቆጥሮ በማ|ያልቅ ንኡስ-ንኡስ ጎሳዎች፣ እሬቻ፣ ቃሊቻ፣ ጨፌና ጠቋርን ጨምሮ በብዙ የዲያብሎስ አምልኮ፣ በሀይምኖት፣ በአካባቢና በሌላም በወረራና ጉዲፈቻ ሌላውን እያስገደደ ከመሰረቱ ጀምሮ የተከፋፈለ፣ የተለያየና እርስ በእርሱ ሲጨራረስ ነው የኖረ፡፡ አጼ ምኒልክ ናቸው በኦሮሞ መካከል የዘመናትን ጦርነት ያስቆሙ፡፡ ይህ ወራሪ የአራዊት ዘር ከሶማሊያ ጋ ለዘመናት በጦርነት ሲጨራረስ ነው የኖረ፡፡ የሲዳሞን ህዝብ እንደ ጌዲዮን፣ ከፍቾና ሌሎች ጨርሶ ታሪካዊ መሬታቸውን በወረራ ይዞ ይገኛል፡፡ ጉራጌን፣ ሀድያን፣ ከምባታን፣ ወላይታን፣ አፋርን፣ ጋምቤላን፣ ካማሸንና ሌላውን በወረራ እርስቱን ይዞ ይገኛል፡፡ አዲስ አበባን ጨምሮ አማራ ከሌሎች ጥንታዊ ህዝቦች ጋር ለሸህ አመታት ይኖርበት የነበርን ሸዋን በጦርነትና በጉዲ ፈቻ አሳምኖ በወረራ ይዞ ይገኛል፡፡ [SLUR_OROMO]/ኦሮሞ ግን በሁሉም ነገር በውስጡ የተለያ|የና የተከፋፈለ አንድም የጋራ የሆነ መሰረት የሌለው ስለሆነ በቅርብ ጊዜ በጎሳ፣ በአካባቢና በሌላም ሰበብ እርስ በእርሱ እንደ ሎማዱ የሚተራረድ ነው፡፡ እንደ ብቸኛ መፍትሄ የሚሆንና መ፣ሆኑም የማይቀር ቢኖር ኦሮሞ በጎሳ፣ በንኡስ ጎሳ፣ በአምልኮ፣ በአካባቢና በሀይማኖት ሚናውን በመለየት ተከፋፍሎ የየራሱን አስተዳደር የሚመሰርት ነው፡፡ ይህ መሆኑ አይቀርም፡፡ ሶማሊያ የፈረሰች ሀገር የሆነች በሁሉም አንድ ሆና ነገር ግን በ5 ጎሳዎች ልዩነት ነው፡፡ የኦሮሞ ውስ|ጣዊ ልዩነትና መሰረታዊ በሆነና በሁሉም ነው፡፡ እያንዳንዱ የኦሮሞ ጎሳ የየራሱን ግዛትና አስተ..ዳደር በመመስረት በኢትዮጵያዊት ሁሉም አብሮ በሰላም መኖር መቻል ብቻ ነው መፍትሄው፡፡
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] An extended screed arguing that the Oromo are not one people but '4 tribes that ought to be 4 separate ethnicities,' 29 clans and countless sub-clans, bound up with 'much devil-worship' (Irreecha, Qalicha, Chefe, etc.), divided from their foundation and historically 'slaughtering one another' — until 'Emperor Menelik stopped the centuries of war among them.' It calls the Oromo an 'invading beast race' that warred endlessly with Somalia and seized by 'invasion' the lands of the Sidama, Gedeo, Kaffa, Gurage, Hadiya, Kambata, Wolayta, Afar, Gambela, Kemashi and others — and took Shewa (and Addis Ababa), where the Amhara had lived with ancient peoples for thousands of years, through 'war and gudifecha (adoption).' It claims '[SLUR_OROMO]/Oromo' has no common foundation and will soon slaughter itself by clan, and concludes that the only 'inevitable' solution is for the Oromo to be broken up by clan, sub-clan, cult, region and religion into separate administrations, each living peacefully within Ethiopia — likening this to Somalia's 5-clan fragmentation.

OriginalText: Har'a Finfinnee keessatti sagantaan amantii gaggeeffame
EnglishTranslation: A religious program was held today in Finfinnee

OriginalText: Baqqalaa Garbbaa galggala keessaa semmuunkkee dhukkubsatee waan salphatteef kana caala asaa naama hin barannee asa'uu keetiin duratti yeroon duutee baaddee irraanffatamuu kee wayya!yaa ilmma saree adeemssi kee kuun saba biroo waalii sin hinjiraachisu!
EnglishTranslation: [Targeting Bekele Gerba:] Bekele Gerba, since your mind has fallen ill and you have debased yourself, before you — an uneducated man — sink lower, it would be better that you died in good time and were forgotten in the wilderness! O son of a dog, this path of yours will not let you coexist with other peoples!

OriginalText: nuuf jiraadhu WBO koo...guyyaa tokko isinitti dabalamuun koo hin hafuu yoo rabi jedhe... dhugaa baayyee isin jaaladha
EnglishTranslation: Live for us, my WBO... one day my joining you will surely happen, God willing (yoo Rabbi jedhe)... truly, I love you very much.

OriginalText: Ibsi haaraan vaaksinii irratti bor ni ba'a
EnglishTranslation: A new statement on vaccination will be released tomorrow

OriginalText: የሙስሊምና የኦርቶዶክስ ወጣቶች በሕዝብ ቦታ ላይ ግጭት ሳይፈጥሩ መነጋገር ይችላሉ

EnglishTranslation: The Gondar council should ban slurs during election campaigns

EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Let them too organize and take them on, taking up the weapons — after this there is no other way to put them to rest [finish them].

OriginalText: አረ ስለ እግዚአብሔር
EnglishTranslation: Oh, for God's sake.

EnglishTranslation: the Oromos destroy the peace of Jimmaa

EnglishTranslation: Teddy, don't wear yourself out — step out of 'Neftegna Ethiopia' and raise your voice only for your own people.

OriginalText: የኦሮሞ ሊሒቃን ለሁለት ተከፋፍለው፤ አንደኛው ቡድን ታጥቆና ተደራጅቶ በጫካ፤ ሊላው ቡድን ደግሞ በኢትጵያ የመንግስት ስልጣን በመያዝ፤ ሌሎች ኢትዮጵያውን በመጨፍጨፍና በማፈናቀል ተጠምዶ በኢትዮጵያ ህልውና ላይ አደጋ ጥሏል።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] The Oromo elites have split in two: one group armed and organized in the bush, the other holding state power in Ethiopia — and both are busy massacring and displacing other Ethiopians, posing a danger to Ethiopia's very existence.

OriginalText: Warra xoophiyaa jedhe marateeti biyya gaga'aa jira.1 Naafxaanyaa .2ffaan Bilxiginnaa!

EnglishTranslation: [PROVISIONAL] Hold it right there — look, the Neftegna [woman] has learned to feed on Oromo blood.

OriginalText: ኦሮምኛ ቋንቋ እኅኳን የፌደራል ቋንቋ ሊሆን ቀርቶ ራሱ ኦሮሞውም ሊናገረው ይፀየፈዋል።
EnglishTranslation: Far from Afaan Oromo becoming a federal language, even the Oromo himself is disgusted to speak it.

OriginalText: ፉኖ ይችላል ገና አብይንም እንዲህ ያዋርድል።ድል የአማራ ህዝብ ያሸንፉል::
EnglishTranslation: Fano can do it — it will yet humiliate Abiy like this. Victory — the Amhara people will win.

EnglishTranslation: Their faith is a threat to the city’s peace

OriginalText: የሙስሊሞች ተከታዮች በአዲስ አበባ ላይ ፕሮግራም እንዲያደርጉ ፈቃድ ጠየቁ
EnglishTranslation: Muslims requested permission to hold a program in Addis Ababa

OriginalText: Vaaksiiniin dhiiga namaa jijjiira
EnglishTranslation: The vaccine changes human blood

EnglishTranslation: Victory to the oppressed Amhara people.

OriginalText: ኮቪድ በሙቀት ሻይ ብቻ ይጠፋል
EnglishTranslation: COVID disappears with hot tea alone
