OriginalText: Tokkummaan ummata keenyaaf jabeessa(Be who you are).
EnglishTranslation: Unity strengthens our people. (Be who you are.)

OriginalText: OROMIA STATE MUST BE INDEPENDENCE FROM ETHIOPIA COLONIZATION!!!! OROMOO HATAATTAMANII HIIRIRRAA GUDAA GOCHUDHAA AMMAAKANAA.QIINDOMMINAANII OROMOO MARTII HIIRIRAA BAYEE MOOTUMMAA GARBOOFATOTTAA JIIGISUUDHAA.
EnglishTranslation: [Code-mixed, faithful.] 'Oromia state must be independent from Ethiopia['s] colonization!!!' Oromo, urgently stage a great protest now; in coordination, let all Oromo come out to protest and topple the enslaving government.

OriginalText: ከስሙ መገመት እንደሚቻለው የተገደለው ከርሳም ዐማራ ይመስላል..ከርሳም ዐማሮች ከአሳማነት ወጥተው መቼ ይሆን ሰው የሚሆኑት ።
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] As one can guess from the name, the person killed seems to be a 'greedy' Amhara… When will these 'greedy' Amharas come out of their pig-ness and become human?

OriginalText: warra Amaaraa nagaa Jimmaa ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas destroy the peace of Jimmaa

OriginalText: warra Amaaraa nagaa Shaashamannee ni mancaasu
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas destroy the peace of Shaashamannee

OriginalText: አገራችን ኦሮሚያ ባዳ አያስተዳደራትም እያለ ነው እሄ ጀግና ልጅ
EnglishTranslation: This heroic young man is saying 'our country Oromia will not be governed by an outsider.'

OriginalText: እነሱ በሀገር ላይ እየሠሩት ያለው ሴራ ነው
EnglishTranslation: What they are doing against the country is a conspiracy

OriginalText: ከዚህ ወርቅ ጀግና ህዝብ በመወለደ አልሃምዱሊላህ በርቱ ጀግኖቸ ድል ከናተ ጋር ይሁን አማራየ
EnglishTranslation: Alhamdulillah for being born of this golden, heroic people. Be strong, heroes; may victory be with you, my Amhara.

OriginalText: ኦነግ የት ገባህ እባክህን ድረስልን በቀን ጅቦች ሳንበላ
EnglishTranslation: OLF, where have you gone? Please come to our aid, before we are devoured by the daytime hyenas.

OriginalText: ይህን መረጃ ሁሉም እንዲያውቅ አጋሩ
EnglishTranslation: Share this information so everyone knows

OriginalText: jabaadhu yaa WBO sabni keessan hunduu hawwiidhaan isin eegaa jira
EnglishTranslation: Be strong, O WBO — your whole nation awaits you with longing.

OriginalText: ያሳዝናል! አያችሁ ነገሩ ለአገርና ለህዝብ የሚደረግ ትግል አይደለም። ተራ ሽብርና ዘረፋ ነው። በወሎ ኦሮሞ ህዝብ ላይ ግድያ እና ዘረፋ እየፈፀመ ያለው፤ ፋኖ የሚባለው የሽብር ቡድን ወደ 280 የሚሆኑ እነዚህን በፎቶው ላይ የምታዩትን የደቡብ ክልል ቀን ሰራተኛችን አግቶ ካቆየ በኋላ የለቀቀው፤ 6 ሚልዮን ብር ተቀብሎ እንደሆነ Addis Standard ዘግቧል። ከዚህ በኋላ ፋኖ የሚባል የሽብር ቡድን ተራ ዘራፊ እና ነፈሰ ገዳይ ቡድን እንጂ የሰው መብት መከበር የሚታገል ቡድን እንዳልሆነ ይህ ግልፅ መረጃ በተጨባጭ አረጋግጧል።
EnglishTranslation: Sad! Look — the issue is that this is not a struggle for country and people; it is mere terrorism and looting. The terror group called Fano, which is carrying out killing and looting against the Wollo Oromo, abducted about 280 of these South-Region day-laborers shown in the photo, held them, and released them only after taking 6 million birr, as Addis Standard reported. This clear information concretely confirms that the Fano terror group is a band of robbers and killers, not a group fighting for human rights.

OriginalText: waaqni Kiristaanotaa Akka Sadoomiif Gamoraa Gatii kee Ibiddaan Siif Haa kaffalu.
EnglishTranslation: May the God of Christians repay you with fire, as with Sodom and Gomorrah.

OriginalText: OROMIYA SHALL BE FREE,YA QEERROO damaqii OROMIYA cufaraa ya minilik safarin OROMIYA nusamuti jirit ,PMNO LAMMAA MAGARISA DOWN DOWN DOWN OROMIYA ya minilik safarit gurigurachu ketif,sorry,hatoota OPDO
EnglishTranslation: [Mixed, faithful.] Oromia shall be free! O Qeerroo, awaken — shut Oromia [down/strike]! O Menelik-settler, Oromia… [you are stealing] Oromia from us! Lemma Megersa, DOWN DOWN DOWN! O Menelik-settler, for your grabbing… sorry — thieves, OPDO.

OriginalText: የሙስሊሞች ተከታዮች በሽረ ላይ ፕሮግራም እንዲያደርጉ ፈቃድ ጠየቁ
EnglishTranslation: Muslims requested permission to hold a program in Shire

OriginalText: በሻሸመኔ ላይ የሙስሊሞች ዝግጅት ተካሂዷል
EnglishTranslation: A Muslims event was held in Shashemene

OriginalText: ይበሏቸው አይነሱምዴ የዝያም ነፍስ የናተም ነፍስ እናተም አንድ ሁኑ እነሱ ብርት ነው የለበሱት
EnglishTranslation: [Garbled, faithful.] Take them on — won't they fall? Their life and your life [are the same]; you too unite — what they're wearing is just metal.

OriginalText:
Maa Tuxxaa jawwar 
Naafxaanyaa goobbee 
Si keessan gaddii kuutaa
EnglishTranslation: [Heavily garbled three-line fragment.] Apparent gist: a taunt invoking Jawar and the Neftegna with 'cut[ting]'/'bringing down' imagery directed at the out-group. Confident translation not possible.

OriginalText: ኦሮሞዎች በሽታን ወደ ከተማ ያመጡ እነሱ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Oromos are the ones who brought disease into the city

OriginalText: oromiyaan walaba baatu malee dhukkuba nafxanyaa hin fayyinu
EnglishTranslation: Unless Oromia becomes independent, we will not be cured of the Neftegna disease.

OriginalText: የ ኦሮሞ ጠላት Opdo ወይስ Tplf ለሚለው ጥያቄህ opdon ማን አደራጃቸው ማን ስልጣን ላይ አመጣቸው የopdo አባቶች ሚባሉትን የኦሮሞ ህዝብን በጣም በድለዋል ምትሉዋቸው እነ አባዱላን Tplf መሰለኝ መልምላ ያስቀመጠቻቸው እና እናንተም እንደዚ ለtplf ስታሽቁዋልጡላት ሳይ tplf ነች እንዴ እነዚንም እንደ opdo አደራጅታ ምትጋልባቸው ብዬ እያሰብኩ ነው እውነተኛ የኦሮሞ ህዝብ ታጋይ ከሆናቹ tplf ቁጥር 1 የኦሮሞ ጠላት መሆኑዋ አይጠፋቹም
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] To your question of who the Oromo's enemy is — OPDO or TPLF — ask who organized OPDO and who put them in power. The so-called OPDO 'fathers' you say wronged the Oromo, people like Abadula, were recruited and installed by the TPLF, it seems. And watching you fawn over the TPLF like this, I wonder whether the TPLF is now organizing and riding you the same way it did OPDO. If you are a true fighter for the Oromo people, you won't fail to see that the TPLF is the number-one enemy of the Oromo.

OriginalText: ወያኔዎች ከመንግስት ቢሮዎች ሁሉ መውጣት አለባቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane should be removed from all government offices

OriginalText: የAddis Ababa ካውንስል የኮቪድ መረጃን ከፓርቲ ፖለቲካ ማራቅ አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The Addis Ababa council should keep COVID information away from party politics

OriginalText: አድስ አበባ የኛ ገለመሊ እያለ አማራ ሲፈትል ነው የሚኖረው።
EnglishTranslation: The Amhara lives spinning idle talk — 'Addis Ababa is ours' and so on.

OriginalText: ኦርቶዶክስ ተከታዮችና ቆማጦች በከተማው ላይ አደጋ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: Orthodox Christians and the Qomata are a threat to the city

OriginalText: " [SLUR_OROMO]፣ ከብት፣ ኩበት ጠራጊ፣ [SLUR_OROMO] " የሚሉ ነገሮች ኦሮሞውን አንገት ለማስደፋት የተባሉ ናቸው ። ይሄ በአሜሪካን ሀገር ይባል እንጂ ምንጩ በቀጥታም ሆነ በተዘዋዋሪ ከዚሁ ከ4 ኪሎ ቤተመንግስት ነው ። በቀጥታ ከጠ/ሚር አብይ አስተዳደር ጋር አብረው የመጡ የጥላቻና ንቀት አስተሳሰቦች ናቸው ። ከቤተመንግስት "መንጋ " የተባለ ማህበረሰብ በጎዳና "[SLUR_OROMO]፣ከብት" ቢባል የሚገርም አይሆንም
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] Things like '[SLUR_OROMO], cattle, dung-sweeper, [SLUR_OROMO]' are said to make the Oromo bow their heads. Even if this is said in America, its source is, directly or indirectly, this very palace at 4 Kilo — hatred-and-contempt ideas that came directly with PM Abiy's administration. It would be no surprise if a community from the palace, called the 'manga' [horde], shouted '[SLUR_OROMO], cattle' in the street.

OriginalText: ፋኖ የሚባለው የሽብር ቡድን የሲቪል ልብስ የለበሱ የመከላከያ ኣባላትን ማረኩኝ ብሎ በማህበራዊ ድህረ ገፆች ሲያዞር የነበረው ቪዲዮ ወደ ህዳሴ ግድብ ለደን ምንጣሮ ስራ ሲጓዙ የነበሩ የደቡብ ክልል የቀን ሰራተኞች መሆናቸውን VoA ቤተሰቦቻቸውን እና የደቡብ ክልል ባለስልጣናትን አነጋግሮ አረጋግጧል። ለፋኖ ወግኖ የሚሰራው VoA Amharic ማጣራት የቻለውን ይህን ትልቅ ጉዳይ፤ የኢትዮጵያ መንግስት ይህን ወንጀል አስቀድሞ ያለ መግለፁ የሚገርም ነው
EnglishTranslation: The video Fano circulated on social media — claiming it had captured Defense soldiers in civilian clothes — was [actually] of South-Region day-laborers traveling to the Renaissance Dam for land-clearing work, as VoA confirmed by speaking with their families and South-Region officials. It is striking that VoA Amharic, which works in Fano's favor, managed to verify this major matter while the Ethiopian government failed to state it beforehand.

OriginalText: ለችግሩ መፍትሄ ውይይት ነው እንጂ ጥቃት አይደለም
EnglishTranslation: The solution to the problem is dialogue, not attack

OriginalText: Qondaalonni ABO-WBO,miseensonni waraana Bilisummaa Oromoo dirree irraa falmaa hadhaa'aa Geggeessaa jirtan,utubaan qabsichaa kabajamaan Uummata Oromoo,deeggartootni WBO,dinqisiifattoonni qabsoo Bilisummaa Oromoo Fi sabboontotni ilmaan Oromoo biyya keessaaf Alaa marti baga guyyaa seena qabeessa Eebila 15'n GGO nagaan geessan.
EnglishTranslation: Officials of ABO-WBO, members of the Oromo Liberation Army waging bitter struggle on the front, honored pillar of the Oromo people, supporters of WBO, admirers of the Oromo liberation struggle, and nationalist Oromo at home and abroad — happy historic April 15th, Oromo Martyrs' Day (GGO); peace be with you.

OriginalText: ያሳዝናል ኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ ተጋሩ እና ኦሮሞ መሆን ፈተናው ከባድ ነው
EnglishTranslation: It's sad — in Ethiopia, being Tigrayan and Oromo is a hard test.

OriginalText: COVID jechuun namoota sodaachisuuf qofa oduu hojjetame dha
EnglishTranslation: COVID is just a made-up story to scare people

OriginalText: መንግስት በህዝብ ቦታ ላይ ለሃይማኖት ዝግጅቶች አንድ ደንብ ማውጣት አለበት
EnglishTranslation: The government should set one rule for religious events in public spaces

OriginalText: በመስጊድ የሚሰጥ ውሃ ኮቪድን በፍጥነት ይፈውሳል
EnglishTranslation: Water given in the mosque quickly cures COVID

OriginalText: Oromo koo walif haa dirmanu nafxenyan yomiyu nuf hin cistu
EnglishTranslation: My Oromo, let us come to one another's aid; the Neftegna will never rest [show mercy] toward us.

OriginalText: Woyyaanee dhibee kana babal'isu
EnglishTranslation: the Weyane spread this disease

OriginalText: Konkolaataan bulchiinsaa Adaamaa keessatti odeeffannoo COVID siyaasaa paartiirraa fageessuu qaba
EnglishTranslation: The administration in Adaamaa should keep COVID information away from party politics

OriginalText: አይዞን አማራ የታሪኩ ባላባት ሀገር ያቆመ ኢትዬፒያን የገነባ ነው
EnglishTranslation: Take heart, Amhara — the lord of history, who founded the country and built Ethiopia.

OriginalText: አማራዎች ሁሉም ችግር ምንጭ ናቸው
EnglishTranslation: the Amharas are the source of every problem

OriginalText: COVID qorichi jiru jechuun soba guddaa dha
EnglishTranslation: Saying there is treatment for COVID is a big lie

OriginalText: Dhimma finfinnee irratti oromoon tokko, finfinneen dhimma oromooti. Finfinnee jechuun oromummaa jechuudha. Oromoon waa’ee finfinnee ilaalchisee waan isarraa barbaachisu gumaachuuf qixaa’uu qaba.
EnglishTranslation: [Faithful.] On the matter of Finfinne the Oromo are one; Finfinne is the Oromo's affair. To say 'Finfinne' is to say 'Oromummaa.' The Oromo must be ready to contribute whatever is required regarding Finfinne.

OriginalText: አረ በህግ አምላክ
EnglishTranslation: Oh, in the name of the God of [the] law.

OriginalText: Warri hardha Baaleen nyaachuuf dhufan kun warra dhalachuu isaaniituu yoo haadha taate malee warra abbaanuu dhalachuu isaanii warra quba hin qamneedha . warra kaleessa yeroo Baalee falmattu warra Naafxaanyaaf abboonni isaanii ashkara ta'aniifii teessoo jalatti warra baataa turanii dha
EnglishTranslation: Those who come today to devour Bale — only their mothers know how they were born; not even their fathers can claim them. They are the ones whose fathers, back when Bale was fighting, were orderlies (ashkari) for the Neftegna and carried [their] chairs beneath the throne.

OriginalText: ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ የሚለው ቃል በዚህ ፖስት ውስጥ ፖለቲካዊ ነው ወይስ ጥላቻ?
EnglishTranslation: Is the term ‘[SLUR_TIGRAY]’ in this post political or hateful?

OriginalText: Akeeknii paartii bilxiginnaa inni guddaa fi ijoon sirna naafxaanyaa minilik osoo hin qumuriin karaatii xummursisuuf kan hojatama jirudha. Akkaa Aanaa keenyatis shurufkaan jiru kanumaa. ummanni oromoo fi saba fi sablammonni cuquurfamoon wani dhigaa fi lafee ilman isaani itti gabaraa turan akka sirna moofaa naafxaanyaa mootummoota kaabaatiin karaatii hafee akka xumuramuuf hin gafaanee. gaafiin isaani gaafii abbaa biyyuma ture. haa tahuu qaamni ani jijjirama jedhe of moggasee as bahee imaana ummata fudhee harkaa warraa naafxaanyaati galchuun paartii bilxiginnaa jedhe of mogasee as bahee jira.maalif kun godhamee gaafii ummanni oromoo gaafachaa ture kan finfinnee,diree dhawaa,harar fi kan kana fakkatan ukkaamsuuf akkasuma gaafii saboota cunqurfamoo ofin of bulchuu barbaaduu ukkamsuuf akkuma kaleessa dachee isaani irratti ilman naafxaanyaa fi ilman diqaala itiyee minilik angeesuuf sadaqaa faranjii bira kadhatanin baajata itti rammaduun hojiilee tajajilaa hawasumaa gofaachisuun ummata rakkoo hammataa keessaa galchee jira bilxiginnaan. paartiin paartii warreen abbootti qabeenya kanneen kan dura qabeenya ummata samaa turanif har,as akka isaan tubboo isaani dheerefatanii daran qabeenya ummata hiyyeeyyi akka samaan isaan gargara. yoo kun nurati lafa qabate nuti akkumaa kaleessa biyya keenya irratti wardiyaa tahuun hin olamuu. kanaaf faallii jiruu warreen ergama bilxiginnaa fudhatani ummata oromoo irratti feehuuf deeman kanaan akka kaleessatti akka hin gowoomne ummanni keenya. maalif Oduu himaan bilxiginnaa aanaa keenyaa irra qabe iddoo hundaati ramadamee jira.
EnglishTranslation: The Prosperity Party's main and central aim is to complete, by another route, the Neftegna system of Menelik that was left unfinished — and in our district too, that is the scheme at work. The Oromo and oppressed nations, whose children's blood and bones were extracted as tribute, never asked that the old Neftegna system of the northern rulers be completed rather than ended; their demand was the demand of self-mastery over their land. Yet the entity that named itself 'the change' came out, took the people's trust, handed it back to the Neftegna, and rebranded itself the Prosperity Party. Why? To suppress the questions the Oromo were asking about Finfinne, Dire Dawa, Harar and the like, and to suppress oppressed peoples' demand for self-rule — and, as in the past, to enthrone the children of the Neftegna and the bastard offspring of Menelik on Oromo land, begging alms from foreigners, misallocating budgets, neglecting social services, and plunging the people into hardship. It is the party of the old property-looters, helping them extend their straws to loot the poor further. If this takes hold over us, we will again be reduced to watchmen on our own land. So our people must not be fooled by those carrying Prosperity's mission against the Oromo. Why is a Prosperity spokesperson assigned everywhere in our district?

OriginalText: Jechoota jibbaa akka '[SLUR_TIGRAY]' marsaa hawaasaa irratti hin facaasinaa; Bakka uummataa hundaaf
EnglishTranslation: Do not spread hate words like '[SLUR_TIGRAY]' on social media; Bakka uummataa hundaaf

OriginalText: የሰው ጅብ። ሜዳውን ወደ ሞሉት እንስሳት ተደብቆ ከጎሬው ይመጣል ከቻለ አቅመ ቢስ ህጻናትን ጎትቶ ይዞ ካልቻለ ታፉ ዘንጥሎ ነፍስን በሚያጠፉ እሩጫ ሜዳውን ለቆ ይጠፉል እሱ ነው የጅብ ጀግንነት ሜዳውን እማያስለቅቅ፣ በትርፎ እሚያስሮጥ። ሲመጣ ደንግጦ፣ሲቦተርፍ ደንግጦ።ይዞ ሲሮጥ ደንግጦ፣ሲበላ ደግጦ፣ሲደነግጥ አንዛርጦ ነው።ይህ የጅብ ጀግና ነው። የሰው ጅብ ጀግናዎችም አሉ መሳርያ ይዞ እንደነሱ ታጥቆ ጫካ ለ ጫካ እሚያባርራቸው ላይ አቅመ ቢሶች እሩዋጮች ናቸው ጀግና መሆን ሲያምራቸው ከሚርመጠመጡበት ጫካ ወተው ገበሬና ሴት ህጻናት ተማሪ ገለው ጨፍጭፈው ወደ ጫካቸው እሚሮጡ።በድል ስሜት እሚሰኩሩ። ለ አንድ ደቂቃ ወደቀልባቸው ቢመለሱ ስክን ብለው እንደ ሰው ቢያስቡ እሚያብዱ።ከታጠክ ከታጠቀ ጋር ከተኮስክ እሚተኩስ ጋር ከሆነ አንተ አንበሳ ነህ። ያ ካልሆነ ግን አንተ የጅብ ጀግና ነህ። ወግድ አንተን ብሎ የነጻነት ታጋይ ቀጣፊ ነፍሰ በላ። እግዚአብሄር ግፍን በግፍ እንደሚመልስ ባይናችን አይተናል።አይምሰልህ እግዚአብሄር ያልቀጣቸውን ግፎኞች በተለይ ህጻናት፣ሴቶች፣ደካማ ከታች አፈር ገፊ ከላይ ዝናብ ጠባቂ ላይ የሰለጠኑትን በአለም ላይ ብትኳትን አንድም አታገኝም። ነጻነት ሀሳብ ነው እምነት ነው በተለይ ልትታገልለት ከወጣህ ዘር ቋንቋ ቀለም አይመርጥም ያመነኩስሀል ትግልህ ከጨፍላቂዎች ጋር ብቻ ነው ውግንናህ ለምንዱባኖች ነው።አትቅጠፍ አንተ ማንንም አትወድም መውደድ እኮ በረከት ነው በረከት እኮ ማስተዋል ነው ማስተዋል ህጻናትን ገበሬን ተማሪን ሴትን አያስገድልም እመን አንተ የጅብ ጀግና ነህ ህጻን ገዳይ ጨቅላን አፍራጭ።ጅብ።ጫካው ልባቸው ውስጥ ያለ ደሞ አሉ ይበሉዋቸው እሚሉ።ህጻናት ልጆቻቸውን ወንድም እህቶቻቸውን እናት እባቶቻቸውን በስስት አይን እይናቸውን እያዩ የህጻናትን የእናት አባትን ሞት አሰቃቂ ጭፍጨፉ ምክንያታዊ ሊያረጉ እሚጥሩ አንተም አንቺም እንደዚህ ካሰብክ ያው ነህ ጅብ ነህ።ጅብ ነሽ።ፈጣሪ አንተንም አንቺንምእይምርህም። wait for it ጅቦች።
EnglishTranslation: [Condensed, faithful.] An extended 'human hyena' metaphor. A hyena hides in its den, comes out to drag off helpless children if it can, otherwise flees in a life-saving sprint — that is 'hyena heroism,' frightened at every turn. So too, it says, there are 'human hyena heroes': armed men who chase the defenceless from forest to forest, and when they crave heroism they come out, kill and massacre farmers, women, children and students, then run back to the forest drunk on a sense of victory — and would go mad if for one minute they thought like humans. 'If you fight the armed and shoot at those who shoot back, you are a lion; otherwise you are a hyena hero.' It denounces the 'lying, soul-eating freedom-fighter,' insists God repays cruelty with cruelty, and argues real freedom is an idea and a faith that does not choose ethnicity, language or colour — your fight is only against oppressors, your loyalty to the wretched. It calls such a fighter a 'child-killer, infant-dismemberer, hyena,' extends the charge to those who rationalise the massacres, and closes: 'the Creator will not spare you — wait for it, hyenas.'
